women.name: Welfare Services for Women
women.description: The scheme aims to provide welfare support and financial assistance for women in distress, including widows, victims of violence, trafficked women, and economically disadvantaged women.

women.name: Shelter Home For Women (SHW)
women.description: The scheme "Shelter Home for Women (SHW)" provides temporary shelter and support to women who have no family or social support systems to rely on and rehabilitate the women socially and economically by the provision of skill training, and counselling.

women.name: Individual loaning scheme: Haryana Women Development Corporation
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to women for economically viable projects. Through this scheme, subsidies and loans are provided to eligible women for projects costing.

women.name: Maternity Benefit for Women Beneficiaries
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit for Women Beneficiaries" scheme under the Nagaland Building and Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board provides financial assistance to pregnant women registered as beneficiaries and wives of registered beneficiaries. The assistance can be availed up to two times.

women.name: Pension To Widows And Destitute Women-Chandigarh
women.description: Under the Pension To Widows And Destitute Women scheme To provide financial assistance to Widows and Destitute Women of Chandigarh.

women.name: Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme “Sikkim Unmarried Women Pension Scheme (SUWPS)” was launched in 2013 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, the unmarried women of Below Poverty Line (BPL) families in Sikkim would receive a pension of ₹ 2000/- per month.

women.name: Women Scientist Scheme-B
women.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates with break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. Women scientists who wish to apply under this scheme are required to develop their own project/proposals for scientific and technological solutions

women.name: Amma Two Wheeler Scheme for Working Women
women.description: The Amma Two-wheeler is a scheme that will empower working women in Tamil Nadu State.

women.name: Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women
women.description: The scheme aims to provide to eligible women/ transgender beneficiaries of Tamil Nadu under the Zero Ticket Bus Travel Scheme for Women, Free of Cost Travel in Government of Tamil Nadu Buses. No Need to Pay any Fare up to 30 Kilometers.

women.name: Self-Employment loan scheme for Minority Widows, Divorcees / Abandoned Women
women.description: The scheme aims to provide self-employment loans to women from minority communities. Financial assistance with a 20% subsidy is provided to widows, divorced women, and abandoned women from minority communities. The scheme is implemented by the KSMDFC.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa - Vulnerable Women
women.description: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa- Vulnerable Women" was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura to provide financial assistance to Vulnerable Woman in need of special care, support or protection because of age, disability.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Working Women
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to working women through loans up to ₹20,000/- at a 12% interest rate via District Central Cooperative Banks and their branches.

women.name: Nari Shakti Puraskar - National Award for Women
women.description: The award aims to acknowledge the achievements of women & recognize their contributions to society and the nation. The award is conferred annually on individuals in recognition of their exceptional service towards the cause of women’s empowerment, particularly for vulnerable and marginalized women.

women.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Women In Distress
women.description: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons.

women.name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
women.description: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to ₹ 2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.

women.name: Government Hostel for Working Women/ Girl Students
women.description: The scheme aims to provide suitable, inexpensive, and safe accommodation to women employed in government offices, organizations, and firms, as well as girl students studying in colleges. Essential facilities include a cot with mattress, lockable cupboards, television, newspapers, magazines, etc.

women.name: Pension to Unmarried Poor, Incapacitated Women of Age 50 years and above
women.description: The 'Pension to Unmarried Poor, Incapacitated Women of age 50 years and above' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a pension of ₹1,000/- to unmarried, poor, incapacitated women of age 50 years and above.

women.name: Assistance to Women for Trainer and Coaches Training Course
women.description: The scheme “Assistance to Women for Trainer and Coaches Training Course” by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to encourage women's participation in sports by providing financial assistance for diploma courses in sports education.

women.name: Financial Assistance To Poor & Needy Widow Women
women.description: "Financial Assistance to Poor & Needy Widow Women" is a scheme by the Department of Social Welfare, Govt. of Manipur. The objective of the scheme is to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows in the age group of 18-40 years.

women.name: Marriage Assistance To Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)
women.description: The scheme “Marriage Assistance to Differently Abled Women (Parinayam-II)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Women Entrepreneurs
women.description: The scheme aims to provide loans of up to ₹5,00,000/- at an interest rate of 12% (subject to change) for women entrepreneurs through District Central Cooperative Banks and its branches.

women.name: Vocational Training Of Destitute Women And Adolescent Girls
women.description: "Vocational Training of Destitute Women and Adolescent Girls" is a scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, a 6-months training is provided in the Trades such as Tailoring & Cutting, Embroidery, and Computer. This is a State Sponsored Scheme.

women.name: Women Helpline
women.description: "Women Helpline" provides 24X7 emergency and non-emergency response through the telephonic short-code 181 to women

women.name: Cash Award to Women Players of the State
women.description: The scheme "Cash Award to Women Players of the State" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to encourage and support talented female athletes through annual cash scholarships for those who excel at state and national level competitions.

women.name: Scheme For Women Entrepreneurs Mahila Udyam Nidhi (MUN)
women.description: The scheme aims to meet the equity gap for new Small Scale Industrial units and service activities promoted by women entrepreneurs. It offers Term Loans and Seed Capital for projects costing up to ₹10,00,000/-.

women.name: Uttarakhand Compensation Scheme for Women Victims/Survivors of Sexual Offences and Other Crimes, 2020
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance/compensation ranging from a minimum of ₹3 lakh to a maximum of ₹10 lakh to women victims and survivors of sexual offences, as well as to other women victims of crime in the state.

women.name: Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme For Women Farmers And Farmers
women.description: The scheme “Agricultural Skill Development Training Programme for Women Farmers and Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

women.name: Biotechnology Career Advancement And Re-orientation (BioCARe) Programme For Women Scientists
women.description: Biotechnology Career Advancement and Re-orientation (BioCARe) Programme, a special scheme of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Ministry of Science & Technology, the government of India aims to enhance the participation of women scientists in India towards research in Biotechnology.

women.name: Internship Programme for Women Students / Scholars / Social Activists / Teachers
women.description: The Ministry of Women and Child Development launched the Internship Programme aims to harness the talent of the trainees, giving them an opportunity to work towards bringing more efficiency in the implementation of the schemes.

women.name: Scheme for Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims
women.description: Under the scheme, the acid attack victim is entitled to receive 100% free medical treatment from government or government-approved hospitals. Additionally, an ad-hoc relief of ₹1.00 lakh is provided to the acid attack victim, which is later reimbursed by the Women and Child Development Department.

women.name: Women Scientist Scheme-A
women.description: A Research Grant by MoST for female candidates to pursue research in frontier areas of science and engineering, preferably those having a break in career (minimum two years) and not having regular employment, to explore possibility of re-entry into the profession.

women.name: Women Scientist Scheme-C
women.description: A scheme by MoST for female candidates with a break in their career interested in addressing societal challenges through viable S&T interventions. 1-year training is provided in Intellectual Property Rights (IPRs), patent search, know-how, drafting, filing, trademarks, trade secrets, and copyright.

women.name: Procedure for Admission to Government Women Welfare and Rehabilitation Centre and Women's Home
women.description: The scheme aims to provide support to women above 18 years of age who are orphans, destitute, abandoned, found on roads, or mentally and physically disabled. Such women are provided with clothing, food, accommodation, medical care, counselling, entertainment, and training facilities free of cost.

women.name: Deserted Women Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension to Abandoned married women, mentally ill husband/wife & destitute unmarried women in the state. Under this scheme, beneficiaries receive a pension of ₹1,200/- per month, & in case of mental disability (spouse), the amount is ₹1,400/- per month.

women.name: Widow / Destitute Women Pension Scheme - Punjab
women.description: Punjab State Government started a pension for widow and destitute women.

women.name: Tailoring Training To Scheduled Caste & Backward Classes Widows/Destitute Women/Girls
women.description: The aim of the scheme is to enable Scheduled Caste Widows/girls/destitute women for self-employment. A stipend of Rs.600/- P.M. and raw material costing Rs.300/- per month per trainee is given to a trainee for getting training from the nearest Kalyan Kendar run by this department.

women.name: Special Incentive Scheme for Women of Tharu, Boksa and Other Tribes (For Training and Marketing)
women.description: The scheme aims to empower tribal women artisans through specialized training and marketing opportunities and ensures the provision of financial assistance for travel, logistics, and stall rent for participating artisans.

women.name: Organization of Various Conclaves and Felicitations to Encourage Women, Women Scientists, Teachers and Young Students
women.description: The scheme aims to promote and enhance scientific attitude and skill development of women, women scientists, teachers, and young students of the state by organizing conclaves and felicitating them.

women.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana (for women only) GNTDNT
women.description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women of nomadic and denotified castes and support women entrepreneurs doing independent business. Through this scheme, microfinance is provided to women beneficiaries to pursue a business/occupation of their choice.

women.name: Post Doctoral Fellowship To Women Candidates
women.description: The UGC has initiated a scheme of “Post Doctoral Fellowship for Women” to those candidates, who are unemployed holding Ph.D. degree in their respective subject areas with an aim to accelerate the talented instincts of the women candidates to carry out the advanced studies and research.

women.name: New Swarnima Yojana for Women (GTKVN)
women.description: The scheme aims to promote economic upliftment of women from Thakor & Koli communities living below poverty line by supporting them in self-employment ventures. Under this scheme, 100% financial support up to ₹1,00,000/- is provided to eligible women for starting a business/trade of their choice.

women.name: Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research
women.description: The scheme “Women Involvement in Science and Engineering Research (WISER)” aims to build scientific capacity, retain and promote women researchers in India & Germany by utilizing complementary expertise in science, technology, innovation and research partnerships.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Revamped Micro Credit Loan for Women Vendors of Flower, Vegetable, Fruit etc.
women.description: The scheme provides revamped micro credit loans through District Central Cooperative Banks to support women vendors selling flowers, vegetables, fruits etc. Loans range from  ₹100/- to  ₹5,000/- with an interest rate of 11%.

women.name: Assistance Scheme for Handloom Spinning-Weaving Women Workers
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to traditional women workers whose primary occupation is handloom weaving, spinning, or related weaving activities. Under this scheme, eligible women workers are provided with handloom equipment, including looms & related equipment, worth upto ₹25,000/-.

women.name: Scheme Of Assistance To Women Entrepreneurs (Mahalir Udavi)
women.description: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to new or existing Micro Enterprises and Small Scale Industry units exclusively promoted by women or having a majority of women entrepreneurs. It provides term loans and working capital assistance up to 75% of the project cost.

women.name: IMA Nongthangleima Yaipha Tengbang Scheme
women.description: The "Ima Nongthangleima Yaipha Tengbang Scheme" provides support to approximately 4 lakh women in Manipur who are above the age of 40 years. The scheme aims to empower these women by offering crucial financial assistance, thereby aiding them in pursuing diverse livelihood options.

women.name: Annapurna Yojana
women.description: The scheme “Annapurna Yojana” implemented by the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department, Government of West Bengal aims to provide assured monthly financial assistance to eligible women residing in the state for their empowerment and socio-economic upliftment. Under the scheme, el

women.name: Pension to Widows and Destitute Women
women.description: Under this scheme, widows and destitute women aged 18 years and above are eligible for a pension if they are domiciles of Haryana and have been residing in the state for at least one year at the time of application submission.

women.name: Gaura Shakti Yojana
women.description: The objective of scheme is to prevent crimes against women & girls and to ensure prompt action in case of any incident. Under this, a three-tier support system is set up with Mahila Desks at police stations,Women Safety Helpline & Counselling Cells at district level, & a State Women Safety Helpline.

women.name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme
women.description: The scheme “The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Allowance to Destitute Women Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Union Territory of Andaman and Nicobar Islands to provide financial assistance to the poorest and destitute women in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

women.name: Delhi Pension Scheme To Women In Distress (Widow Pension)
women.description: Delhi Pension Scheme to Women in Distress is a welfare scheme to provide social security by way of financial assistance to widows, divorced, separated, abandoned, deserted or destitute women in the age group of 18 years of lifelong who do not have adequate means of subsistence and are poor & needy.

women.name: Financial Assistance To Women And Girl Acid Attack Victims
women.description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Women and Girls Acid Attack Victims” by the Govt. of Haryana, provides financial assistance in the form of a monthly pension to the women/girls residing in Haryana who have suffered disfigurement of any part of the body or have become disabled due to acid attack.

women.name: Subsidized Scheme for Widows: Haryana Women Development Corporation
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Haryana Domiciled Widow, Divorced, and Legally Separated Women. Through this scheme, a subsidy on the total loan is provided.

women.name: Training Program for A-HELP Women Workers - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
women.description: The scheme aims to provide community-service-based skill development and employment opportunities for women in the field of animal husbandry. Eligible women members of Self-Help Groups under the Uttarakhand State Rural Livelihood Mission can apply.

women.name: New Swarnim Yojana (for women only) GNTDNT
women.description: The scheme aims to achieve economic upliftment by providing self-employment with dignity. Through this scheme, loans for self-employment at an annual interest rate are provided to women beneficiaries of nomadic and denotified castes living below the poverty line.

women.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
women.description: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.

women.name: Government Service Home - Tamil Nadu
women.description: The scheme "Government Service Home" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide institutional care to widows, destitute women, deserted women, adolescent girls and differently-abled women and their children.

women.name: Government Working Women’s Hostel
women.description: The scheme "Government Working Women’s Hostel" is an initiative by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide safe accommodation facilities to working women who live far away from their families, belonging to lower and middle-income groups.

women.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Bunkar Yojana
women.description: DDUBY is a government initiative in Arunachal Pradesh to provide affordable credit to women weavers, offering an interest subvention of 7% on short-term loans and working capital requirements.

women.name: Financial Assistance for Self-Marriage of Registered Women Workers (HBOCWWB)
women.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹50,000/- is provided to registered women workers for arranging their own marriage who have a minimum one-year regular membership.

women.name: Indo-French Visiting/Mobility Programme for Women in Science
women.description: This programme will encourage women candidates to work with the Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

women.name: Indo-French Postdoctoral Research Programme for Women in Science
women.description: This programme will provide a platform for women candidates to engage & work with Indian/French scientific communities with an aim to accelerate their talented instincts towards carrying out advanced studies and research in the frontier areas of Science & Technology.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme-Madhya Pradesh
women.description: The Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme is being operated to provide financial support to widowed women living below the poverty line.

women.name: Ganga Swarupa Punah Lagna Arthik Sahay Scheme
women.description: The scheme supports remarried women who are beneficiaries of the Ganga Swarupa Pension Scheme, aiming to reintegrate them into society with financial support.

women.name: Nawabihan Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to provide support and assistance, including legal aid and shelter, to women who are victims of domestic violence, as mandated by the Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act 2005. This scheme ensures that affected women receive the necessary resources for their well-being.

women.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension for Women in Distress
women.description: The scheme is implemented by the Social and Tribal Welfare Department, Administration of Union Territory of Ladakh. Under this scheme, a financial assistance of ₹1,000/- per month is provided as a pension to destitute widows, divorced, or deserted women with no source of income.

women.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Udyam Protsahan Yojana
women.description: This scheme launched by the Rajasthan government to empower women by providing them with loans and other financial assistance to start or expand their businesses

women.name: Sanitary Pad Supply Scheme
women.description: The "Sanitary Pad Supply Scheme" by the Women, Child Development & Social Security Department, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote hygiene and health among women and adolescent girls. It provides free sanitary pads quarterly to women aged 20–40 years through Anganwadi centers.

women.name: Women In Science and Engineering-Societal Challenges with Opportunities Fellowship
women.description: The “WISE-SCOPE Fellowship” Program was started by the Department of Science & Technology, Government of India with the aims to provide opportunity to Women Scientists and Technologists who have completed Ph.D. and want to utilize their S&T knowledge and expertise for the benefit of society.

women.name: Tejaswini-the Radiant
women.description: A scheme to provide financial assistance to the young women for setting up gainful self-employment ventures, suited to their skills, training, aptitude and local conditions.

women.name: Entrepreneurship Development by SC & ST Women in Science Technology Engineering Mathematics
women.description: ED/SC-ST- WISTEM)” is aimed for exploring the potential of entrepreneurship along with improvement in the livelihood options for unemployed SC & ST women in Science, Technology, Engineering & Mathematics (STEM) areas using tools of Science, Technology & Innovation.

women.name: Madhya Pradesh Janani Suraksha Yojana
women.description: Under this scheme, cash incentives are provided to pregnant women and their motivators for delivery in government or accredited private hospitals.

women.name: Protection Against Domestic Violence
women.description: The scheme "Protection Against Domestic Violence" by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Haryana, aims to provide legal, emotional, and social support to women facing domestic violence through grievance redressal, offering protection, counseling, and mediation to victims.

women.name: Widow B.Ed Scheme-Rajasthan
women.description: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Widow B.Ed Scheme" for Widow/abandoned women.

women.name: NAMO Shree Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to ensure proper nutritional support to pregnant women and lactating mothers and encourage institutional deliveries. It provides financial assistance of ₹12,000/- to eligible women beneficiaries covering expenses from conception to delivery.

women.name: Janani Express Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide free and timely transport to pregnant women for safe institutional deliveries.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Work Form Home-Job Work Yojana
women.description: The main objective of the "Mukhyamantri Work from Home" Scheme is to provide an opportunity for the women of the state to get employment sitting at home and to empower women by providing them with financial help by giving them work.

women.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana (RS-CSEP)
women.description: The Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Koshal Sanvardhan Yojana, offered by the Rajasthan Knowledge Corporation Limited (RKCL), provides free training in spoken English and personality development for women and girls.

women.name: Vandan Matru Yojana
women.description: This scheme is a Gujarat government initiative providing financial assistance to pregnant and lactating women from economically weaker sections to promote maternal and child health.

women.name: Nari Adalat
women.description: The scheme aims to provide an alternative grievance redressal mechanism for women at the grassroots level through mediation, counselling, and awareness of rights and entitlements.

women.name: Old Age And Destitute Pension
women.description: The Government of Puducherry introduced Old Age And Destitute Pension Scheme to extend a helping hand by way of monthly financial assistance to Old Age Persons/Widows/ Deserted Women/ Unmarried Women and Enuches so that they could defray some petty personal expenses without depending on others.

women.name: Mahila Swavlamban Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to women from rural and urban areas for undertaking economic activities, with support in the form of a subsidy and loans.

women.name: Concessional Bus Travel Facility to Women above 60 years of age- Punjab
women.description: Under the scheme, all the women of 60 years and above residing in the State of Punjab have been given the benefit w.e.f. 12.11.1999 for 50% concession in bus fare in the Punjab Roadways and Pepsu Road Transport Corporation Buses.

women.name: Lakshmir Bhandar Scheme
women.description: The "Lakshmir Bhandar" scheme is a flagship program to provide financial assistance to women from economically weaker sections of society, for the empowerment of women in the age group of 25-60 years, and enrolled in ‘Swasthya Sathi’.

women.name: Shramashakthi Special Women's Scheme
women.description: The "Shramashakthi Special Women's Scheme" is a special scheme for the economic empowerment of widowed, divorced, unmarried women of the minority community.

women.name: Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women
women.description: The scheme “Grant of Financial Assistance to Poor Scheduled Caste Pregnant & Lactating Women” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Department, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to provide assistance for the well-being of Pregnant and Lactating mothers and their children.

women.name: Handicraft Rebate Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides 5–20% rebates on sales of handicraft goods to cooperatives, with higher incentives for women-led groups and during festivals. Applications are submitted online via e-Kutir.

women.name: Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana
women.description: The Rajasthan government's Social Justice and Empowerment Department launched the "Vidhva Vivah Uphar Yojana" program, a social welfare initiative that aims to improve the lives of widow women.

women.name: Ganga Swarupa Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to widowed women, ensuring self-reliance through monthly pensions.

women.name: Nursing Kaushal College Jharkhand
women.description: The "Nursing Skill College" scheme provides skill-based nursing education and employment opportunities to young women, especially from disadvantaged backgrounds. The scheme offers free residential training, modern learning facilities, and placement support.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Matrupushti Uphar
women.description: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Matrupushti Uphar” was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura, to provide financial assistance of ₹500/- to pregnant women through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) for antenatal checkups at any health facility.

women.name: Subsidy Scheme For Establishment Of Goat Unit (10+1) For Scheduled Tribe Women
women.description: The scheme “Subsidy Scheme for Establishment of Goat Unit (10+1) for Scheduled Tribe Women” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat to uplift Economically poor livestock breeders of Gujarat State.

women.name: Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Sukh-Samman Nidhi Yojana
women.description: The "Indira Gandhi Pyari Behna Sukh-Samman Nidhi Yojana" is an initiative by the Himachal Pradesh government. The scheme recognizes the significant contributions of women in household work, cultural preservation, and family economy by providing a monthly assistance.

women.name: Mata Shabri Mahila Sashktikaran Yojana
women.description: The "Mata Shabri Mahila Sashktikaran Yojana" scheme aims to provide subsidies to purchase LPG gas connections and stoves, thereby reducing their dependence on firewood for cooking & improving the quality of life of women from scheduled caste families living below the poverty line (BPL).

women.name: Kunwar Bai Nu Mameru Yojana Gujarat
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to ST families during the marriage of girls, providing ₹12,000 per couple as financial assistance to eligible tribal women across the state.

women.name: Handloom Rebate Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides 10% special rebate for 120 festival days; Additional 5-15% permanent rebates for regular sales; Enhanced 20% rebates for women-led cooperatives. The scheme aims to enhance market competitiveness for Gujarat's handloom cooperatives and apex societies.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Vidwa Evam Ekal Naari Awas Yojana
women.description: The "Mukhyamantri Vidwa Evam Ekal Naari Awas Yojana" was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Himachal Pradesh. The scheme aims to provide financial grants for the construction of houses to economically weak widows and single women.

women.name: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar’s Electric Auto (e-Auto) Subsidy Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to socially and economically empower Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe women by supporting them in income-generating activities through electric autos. It provides a subsidy up to 75% of the cost (maximum ₹3,00,000/-) for electric autos to Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe women.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
women.description: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (MOPNG), introduced the ‘"Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana 2.0" in India. The Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana (PMUY) is a scheme launched by the Government of India in 2016 to provide free LPG (liquefied petroleum gas) connections to women from below-poverty-line.

women.name: Integrated Dairy Development Scheme Gujarat
women.description: Under this scheme, tribal women beneficiaries are provided with milch cattle, dairy equipment, and financial assistance of up to ₹90,000 per unit.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Shramik Seva Prasuti Sahayata Yojana
women.description: Launched on 1st April 2018, the scheme "Mukhya Mantri Shramik Seva Prasuti Sahayata Yojana" by the Labour Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides maternity support to pregnant women over 18 years of age who are registered as unorganized workers.

women.name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Resources in Tribal Areas: Fish Seed Rearing by Women - Gujarat
women.description: The scheme aims to increase fish production through inland fisheries and provide employment opportunities, particularly to Scheduled Tribe women engaged in fish seed rearing.

women.name: Union Territory of Lakshadweep Pension Scheme for Abandoned Ladies/Destitute
women.description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹1,500/- to abandoned ladies & destitute women in the UT. The scheme covers women who have been divorced or abandoned by their husband or relatives, have not remarried, & are without any source of income or have only a nominal income.

women.name: Lakshmi Bai Samajik Suraksha Pension Yojana
women.description: Lakshmi Bai Social Security Scheme has been launched by the Bihar government for the widow women of the state.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme - Tamil Nadu
women.description: 'Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Dept, Tamil Nadu. A pension of ₹1,000 is provided to destitute widows who are 40 years and above in age and belong to households below the poverty line.

women.name: Balika Samrithi Yojana
women.description: “Balika Samrithi Yojana” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry was introduced to improve the status of the girl child and provide nutritious food to the girl child. Financial assistance of ₹500 in the form of a National Savings Certificate is provided to lactating mothers.

women.name: Janani Sahayogi Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide free and safe delivery and newborn care services to BPL families by offering free treatment to pregnant women in government and accredited private hospitals.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Sukh Ashray Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide comprehensive care, education, and support to orphans, abandoned children, specially-abled individuals, destitute women, and senior citizens, recognizing them as “children of the state” and ensuring their holistic development.

women.name: Destitute Widow Pension Scheme
women.description: 'Destitute Widow Pension Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Dept, Tamil Nadu. A pension of ₹1,000 is provided to destitute widows who are 18 years and above in age. One free saree during Pongal and Deepavali and free rice in the Anganwadi Centres are also provided.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Rajya Nirashrit Mahila Samman Pension Yojana
women.description: “Mukhyamantri Rajya Nirashrit Mahila Samman Pension Yojana” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand, that aims to provide social security to women who are unable to sustain themselves with their own resources.

women.name: “RAKSHAK PURASKARS’’ Award
women.description: The awards are conferred to the individuals who have shown exceptional courage, especially in adverse circumstances in coming to aid, protecting or helping beyond the call of duty and assisting in dealing with the victims of any type of violence, attack or harassment against women and girls.

women.name: Marriage Assistance for the Construction Workers
women.description: The "Marriage Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides Marriage benefits in the form of financial assistance to the eligible registered women members & their immediate dependents of the board.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
women.description: The scheme aims to provide fixed-day assured, comprehensive and quality antenatal care universally to all pregnant women in 2nd and 3rd trimester on the 9th of every month. It offers free comprehensive antenatal care services at government health facilities.

women.name: House Subsidy Scheme
women.description: A subsidy of Rs. 1,30,000/- is given to persons from Scheduled Castes, Other Backward Classes, Minority Communities, Single Women, or handicapped for the construction of the house.

women.name: Mahila Adhikarita Yojana (Gujarat Safai Kamdar Development Corporation)
women.description: "Mahila Adhikarita Yojana" introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Gujarat, is a centrally sponsored financial support scheme offering loans of ₹20,000/- at a subsidized interest rate to women sweepers and their dependents to promote self-reliance and upliftment.

women.name: Udyogini Scheme
women.description: Udyogini is an innovative scheme to assist women in gaining self-reliance and economic independence through self-employment, mainly through trade and the service sector. It also provides for a subsidy on loans for undertaking business activities/ micro enterprises through banks, etc.

women.name: Mobility Scheme
women.description: The Mobility Scheme is aimed to provide an opportunity to women scientists who are facing difficulties in their present job due to relocation (marriage, transfer of husband to any other location within the country, attending ailing parents, and accompanying children studying in different city).

women.name: SUBHADRA
women.description: “SUBHADRA” Scheme is a flagship initiative by the Government of Odisha aimed at financially empowering women, improving their socio-economic status, and promoting their safety and well-being.

women.name: Mahila Swayamsiddha Yojana Rajasthan
women.description: The scheme objective is to provide free skill training and self-employment support to widowed, abandoned, and destitute women through voluntary organizations. The scheme is implemented by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department with financial assistance provided to participating NGOs.

women.name: Aahar Anudan Yojana
women.description: The scheme "Aahar Anudan Yojana" provides monthly assistance of ₹1,000 to students, girls, and women from backward tribes like Baiga, Bharia, and Saharia. The scheme aims to combat malnutrition among special tribal families by ensuring access to nutritious food through financial assistance.

women.name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram Madhya Pradesh
women.description: The scheme aims to provide free healthcare services to pregnant women and infants up to one year of age, including free treatment, medicines, diet, and transport facilities in government hospitals.

women.name: Scheme for Fruit and Vegetable Preservation and Training Program in Horticulture Department HRT 5
women.description: The "Scheme for Fruit and Vegetable Preservation and Training Program in Horticulture Department HRT 5" aims to enhance the skills of women through training on value addition, preservation, and kitchen gardening of horticultural produce, while also providing a daily stipend and training support.

women.name: Education Loan Scheme: Haryana Women Development Corporation
women.description: The scheme aims to encourage female students from Haryana to pursue higher education and reduce their interest burden. Through this scheme, financial assistance and an interest subsidy are provided to eligible female students.

women.name: New Swarnima Scheme (GBCDC)
women.description: The scheme aims to provide a special scheme for the self-employment of women from backwards classes living below the poverty line. Through this scheme, financial assistance for chosen businesses is offered to female beneficiaries from socially and educationally backward classes.

women.name: Mahila Kisan Yojana
women.description: The scheme "Mahila Kisan Yojana" is an economic empowerment scheme by the Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation, Government of Haryana. Through this scheme, loans are provided to the women from Scheduled Castes for the betterment of their economic status through self-employment.

women.name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram
women.description: The scheme aims to provide completely free and cashless delivery, including caesarean section, for pregnant women at government health facilities along with free treatment for sick newborns and infants.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme - Sikkim
women.description: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)” by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim provides financial support is provided to the poor widows of the state of Sikkim. The beneficiary receives a monthly pension of ₹ 2000/- through DBT.

women.name: Savitribai Phule Self-Help Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides financial support to unemployed women from the Scheduled Caste (SC) category in the state to help them start businesses in industry, service, or trade sectors.

women.name: KCR Nutrition Kit
women.description: KCR Nutrition Kits Scheme is a welfare initiative launched by the Government of Telangana, India, aimed at providing nutritious food to pregnant. The primary objective of the scheme is to improve the nutritional status of pregnant women.
tags: Providing Nutritious Food To Pregnant Women And Children
Improve The Nutritional Status Of Pregnant

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana
women.description: The scheme is to provide maternity benefits to women belonging to socially and economically disadvantaged sections of society. For first child the maternity benefit of ₹5,000 is provided in two instalments under PMMVY and second child, it is ₹6,000 is to be provided subject to second child is girl.

women.name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Maternity Loan through Self Help Groups
women.description: The scheme offers financial aid to pregnant women via Self Help Groups. The loan is capped at ₹2,000/- with an interest rate of 11%, subject to changes.

women.name: Mamata Scheme
women.description: In order to improve the process in curbing the high rate of mortality and infant mortality rate, the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Odisha introduced a scheme named "MAMATA" - a conditional cash transfer maternity benefit scheme.

women.name: Chief Minister Nari Shakti Yojana
women.description: The State government of Bihar Started the "Chief Minister Nari Shakti Yojana" scheme with the aim of improving the lives of Disable persons. Financial assistance is provided by the government through these schemes.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Virasat ka Samvardhan
women.description: PM VIKAS is a Central sector scheme that focuses on socio-economic empowerment of six notified minorities in the country through skilling & training, women leadership & empowerment and education. The scheme integrates erstwhile skilling & education schemes of the Ministry of Minority Affairs.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Asangathit Karmakar Cycle Sahayata Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mukhyamantri Asangathit Karmakaar Saayakal Sahaayata Yojana" for unorganized worker on 28 April 2012.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Rajshri Yojana
women.description: The Mukhyamantri Rajshri Yojana is a program launched by the Rajasthan government in June 2016. It aims to improve the overall development of girls in the state by providing financial assistance for their health and education.

women.name: Mission Saksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0, DNH & DD
women.short_title: SS-DADRA AND NAGAR HAVELI AND DAMAN & DIU
women.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
women.description: The Union Territory of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu has successfully launched the "Mission Saksham Anganwadi & Poshan 2.0" scheme to provide nutritional support for children below 6 years of age, Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers (PW&LM), and Adolescent Girls (14-18 years).

women.name: Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana
women.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mahila Kamgar Kaushal Unnayan Evan Theka Shramik, Hamaal Tatha Ghareloo Mahila Kamgaar Parivar Sashaktikaran Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

women.name: Matrutva Prasuvidha Yojana
women.description: "Matrutva Prasuvidha Yojana" is a Medical Assistance scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹ 15,000/- for the first two deliveries of the registered female worker.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Vidhva Pension yojana
women.description: In the Indira Gandhi National Vidhva Pension Yojana (IGNWPS), financial support is provided to the widows of the state of Rajasthan.

women.name: Poshan Sudha
women.description: This scheme is a government initiative to provide nutrition and healthcare support to pregnant and lactating mothers in tribal districts of Gujarat.

women.name: Dai Didi Mobile Clinic Scheme
women.description: Government of Chhattisgarh state, started a scheme named "Dai Didi Clinic Scheme" in 2020.

women.name: Scheme for Maternity Benefit
women.description: The Scheme for Maternity Benefit was launched by the Tripura Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, under the Labour Department of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to registered female construction workers after delivery

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Udyami Yojana
women.description: This is a flagship scheme of the Bihar government aimed at promoting entrepreneurship and self-employment among the youth by providing financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- for setting up businesses.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Suraksha Yojana
women.description: The "Mukhyamantri Kanya Suraksha Yojana (MKSY)" is a welfare initiative by the Government of Bihar to combat female foeticide, improve the sex ratio, and promote birth registration.

women.name: Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy
women.description: The scheme "Assistance for Delivery of a Child or the Miscarriage of Pregnancy or the Termination of Pregnancy" was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to give financial assistance for the delivery of a child, miscarriage, or termination of pregnancy

women.name: Mukhyamantri Balika (Snatak) Protsahan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to encourage higher education among girls in Bihar by providing a one-time incentive of ₹25,000/- to eligible graduate students of the state.

women.name: Marriage Grant Scheme
women.description: In Uttar Pradesh State, a scheme for the marriage of girls from economically weaker families of the state.

women.name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (APB&OCWWB)
women.description: The Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh has proposed and implemented the scheme “Maternity Benefit Scheme” for Registered Workers of Arunachal Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (APB&OCWWB).

women.name: Rehabilitation of Cured Leprosy Persons: Marriage Incentives & Support
women.description: The scheme is designed to assist Cured Leprosy Persons who face social and economic challenges in arranging marriages for their daughters.

women.name: Maternity Benefit to the Female Beneficiary
women.description: The Manipur Building and Other Construction Workers' Welfare Board (MBOCWWB) provide "Maternity Benefit" to female workers registered under the Act. Financial assistance is provided in cases of miscarriage or medical termination of pregnancy, up to two times.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Kalyakani Pension  Yojana
women.description: Under the Scheme, Every month financial assistance is provided to the Kalyani (widow) residing in the state for providing social security and subsistence.

women.name: Mukyamantri Samuhik Vivah Evam Anudan Yojna
women.description: The Rajasthan Government to encourage the organization of mass marriages in the state, provide financial grants to reduce wastage in marriages,

women.name: Sathiyavanimuthu Ammaiyar Ninaivu Free Supply of Sewing Machine Scheme
women.description: The 'Sathiyavanimuthu Ammaiyar Ninaivu Free Supply of Sewing Machine Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide sewing machines to destitute, deserted women/widows, differently abled men & women to increase self-employment.

women.name: Swarnima
women.description: The Swarnima Scheme provides loan assistance to female beneficiaries from Other Backward Classes (OBC) residing in Maharashtra to support self-employment activities, empowering them to establish a stable livelihood.

women.name: Janani Bal Suraksha Yojana
women.description: This health initiative aimed at improving maternal and infant health by increasing institutional deliveries, reducing infant and maternal mortality rates, and promoting immunization in Bihar.

women.name: Miscarriage Benefit
women.description: The "Miscarriage Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial benefits for miscarriage up to two times in a lifetime to the eligible female beneficiaries or the wives of male beneficiaries.

women.name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
women.description: The scheme aims to provide a secure savings option with assured returns for women. Through this scheme, 7.5% interest and flexible savings benefits are provided to women and minor girls.

women.name: Widow Pension Scheme (HPBOCWWB)
women.description: The "Widow Pension Scheme" launched by HPBOCWWB is designed to support widows of registered beneficiaries. Through this initiative, the Board will disburse a monthly amount of ₹1,500/- to help widows manage their expenses and improve their quality of life.

women.name: Mahila Samrudhhi Yojana (Gujarat Gopalak Vikas Nigam)
women.description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women and make them self-reliant. Through this scheme, individual women entrepreneurs are provided with microfinance loans to start a business of their choice.

women.name: Udita Yojana
women.description: Madhya Pradesh State Government started "Udita Yojana" for women health promotions.

women.name: Mangalya Scheme For Widow Remarriage
women.description: The “Mangalya Scheme” was launched by the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Kerala. Under the scheme, financial assistance is to be provided to eligible widows and divorced women for their remarriage.

women.name: Sakhi Niwas - Working Women's Hostel
women.description: The scheme aims to provide hostel facilities for women with higher education or professional training, as well as working women, to stay in urban areas by paying a nominal fee.

women.name: Atal Bhujal Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the management of groundwater resources in water-stressed areas. It provides institutional strengthening and financial incentives to Gram Panchayats and local communities for sustainable groundwater management and water-efficient practices.

women.name: Poshan Aahaar- Madhya Pradesh
women.description: The scheme was implemented by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. Under this scheme, children from 6 months to 6 years, pregnant women, and malnourished children are given nutritious food through Anganwadis.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Nahri Kendra
women.description: The scheme empowers tribal women by providing them with livelihood opportunities through women-run centers. These centers promote the sale of tribal dishes and home-made products, thereby improving income and living standards. Tribal women-run groups receive a subsidy covering 50% of project cost.

women.name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (HBOCWWB)
women.description: The scheme “Maternity Benefit Scheme (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

women.name: Gharelu Hinsa Ki Pidita Ke Liye Sahayta Yojana
women.description: The Madhya Pradesh State Government started "Gharelu Hinsa Peedit Ke Liye Sahayta" Yojana for victims of domestic violence in Madhya Pradesh, offering various types of assistance including financial aid, legal support, and shelter.

women.name: Marriage Assistance (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
women.description: The “Marriage Assistance” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for girl children (upto 2 children) of the registered female building workers.

women.name: Back-To-Lab Post-Doctoral Fellowship Programme
women.description: The “Back-to-Lab” programme of Women Scientists Division offers Research and Post-Doctoral Fellowship to women who have break in their career, to facilitate their re-entry in science research.

women.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
women.description: The scheme aims to reduce maternal and neonatal mortality by promoting institutional deliveries among poor pregnant women. It offers cash assistance for institutional and home deliveries, along with antenatal and postnatal care support, primarily benefiting poor pregnant women across India.

women.name: Mahila Bakri Palan
women.description: The scheme aims to empower women, especially abandoned, widowed, destitute, single, and disaster-affected women, by providing them support for goat rearing to generate livelihood and improve household income.

women.name: Widow/Abandoned/Single Woman Pension Scheme
women.description: Widow/Abandoned/Single Woman Pension Scheme of Himachal Pradesh Government aims to provide financial help to widows, abandoned women, and unmarried women shall be entitled to receive pension for a sum of Rs.1,150/-per month.

women.name: Minimata Mahtari Jatan Yojana
women.description: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh started this scheme on March 4, 2010, under the "Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board" for female construction workers. Under the scheme registered female construction workers will receive benefits during pregnancy.

women.name: Financial Assistance for Miscarriage for the Construction Workers
women.description: "Financial Assistance for Miscarriage for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides an amount of ₹3,000/- as financial assistance in case of miscarriage.

women.name: Maternity Benefit For Female Workers- JKBOCWWB
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit for Female Workers" scheme by the JKBOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Jammu & Kashmir, is a welfare program that provides maternity benefits to eligible registered female workers up to two times in their lifetime.

women.name: Doodh Sanjeevani Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide fortified, flavored, double toned pasteurized milk to students, pregnant women and lactating women. The scheme is implemented by the Anganwadi Centers and also by the Child Development Project Officers.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana
women.description: Mukhyamantri Mahila Utkarsh Yojana is a scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat to empower women in the state. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to women entrepreneurs and to promote their entrepreneurial spirit.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Avivahita Pension Yojana
women.description: Madhya Pradesh State Government started the "Mukhyamantri Avivahita Pension Yojana" for unmarried women of the state.

women.name: Financial assistance for Marriage for the Construction Worker
women.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
women.description: The "Financial Assistance for Marriage for the Construction Workers'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,  U.T. Administration of DNH & DD, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance for marriage of self and for children (upto 2 children) of the building workers.

women.name: Maternity Benefit
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides maternity benefits up to two times in a lifetime to the eligible female beneficiaries or the wives of male beneficiaries.

women.name: Female Child Birth Gift Scheme (HPBOCWWB)
women.description: The "Female Child Birth Gift Scheme" by the HPBOCWWB offers ₹51,000/- for each of two daughters of registered beneficiaries. The amount is deposited in a Fixed Deposit Receipt (FDR) and can be withdrawn once the daughter turns 18, ensuring long-term financial security.

women.name: Usha Kiran Yojana
women.description: In 2007, Madhya Pradesh State Government started "Usha Kiran Yojana" for women.

women.name: Mukhyamantri - Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana
women.description: The "Mukhyamantri - Majhi Ladki Bahin Yojana" is for the economic freedom of women in the state age group of 21 to 65, improving their health and nutrition and strengthening their decisive role in the family. The women will receive a financial benefit through direct benefit transfer.

women.name: Griha Lakshmi Scheme
women.description: The scheme "Griha Lakshmi" aims to provide financial assistance to women heads of households in Karnataka. The scheme offers a monthly benefit of ₹2,000/- to eligible women, helping them manage household expenses and improve their economic stability.

women.name: Mahila Dairy Vikas Pariyojana - Uttarakhand
women.description: The scheme aims to empower rural women in Uttarakhand by promoting their active participation in the dairy sector through Women Milk Producers Cooperative Societies, enhancing milk production, and providing training, incentives, and awareness programs for sustainable livelihood development.

women.name: Sewing Machine Scheme (HBOCWWB)
women.description: This scheme aims to encourage registered women construction workers and to enable them to mend their clothing at their homes. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to registered women construction workers to purchase a Sewing Machine.

women.name: Sanitary Napkin Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to provide sanitary napkins to adolescent girls and women at subsidized rates through Anganwadi centres across the state. Under this scheme, sanitary napkins are made available to adolescent girls and women at a cost of ₹6.00 through Anganwadi centres.

women.name: Mahila Samruddhi Yojana (DAADC)
women.description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment and financial independence among women from the Antyodaya Samaj, especially from Scheduled Castes. Under this scheme, loan up to ₹50,000/- is provided at a concessional interest rate to eligible women for starting small-scale businesses.

women.name: Chief Minister Ladli Behna Yojana
women.description: In 2023, Madhya Pradesh State Government started "Chief Minister Ladli Behna Yojana" for women empowerment

women.name: PMMSY: Installation of Cages in Reservoirs Scheme - Haryana
women.description: The scheme aims to promote cage fish farming. It provides grants per unit to the individuals and groups for sustainable aquaculture practices.

women.name: Maternity Benefit (O.B.O.C.W.W.B)
women.description: The “Maternity Benefit” scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Odisha, is a welfare scheme that provides maternity benefits to the female beneficiaries subject to a maximum of two children who  are registered beneficiaries for a period of more than one year under the board.

women.name: Kanya Sumangala Yojana
women.description: Various schemes are run by the government for the purpose of providing social security to women, Kanya Sumangala Yojana is one such scheme.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Vivah Shagun Yojna
women.description: This scheme is being implemented to honor the girl child and to ensure that the girls from poor families and daughters of widows/destitute women, sports women & orphan girl children, are married gracefully. For this purpose, grant is given to eligible persons to cover marriage expenses.

women.name: Women’s Instinct for Developing and Ushering in Scientific Heights & Innovation
women.description: 'WIDUSHI' programme aims to encourage and support senior women scientists to conduct research in interdisciplinary areas of Science and Technology.

women.name: Disability Pension - West Bengal
women.description: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Disability Pension" scheme.

women.name: Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana
women.description: The Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana was initiated by the "Department of Women, Child Development, and Social Security, Government of Jharkhand."

women.name: Old Age Pension
women.description: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Old Age Pension" scheme.

women.name: Alpsankhyak Muslim Parityaqta/Talaqshuda Mahila Sahayata Yojana
women.description: The objective of this scheme is to strengthen the economic condition of minority Muslim abandoned/divorced women and make them self-dependent by providing financial assistance of ₹25,000/-.

women.name: Mahila Samruddhi (Gujarat Backward Caste Development Corporation)
women.description: The scheme aims to create self-employment for women from the backward classes. Through this scheme, low-interest rate loans are provided to female beneficiaries.

women.name: USERC Establishment and Operation of Entrepreneurship Development Centers
women.description: The scheme aims to establish and operate Entrepreneurship Development Centers to provide structured training in entrepreneurship to students, women, and the general public of Uttarakhand.

women.name: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme
women.description: The scheme “Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare & Women Empowerment, Government of Tamil Nadu.

women.name: Aapki Beti Hamari Beti
women.description: The scheme “Aapki Beti Hamari Beti” was launched by the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Haryana on 24th August 2015.

women.name: Maternity Financial Assistance (UKBOCWWB)
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to registered women construction workers during the maternity period. This assistance is admissible only for the birth of up to two children.

women.name: Sanitary Napkin Scheme (UKBOCWWB)
women.description: The scheme aims to provide free sanitary napkins to the daughters of registered construction workers and to women construction workers, in order to promote health and hygiene.

women.name: Production of Foundation Seeds
women.description: The "Production of Foundation Seeds" scheme, provides subsidies to farmers cultivating seed farms for pulses, offering specific benefits to SC/ST farmers and farm women.

women.name: Health Benefits for Pregnant Mothers and Newborns through Supraja-AYUSH
women.description: The scheme aims to promote the health and well-being of pregnant women and newborns by providing Ayurvedic-based healthcare services and treatment.

women.name: Lakhpati Didi Yojana - Uttarakhand
women.description: The primary objective of the scheme is to improve the economic status of women in Uttarakhand by empowering them to become financially self-reliant and achieve the status of “Lakhpati Didis.”

women.name: SERB - POWER Fellowship
women.description: The SERB - POWER Fellowship is designed to identify and reward excellent women researchers in Indian academic institutions and R&D laboratories, holding Ph.D. degrees in any branch of science and engineering.

women.name: Maternity Benefit (MBOCWWB)
women.description: Under the scheme, financial assistance in the form of maternity benefits shall be provided to women construction workers registered under the Board during their maternity period.

women.name: Establishment of Vermicompost Units
women.description: The scheme aims to promote sustainable agriculture and organic farming by providing financial assistance for setting up vermicompost units to farmers and women self-help groups.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Kalyani Vivah Sahayta Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to widowed women during remarriage. It offers a one-time support of ₹2,00,000 to eligible kalyani beneficiaries.

women.name: Promotion of Institutional Delivery
women.description: The scheme aims to promote safe and institutional deliveries by providing free accommodation to pregnant women, especially from disaster-prone areas, near district hospitals.

women.name: Sukhad Sahara Yojana
women.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹500/- per month are provided to the widows and deserted women who are living below poverty line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.

women.name: PMMSY: Refrigerated vehicles - Gujarat
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for the purchase of vehicles. Through this scheme, subsidy benefits are provided to general, women, and SC/ST category beneficiaries.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Maternal Nutrition
women.description: The scheme aims to provide supplementary Take Home Ration (THR) in the form of nutrient-rich food products to pregnant women and lactating mothers across the state.

women.name: Chief Minister Pension Scheme
women.description: The scheme provides a monthly pension of ₹500/- to senior citizens, widows, and abandoned women listed on the basis of the survey list of Social, Economic and Caste Census 2011 in the state.

women.name: Lalima Abhiyaan
women.description: The Lalima Abhiyaan aims to improve the health of children, adolescent girls, and women of reproductive age, and focuses on the prevention of anemia and nutrition awareness among adolescent girls.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme- Bihar
women.description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension is provided to elderly people (women/men) aged 60 years or above belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) families to support them financially. This scheme is centrally sponsored.

women.name: Indira Amma Bhojanalya
women.description: The primary objective of the scheme is to provide nutritious and affordable food to the poor and needy sections of society and to economically strengthen rural women's self-help groups (SHGs) by providing continuous income-generating employment through the operation of these canteens.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahila Poshan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the health of pregnant and lactating women by providing nutritional food such as eggs twice a week and dates twice a week at Anganwadi Centres.

women.name: Assistance Program for the Cultivation of Lotus Fruit (Dragon Fruit)
women.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers to support the cultivation of dragon fruit (lotus fruit), with higher benefits for SC/ST and priority for small-scale and women farmers.

women.name: Free Employment Oriented Training to Educated Unemployed Youth of Backward Class and Minority Class
women.description: "Free Employment Oriented Training to Educated Unemployed Youth of Backward Class and Minority Class" aims to provide quality pre-examination training for various employment-oriented competitive examinations to talented but economically disadvantaged young men and women.

women.name: Micro Nutrient Spray
women.description: The “Micro Nutrient Spray” scheme provides a 50% subsidy or ₹70/- per hectare to eligible farmers, with a focus on ensuring benefits to SC/ST and women farmers.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Sashaktikaran Yojana
women.description: Under this scheme, permanent training will be provided for the economic and social upliftment of women suffering from any form of violence and living in difficult circumstances so that they can get employment.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Matrushakti Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to enhance maternal and child health by providing nutritional support to first-time pregnant women and mothers of young children during the crucial first 1000 days of life.

women.name: SERB - POWER Research Grants
women.description: The aim of the ‘SERB - POWER Research Grants’ is to encourage emerging and eminent women researchers for individual-centric and competitive mode of research funding to undertake R&D activities in frontier areas of science and engineering.

women.name: Widow Pension-West Bengal
women.description: The West Bengal government's Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department launched the "Widow Pension" scheme in 2010. This program aims to support widows facing economic hardship within the state.

women.name: Teelu Rauteli Award
women.description: The scheme aims to recognize and honor women and adolescent girls who have made outstanding achievements in various fields such as social work, education, literature, art, culture, courage, and bravery.

women.name: Maternity Assistance Scheme (GBOCWWB)
women.description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance during pregnancy to women construction workers and construction workers' wives registered with the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board and to provide social stability to construction workers.

women.name: Sewing Machine Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
women.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹4,500/- is provided to women workers employed in Industrial and Commercial Establishments in the state of Haryana for the purchase of sewing machines for their domestic use.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana
women.description: “Mukhyamantri Rajya Bridhhabasta Pension Yojana” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand. The scheme provides financial asistance to the age group of 60 years and above.

women.name: Imbichi Bawa Housing Renovation Scheme
women.description: The scheme "Imbichi Bawa Housing Renovation Scheme" by the Minority Welfare Department, Government of Kerala, aims to improve the basic facilities of houses belonging to widowed, divorced, or abandoned women from minority religious communities.

women.name: Stand-Up India
women.description: A scheme by Ministry of Finance for financing SC/ST and  Women Entrepreneurs by facilitating bank loans for setting up a greenfield project  Enterprise in manufacturing, services, trading sector and activities allied to agriculture.

women.name: Establishment of Poultry Valley
women.description: The scheme aims to promote sustainable and organized poultry farming among cooperative society members, especially women, by providing financial and technical support for poultry rearing, thereby enhancing income generation and livelihood opportunities in the state.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Mahalakshmi Kit Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the health and well-being of both mothers and their newborn girl children by providing essential item kits after the institutional delivery of pregnant women registered at an Anganwadi Centre.

women.name: Central Sector Scheme for Rehabilitation of Bonded Labourer
women.description: The scheme addresses eradicating bonded labour in India. It introduces varying rehabilitation assistance amounts based on beneficiary categories, such as adults, children, women, and extreme cases, with provisions for annuity schemes and Direct Benefit Transfer.

women.name: Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Kaushal Sanvardhan Yojna -RS-CIT
women.description: The objective of Indira Mahila Shakti Prashikshan Evam Kaushal Sanvardhan Yojna is to provide empowerment to the girls and women of the state in the field of computers by providing free computer courses to them.

women.name: Widow Re-marriage Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to support the rehabilitation of widows by encouraging marriage through a monetary incentive. It provides a grant to bona fide Himachali men (above 21 years) and women (above 18 years) at the time of marriage.

women.name: Cycle Sahayata Yojana
women.description: "Cycle Sahayata Yojana" is a scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. Applications for this scheme are accepted online through the official website of the department. In this scheme, bicycles are provided to the women workers.

women.name: Swami Vivekananda Nishakta Swavlamban Protsahan Yojana
women.description: “Swami Vivekananda Nishakta Swavlamban Protsahan Yojana ” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand. The aim of the scheme is to provide social security to differently abled people aged five(5) years and above.

women.name: Financial Assistance to Pensioners Suffering From HIV and AIDS
women.description: “Financial Assistance to Pensioners Suffering From HIV/AIDS” is a Social Security Scheme by the Department of Women, Child Development & Social Security, Government of Jharkhand which aims to provide social security through financial assistance to those persons who are suffering from HIV/AIDS.

women.name: PMMSY: Fish Feed Plants of Production Capacity of at least 100 Ton/Day - Haryana
women.description: This scheme provides capital subsidy for setting up fish feed plants with a minimum production capacity of 100 tons per day, under the Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) to general , schedule caste and women beneficiaries .

women.name: Khushiyon Ki Sawari Sewa - Uttarakhand
women.description: The scheme aims to provide safe, timely, and free transportation for pregnant women and newborn babies (0 - 1 year) to access healthcare services, including travel from home to the hospital and from the hospital back home.

women.name: Grant of Marriage Allowance to the Widow's Daughter
women.description: This scheme aims to provide financial support to widows for the marriage of their daughters. Eligible widows can receive ₹25,000/- to cover marriage expenses. The scheme is implemented through the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Puducherry.

women.name: "Vocational Training" Component of the "Development of Industries" Scheme
women.description: "Vocational Training" by the Department of Industries and Commerce, Union Territory of Puducherry aims to create more employment opportunities broadly for the unemployed youth particularly women to pursue wide career openings besides self-ventures by giving training in trades.

women.name: Free Medical Assistance (Gujarat)
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for expensive medical treatments to Scheduled Tribe individuals. Through this scheme, monetary aid is provided to Scheduled Tribe individuals suffering from various diseases and for serious maternity cases and anaemia in women.

women.name: Back-to-Lab Research Fellowship Programme
women.description: To facilitate the re-entry of women having a career break to Science research, the Kerala State Council of Science, Technology and Environment (KSCSTE) launched the “Back-to-Lab Research Fellowship Programme” in 2010.

women.name: Chief Minister's State Disability Pension Scheme - Sikkim
women.description: The scheme “Chief Minister's State Disability Pension Scheme (CMDPS)” was started by the Women & Child Welfare Department, Govt. of Sikkim to provide financial assistance to the differently abled person who has a disability of 40% and above.

women.name: Widow Daughter Marriage Scheme
women.description: Department of WCD, Delhi Government is implementing various Financial Assistance for the benefit of different sections through Financial Assistance Cell. Department of WCD is running Widow’s Daughter Marriage(WDM) for the benefit of widows/women in distress.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Divyangjan Vivah Protsahan Anudan Yojana
women.description: The objective of this scheme is to provide social security to the disabled women/men of the state by encouraging their marriage and providing them financial assistance. This scheme is fully funded by the Government of Bihar.

women.name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization - Uttarakhand
women.description: The scheme aims to encourage farm mechanization purchasing and providing 50% subsidy/financial assistance to SC/ST, small and marginal, and women farmers (of all categories), while 40% subsidy/financial assistance is provided to other (large) farmers.

women.name: Maternity Benefit (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
women.description: The scheme “Maternity Benefit” was started by the Assam Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (A.B.O.C.W.W.B), Labour Welfare Department, Government of Assam for providing financial assistance to the registered women beneficiaries as maternity benefits during the period of maternity.

women.name: Interest Subsidy Scheme, 2017
women.description: The scheme aims to incentivize units for making their enterprises financially viable. It provides interest subsidy on term loan and/or working capital loan (up to ₹25,00,000/- per year, or ₹27,50,000/- for women/Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe applicants) to eligible industries.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana
women.description: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana (MMKSY) is a scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat to empower women farmers in the state. The scheme was announced in the 2018-19 budget and is being implemented by the Department of Agriculture and Co-operation.

women.name: Assistance for Installation of Sprinkler / Drip Micro Irrigation Systems
women.description: Through this scheme, the Marginal Farmers, Small farmers, Scheduled Caste/ Schedule Tribe Farmers, Women Farmers, Big Farmers and Institutions are provided with a subsidy on the total cost or ₹ 25,000/‐ per hectare whichever is less for the installation of Sprinkler / Drip Micro Irrigation Systems.

women.name: Trekking in Forest Area (Scheduled Tribes)
women.description: The scheme "Trekking in Forest Area (Scheduled Tribes)" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote love and awareness for nature among youth by organizing trekking programs in forest areas for selected Scheduled Tribes young men and women.

women.name: Mother Teresa Asahay Matri Sambal Yojana
women.description: The main purpose of the Scheme to encourage under this Yojana, women who are helpless in upbringing their children (like widows, and destitute) are provided with financial assistance per child per annum for two children.

women.name: Jute Diversification Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to set up production centres to promote eco-friendly jute products and generate sustained employment. It provides skill training, machine subsidies, and financial incentives to collaborating agencies, targeting artisans, women self-help groups, and entrepreneurs.

women.name: Rajya Samekit Sahkari Vikas Yojana - Ganga Gaay Mahila Dairy Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to promote dairy entrepreneurship among women, Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and general category members of cooperative societies by providing financial assistance through subsidies and loans for the purchase of milch cows and buffaloes.

women.name: Widow Pension - Uttar Pradesh
