women.description: Widow pension in Uttar Pradesh is a social welfare scheme by the Government of Uttar Pradesh to provide financial assistance to widows residing in the state. The scheme is administered by the Women Welfare Department of the state government.

women.name: Dr. Dharmambal Ammaiyar Ninaivu Widow Remarriage Assistance Scheme-II
women.description: The 'Dr. Dharmambal Ammaiyar Ninaivu Widow Remarriage Assistance Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme's objective is to encourage widow remarriage and to rehabilitate widows by giving financial assistance.

women.name: Educational Allowances to the Children of Widows
women.description: “Educational Allowances to the Children of Widows” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to provide financial assistance (₹25 to ₹125) for the education of poor widows' children up to higher secondary or equivalent.

women.name: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Help Group - Uttarakhand
women.description: The scheme aims to empower urban poor women in Uttarakhand by promoting the formation of self-help groups, improving their livelihoods, and supporting them in income-generating and self-employment activities through financial incentives, bank loans, and government subsidies.

women.name: Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme-I
women.description: The 'Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare & Women Empowerment Dept. Tamil Nadu. The aim is to abolish caste & community discrimination by encouraging inter-caste marriage by giving financial assistance to newly married couples.

women.name: Community Based Training Scheme
women.description: The "Community Based Training Scheme" aims to provide training in heavy vehicle driving, shorthand, security services, office soft skills, retail sales, and beauty parlor courses (male & female) to unemployed young men and women belonging to minority communities for self-employment or employment.

women.name: KULAVILAKKU
women.description: This scheme aims to enhance the nutritional status of Pregnant Women. ₹500/- assistance is provided to eligible beneficiaries during their pregnancies. The scheme is a crucial step towards ensuring the well-being of both mother and child. The benefit will be provided for upto two pregnancies only.

women.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Pension For Transgender
women.description: ISSS (Integrated Social Security Scheme) is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir where financial assistance is provided to Old Age Persons, Widows, Divorcees, Women in Distress, Transgenders, and Physically Handicapped Persons.

women.name: Chief Minister’s Shasakt Kisan Yojana
women.description: The Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh started the scheme “Chief Minister’s Shasakt Kisan Yojana (CM-SKY)” for uplifting the status of women, marginal and small farmers of the State for self-employment generation & commercialization of Horticulture activities to double their income.

women.name: Mahila Samiriddhi Yojana for Minority Community
women.description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans up to ₹1,00,000/- per beneficiary are provided only to women entrepreneurs of the target group, either directly or through Self-Help Groups.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Yuva Annadoot Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to unemployed youth/women for 7 years by involving them in the transport of food grains from Madhya Pradesh State Civil Supplies Corporation centers to fair price shops. Benefits include an interest subsidy/grant.

women.name: Maternity Benefit Scheme - Telangana
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit Scheme" was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Department, Telangana. The scheme provides financial assistance to registered women workers, as well as the wives & daughters of registered workers to support them.

women.name: Sarvajan Pension Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of per month to elderly individuals, widows, destitute women, differently-abled persons, primitive tribes, and HIV/AIDS patients. The scheme eliminates previous age restrictions and targets inclusivity by guaranteeing pensions to all eligible.

women.name: Jute Design Resource Centre Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to foster innovation and product diversification in the Jute Diversified Products sector. It provides innovative designs, skill training, and technical specifications to Jute Artisans, Micro Small and Medium Enterprises, Exporters, and Women Self Help Groups.

women.name: Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows
women.description: “Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to encourage the children of widows to pursue Typewriting and Shorthand courses and facilitate the reimbursement of course fees.

women.name: Maternity Assistance Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
women.description: The "Maternity Assistance" is a Welfare Scheme by the Puducherry Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Union Territory of Puducherry. Through this scheme, the women employees who are beneficiary of the fund shall be given ₹5,000/- each as maternity benefit.

women.name: Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter
women.description: The "Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter" aims to help poor, orphan children, differently-abled individuals, widows, destitute women separated from their husbands, and elderly Brahmins with financial assistance for meeting their food and shelter expenses. This scheme covers 13 districts of the state.

women.name: Dr. Dharmambal Ammaiyar Ninaivu  Widow Remarriage Assistance Scheme-I
women.description: The "Dr. Dharmambal Ammaiyar Ninaivu Widow Remarriage Assistance Scheme" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme's objective is to encourage widow remarriage and to rehabilitate widows by giving financial assistance.

women.name: Pension Scheme for Destitute Transgender
women.description: The 'Pension Scheme for Destitute Transgender' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to help poor transgender above 40 years of age who are unable to earn their livelihood.

women.name: Integrated Child Development Services- Uttarakhand
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the nutritional and health status of all children aged 6 months to 6 years, along with pregnant women and lactating mothers in the state, by providing supplementary nutrition, immunisation, and regular health check-ups.

women.name: Marriage Gift Scheme - Telangana
women.description: The "Marriage Gift Scheme" was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Dept. Telangana. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance as a marriage gift to unmarried registered women workers & the daughters of registered building & construction

women.name: Mukhyamantri Shramshakti Yojana
women.description: This scheme aims to provide employment opportunities to men and women aged 18 to 45 from the minority community by offering vocational skill training in various fields or by providing loans through the Bihar State Minority Financial Corporation, Patna, for self-employment.

women.name: Veerjyoti Puraskars
women.description: The scheme aims to recognize and award women and girls in the State of Goa who have shown exceptional bravery and courage against atrocities, violence, and/or harassment. It provides a cash prize of ₹20,000/- and a scroll/citation to two awardees annually.

women.name: Maternity Assistance for the Construction Worker
women.description: The "Maternity Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides maternity benefits in the form of financial assistance to the eligible  registered women members of the board.

women.name: Trekking in Forest Area (Scheduled Castes)
women.description: The scheme "Trekking in Forest Area" by the Sports, Youth and Cultural Activities Department, Government of Gujarat aims to promote love and awareness for nature among youth by organizing trekking programs in forest areas for selected young men and women.

women.name: Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-II
women.description: "Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-I" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Dept, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides financial assistance to the orphan girls for their marriage. The bride should be 18 years or older during her marriage.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme -Tamil Nadu
women.description: The 'Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. A pension of ₹1,000 is provided to destitute old age persons of 60 years and above belonging to households below the poverty line.

women.name: E.V.R. Maniammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Daughter’s of Poor Widows: Scheme-II
women.description: The "E.V.R. Maniammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Daughters of Poor Widows: Scheme-II" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to help poor widow mothers by providing financial assistance for the marriage of their daughter's.

women.name: Maternity Assistance for the Construction Workers
women.description: The "Maternity Assistance for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme  that provides maternity benefits of ₹ 30,000/- to the registered women members and wives of male members for upto 2 children.

women.name: Sikkim Grant Of Award To Transgender
women.description: The scheme “Sikkim Grant of Award To Transgender (SGATT)” was launched in 2013 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, the state government provides financial assistance to transgender belonging to a household of the Below Poverty Line category.

women.name: Foster Care Scheme (Vatsalaya)
women.description: The Foster Care Scheme (Vatsalaya) is being implemented by the Department of Women & Child Development, Government of Goa to provide temporary/substitute care for children in difficult circumstances, whose parents are unable to care for them due to illness, death, and desertion of parent, etc.

women.name: Mahila Samridhi Yojana (Maharashtra)
women.description: "Mahila Samridhi Yojana" is administered by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to uplift economically weaker women from the Charmakar Community. Loans ranging from ₹25,000/- to ₹50,000/- are granted at a low interest rate of 4% p.a.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Ghasyari Kalyan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide affordable and nutritious packed silage and total mixed animal feed to livestock farmers, especially women, in the remote hilly areas of Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, silage is made available to livestock farmers at a subsidized rate of ₹2.75 per kg.

women.name: Micro Finance Scheme for Self Help Groups (GTKVN)
women.description: The scheme aims to economically empower women from Thakor and Koli castes through self-employment opportunities via Self Help Groups (SHGs). Under this scheme, eligible members of SHGs receive a loan up to ₹60,000/- at low interest to start or expand small-scale businesses/enterprises.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme - Sikkim
women.description: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)” was started by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim in 2014. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to differently-abled persons with severe or multiple disabilities of more than 80%.

women.name: Organization of Multi-Purpose Camps/ Public Awareness Camps/ Medical Camps/Legal Service Camps
women.description: The scheme aims to organize camps & awareness programs across urban & rural areas to inform and empower vulnerable groups such as women, children, senior citizens, workers in the unorganized sector, persons with disabilities, acid attack survivors & victims of trafficking about their legal rights.

women.name: Financial Assistance to Old Age Pensioner Suffering From TB/ Cancer
women.description: “Financial Assistance to Old Age Pensioner Suffering From TB/ Cancer” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Puducherry, was introduced to extend a helping hand by way of financial assistance to Old Age/Destitute Pensioners who are suffering from TB/Cancer to meet the medical expenses.

women.name: Scheme For Adolescent Girls
women.description: A support scheme by Ministry of Women & Child Development enabling self-development and empowerment of out-of-school adolescent girls, and improving their nutritional, health & hygiene  status. All out-of-school adolescent girls in the 11 to 14 years age group are eligible for this scheme.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme - Tamil Nadu
women.description: The 'Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme' is a state initiative by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. Its goal is to offer a ₹1,000 pension to individuals aged 18 and above. Eligibility criteria include a disability percentage of 80% or above.

women.name: E.V.R. Maniammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Daughter’s of Poor Widows: Scheme-I
women.description: The 'E.V.R. Maniammaiyar Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Daughters of Poor Widows: Scheme-I' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to help poor widow mothers by providing financial assistance for the marriage of their daughters.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Kanya Vivah Yojana- Madhya Pradesh
women.description: The scheme was started by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh in 2006. The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance for the mass marriage of girls, widows, and abandoned women from destitute or poor families in the state.

women.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme - Sikkim
women.description: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)” was started by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim in 2014. Under this scheme, a pension is provided to elderly citizens above the age of 60 years belonging to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

women.name: Grant In Aid To Old Age Home
women.description: The "Grant in Aid to Old Age Home" is a scheme by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. In this scheme, grants are provided to the NGOs for accommodating old men & women, destitute, disabled victims, into Old Age Homes, and providing them with food, & accommodation.

women.name: ARAVANAIPPU
women.description: "ARAVANAIPPU", a scheme by the Dept of Women and Child Development, Govt of Puducherry aims to improve the status of the girl child and provide nutritious food; financial assistance of ₹1200 is offered to lactating mothers. The girl child of the applicant should be born after 1-4-2005.

women.name: Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-I
women.description: "Annai Teresa Ninaivu Marriage Assistance Scheme for Orphan Girls-I" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Dept, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides financial assistance to the orphan girls for their marriage. The bride should be 18 years or older during her marriage.

women.name: WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship
women.description: “WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship” is a new programme of the Department of Science & Technology that aims to provide opportunities to women scientists & technologists between the age group of 27-60 years who want to continue their research as bench-level scientists in basic and applied sciences.

women.name: Micro Finance Scheme of NMDFC
women.description: Under the scheme, an amount of Rs. 1 lakh under credit Line-1 & upto  Rs. 1.5 lakh under Credit Line-2 is extended to each member of SHG (belong to Minority communities) at interest rate of 7% & 10% respectively.  Concession of 2% is extended to women beneficiaries under Credit Line-2.

women.name: WISE Fellowship for Ph.D.
women.description: The "WISE Fellowship for Ph.D. (WISE-PhD)" of the Department of Science and Technology aims to provide an opportunity to carry out Doctoral research in basic and applied sciences to women scientists and technologists between the age group of 27-45 years who want to pursue research in STEM fields.

women.name: Grant of Financial Assistance for Performance of Marriage of Poor Brides Living Below Poverty Line
women.description: This scheme aims to provide financial assistance to poor brides living below the poverty line to meet their marriage expenses. The assistance amount is ₹25,000, and it is granted for the first marriage of the bride. The scheme is implemented through the Department of Women and Child Development.

women.name: Formation of Mahila Mangal and Yuvak Mangal Dal
women.description: The scheme aims to form groups of interested women and men from Gram Panchayats across the state, who are 18 years of age or above, enabling them to avail the benefits of various schemes of the Youth Welfare and PRD Department and to collectively undertake business or livelihood activities.

women.name: Financial Assistance To Dependent Children Of Widows And Destitute Women
women.description: The scheme "Financial Assistance To Dependent Children of Widows And Destitute Women" is a Social Welfare scheme by the Dept. of Social Welfare, Women & Child Development, Govt. of Chandigarh; to extend financial assistance (₹ 1000/- per month per child) to children who are fatherless or orphan.

women.name: Educational Assistance to Children of Women Headed Families
women.description: The scheme “Educational Assistance to Children of Women Headed Families” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala. The scheme proposes to extend a helping hand to women-headed families by way of providing financial assistance to the education of children.

women.name: Jharkhand Mukhyamantri Maiya Samman Yojana
women.description: The "Jharkhand Mukhyamantri Maiya Samman Yojana" provides financial assistance to women beneficiaries. This initiative aims to enhance the financial security and well-being of women across the state.

women.name: Financial Assistance for the Marriage of Daughters of Widows/Destitute Women belonging to the Scheduled Caste
women.description: By the Chandigarh Government, this scheme is initiated to reduce the financial burden for the girl marriage. Under the scheme financial assistance will be provided.

women.name: Prasuti Sahayata Yojana
women.description: The Rajasthan Prasuti Sahayata Yojana is a scheme launched by the Government of Rajasthan to provide financial assistance to pregnant women from registered construction worker families in the state

women.name: Goat Rearing Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to increase the income and raise the living standards of tribal women beneficiaries. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided for setting up goat units.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
women.description: A scheme by Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas for Providing free LPG connections to women belonging to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.

women.name: Financial Assistance in Marriage of Women Workers or Daughters of Workers- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
women.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹51,000/- is provided to workers employed in the industrial & commercial establishments of the state of Haryana for the marriage of their daughters and for the self-marriage of the working women workers as Kanyadaan.

women.name: Orunodoi 3.0
women.description: Orunodoi, described as 'foremost bead' among the Ashtadash Mukutar Unnoyonee Maala was announced by then HFM in his Budget Speech 20-21. It envisages women empowerment, poverty alleviation and socio-economic inclusion of financially vulnerable women of the state through sustained financial assistanc

women.name: Skill Development Training - 90 Days Skill Development Training Programme in Curtain & Garment Stitching
women.description: The Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board offers a 90-day non-residential skill development training programme specifically designed for unemployed girls and women who are dependents of registered construction workers.

women.name: Thayi Magu Sahaya Hastha (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
women.description: The "Thayi Magu Sahaya Hastha'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Karnataka, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to registered women construction workers for pre-school education and nutritional support of their child for up to 3 years after delivery.

women.name: Maternity Benefit/Delivery Assistance (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit/Delivery Assistance'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Karnataka, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to registered women construction workers for the birth of upto two (2) children.

women.name: Supplementary Nutrition Programme- Bihar
women.description: The programme aims to enhance the nutritional level of normal/malnourished/severely malnourished children aged 6 months to 6 years, as well as pregnant women and lactating mothers, through Anganwadi centers. This programme is centrally sponsored with a funding ratio of 50:50.

women.name: Noni Suraksha Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to improve the educational and health status of girls, lay the foundation for their bright future, prevent female feticide, promote a positive attitude towards the birth of girls, and prevent child marriage.  It provides financial benefit to girls who remain unmarried until 18 years.

women.name: Financial Assistance for Working Women Workers or Wives of Male Workers for Maternity- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
women.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹10,000/- is provided to female workers and wives of male workers working in industrial and commercial establishments in the state of Haryana for the delivery of up to two children (three girls or two boys).

women.name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Assistance for Marriage
women.description: The scheme provides financial aid for the marriage of eligible beneficiaries or their dependent sons/daughters (up to two marriages).

women.name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (P.B.O.C.W.W.B)
women.description: The "Maternity Benefit Scheme'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Punjab, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the female construction workers and spouse of the male workers to support childbirth-related expenses maximum for two living children.

women.name: Mahtari Vandan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to eliminate discrimination and inequality against women, improve their health and nutrition, promote economic independence and empowerment, and strengthen their decision-making role in the family.  It offers financial assistance to eligible married women to support their well-being.

women.name: Indira Gandhi Matritva Poshan Yojana
women.description: Under the scheme, women who conceive their second child and fulfill the prescribed conditions will receive cash assistance of ₹6,000/-, paid in five installments.

women.name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Maternity Benefit
women.description: This scheme provides financial assistance to a beneficiary on successful delivery of a child or miscarriage by such beneficiary or his wife.

women.name: Shagun Yojana
women.description: The "Shagun Yojana" aims to assist BPL families with financial aid for the marriage of their daughters. A grant of ₹31,000 is provided to the girl/women.

women.name: Surakshit Matritva Aashwasan Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to provide assured, dignified, and completely free healthcare services to all pregnant women, mothers, and newborns at public health facilities.

women.name: Vahli Dikri Yojana
women.description: The Vahli Dikri Yojana by the Government of Gujarat under the Women and Child Development Department . The scheme supports girl children by providing financial aid, free education, and insurance, encouraging higher education and reducing dropout rates.

women.name: Incentive For The Devadasi Children’s Marriage
women.description: Under this scheme, the Social Welfare Department, Government of Karnataka will give incentives of ₹3.00 lakh for men,₹5.00 lakh for women to the Devadasi's Children who are Married Couples.

women.name: Mamta Taruni Abhiyan
women.description: "Mamta Taruni Abhiyan" was a program launched in Gujarat, India, aimed at providing healthcare facilities to adolescent girls and pregnant women in rural areas. The program was launched by the Gujarat state government in 2010.

women.name: Kanya Vivah Sahayta Yojana
women.description: The primary objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance for marriageable daughters of beneficiary registered labourers and registered women construction labourers working in the building and other construction processes and to encourage legal arrangements.

women.name: Marriage Gift Scheme (APBOCWWB)
women.description: The Andhra Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers have introduced the "Marriage Gift Scheme" for registered unmarried women workers & the two daughters of registered construction workers. This welfare initiative aims to provide financial assistance on the occasion of their marriage

women.name: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana
women.description: Biju Swasthya Kalyan Yojana (BSKY) has been launched by the Department of Health and Family Welfare, Government of Odisha as a path-breaking program to provide universal health coverage, with special emphasis on the health protection of vulnerable families and women.

women.name: Mukhyamantri Nikah Yojana
women.description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to the needy girls, widows, and abandoned women from destitute or poor Muslim families in the state at the time of their marriage (In case of mass marriage).

women.name: Grant of Subsidy for Purchase of Mangalyam to the Bridegroom of Weaker Section
women.description: The scheme “Grant of Subsidy for Purchase of Mangalyam to the Bridegroom of Weaker Section” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to provide Financial Assistance of ₹ 2,500/- to the Bridegroom from Weaker Section.

women.name: Maternity Benefit Scheme (APBOCWWB)
women.description: The Andhra Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers have introduced the "Maternity Benefit Scheme" to registered construction workers. The scheme aims to support registered women workers, wives of registered male workers, & their daughters during maternity, reducing the financial strain.

women.name: National Family Benefit Scheme (Punjab)
women.description: The scheme "National Family Benefit Scheme (Punjab)" by the Department of Social Security and Development of Women and Children, Government of Punjab, provides a lump sum assistance of ₹20,000/- is provided to the bereaved household in the event of the death of their breadwinner.

women.name: Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme-II
women.description: The 'Dr. Muthulakshmi Reddy Ninaivu Inter-caste Marriage Assistance Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare & Women Empowerment Dept. Tamil Nadu. The aim is to abolish caste & community discrimination by encouraging inter-caste marriage by giving financial assistance to newly married couples.

women.name: Chief Minister’s Girl Child Protection Scheme-I
women.description: The 'Chief Minister’s Girl Child Protection Scheme-I' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Govt. of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to girl children of poor families as well as to promote girl child education & eradicate female infanticide.

women.name: National Family Benefit Scheme - Sikkim
women.description: The scheme “National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS)” was launched in 2016 by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim. Under this scheme, a lump sum amount of ₹ 30,000/- as financial assistance is provided to the bereaved household in the event of the death of the "Primary breadwinner"

women.name: Women Self Employment Scheme
women.description: The "Women Self Employment Scheme" encourages women to become self-reliant and supports their efforts in establishing small-scale industries or trade ventures, thereby improving their economic status & promoting self-employment opportunities across the state providing them financial assistance.

women.name: Technology Development And Utilization Programme For Women
women.description: In order to meet the specific needs of women and to enhance the contribution of women towards technology capability building, the “Technology Development & Utilization Programme for Women (TDUPW)” has been formulated by the Department of Scientific and Industrial Research (DSIR).

women.name: Incentives to Women Entrepreneurs Scheme, 2008
women.description: "Incentives to Women Entrepreneurs Scheme, 2008" aimed to encourage women entrepreneurship and promote self-employment by providing additional incentives such as interest subsidies and preferential treatment under capital contribution schemes. The scheme benefited women-owned industrial units.

women.name: Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs
women.description: The scheme “Soft Loan Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs” was started under Kerala Startup Mission to support women startups with a soft loan of an amount limited to ₹15 Lakhs as working capital for implementing works & projects received from Govt. departments and Public Sector Undertaking in Kerala.

women.name: "Capital Investment Subsidy: SC/ST/Women Entrepreneurs" Component of the "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries" Scheme
women.description: "Capital Investment Subsidy: SC/ST/Women Entrepreneurs" is a scheme by the Department of Industrial Development (Industries and Commerce), Union Territory of Puducherry. The department extends subsidies for the investments made on land, buildings, plants & machinery @ 25%.

women.name: Integrated Fisheries Scheme
women.description: The "Integrated Fisheries Scheme" by the Fisheries Division, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote fish-duck farming and increase fish farmers' income. The scheme provides financial assistance of up to 80% for eligible SC/ST/women beneficiaries and 70% for others.

women.name: India BPO Promotion Scheme
women.description: The scheme aims to create employment opportunities and promote investment in the IT/ITeS sector by establishing BPO/ITeS units in smaller cities. Through this scheme, financial support in the form of Viability Gap Funding is provided to eligible companies.

women.name: Kayaka Spoorthi Scheme Karnataka
women.description: The "Kayaka Spoorthi Scheme" aims to provide financial assistance to women Self-Help Groups (SHGs) engaged in the leather industry. The goal is to promote self-sufficiency and economic independence by enabling these women to start or expand business activities related to leatherwork.

women.name: Mahila Nursery Yojana
women.description: The scheme aims to promote nursery establishment by providing women's groups with high-quality seedlings or saplings from certified sources, along with a fixed grant, technical support, and training to ensure effective nursery operations.

women.name: Subsidy Scheme for Self-help Groups of Minorities
women.description: The "Subsidy Scheme for Self-help Groups of Minorities" aimed at empowering minority women by providing financial support to Self-Help Groups (SHGs). The scheme offers a subsidy to SHGs engaged in various self-employment activities, promoting economic self-reliance among minority women.

women.name: House of Himalayas
women.description: The scheme aims to provide recognition and market reach to local Himalayan products of Uttarakhand through improved branding, packaging and sales. Under this scheme, local producers and self-help groups are supported to enhance their products’ quality, branding and market access.

women.name: Mizoram Grant-in-Aid to Voluntary Organisations and Individuals
women.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to voluntary organizations and individuals to support welfare activities for disadvantaged and marginalized groups such as women, children, disabled persons, elderly, and socially vulnerable individuals.

women.name: Old Age Homes - Tamil Nadu
women.description: The "Old Age Homes" was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. This scheme is to bring qualitative improvement in the living standards of old people of the state.

women.name: Mahila Samiriddhi Yojana for Backward Classes- Haryana
women.description: This scheme, implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam, provides loans up to ₹1,25,000/- per beneficiary exclusively to women entrepreneurs of the target group, either directly or through self-help groups.

women.name: Establishment of Broiler Farms
women.description: The scheme aims to promote commercial broiler rearing by providing financial assistance in the form of subsidies for poultry rearing and infrastructure development, thereby enhancing income generation and employment opportunities, especially for women and self-help groups (SHGs).

women.name: Kishori Balika Yojana (Madhya Pradesh)
women.description: The scheme "Kishori Balika Yojana" by the Department of Women and Child Development, Government of Madhya Pradesh aims to provide vocational, health, and hygiene training to adolescent girls. Through this scheme, training and material assistance are provided to the girls.

women.name: Mahila Samridhi Yojana under NSKFDC- Haryana
women.description: This scheme offers loans up to ₹1,00,000/- to women Safai Karamcharis or their dependents for economic development through self-employment initiatives, such as establishing cloth shops, dairies, tea shops, bangle shops, beauty parlours, papad making, basketry, tailoring shops, etc.

women.name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission
women.description: DAY-NRLM is the flagship program of MoRD for promoting poverty reduction through building strong institutions for the poor, particularly women, and enabling these institutions to access a range of financial services and livelihoods. States are enabled to formulate their poverty reduction plans.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana - Special Projects
women.description: A skill development scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship for Marginalized or vulnerable groups which may not meet all the parameters as laid down in the Guidelines of ShortTerm Training (STT) of PMKVY 3.0

women.name: Capital Subsidy
women.description: "Capital Subsidy" by the MSME Dept, Govt of Tamil Nadu, assists MSMEs in reducing their burden of capital procurement. The subsidy is provided for 25% of eligible plant and machinery costs for MSMEs, with an additional capital subsidy for MSMEs set up by Women/SC/ST/Transgender/PwD entrepreneurs.

women.name: "Rent Subsidy" under "Motivation of Entrepreneurs to Start Industries and Fiscal Assistance to Industries"
women.description: This scheme aims to support SC/ST and women entrepreneurs who have initiated production on or after 27-3-2002 in a rented building. It provides rent subsidy for the first five years from the commencement of commercial production on a tapering basis, with a max ceiling of ₹5,000 per month.

women.name: Scheme For Welfare Of Children In Need Of Care And Protection
women.description: "Scheme for Welfare of Children in Need of Care and Protection" is a Social Welfare Scheme by the Directorate of Women & Child Development, Govt. of Goa. The objective of this scheme is to assist the Voluntary Organizations that cater to the needs of destitute and orphans up to the age of 18 years.

women.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram
women.description: The Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK) is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme, being implemented with the objective to develop infrastructure projects such as community assets , in the identified areas with development deficits for socio-economic development of the said areas.

women.name: Working Women Hostel
women.description: The scheme "Working Women Hostel" by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Haryana aims to provide safe and affordable accommodation to working women. Through this scheme, hostel facilities at subsidized rent are provided to employed women.

women.name: Mukhya Mantri Matritva Sahayata Yojana
women.description: The scheme "Mukhya Mantri Matritva Sahayata Yojana" by the Women and Child Development Department, Haryana, aims to provide a cash incentive of ₹5,000/- during maternity to eligible pregnant and lactating women on the birth of a second child (boy).

women.name: NEW SWARNIMA (Gopalak Nigam)
women.description: Self-employment loan scheme for Rabari and Bharwad women in Gujarat, offering up to ₹2 lakh at 5% annual interest to promote economic independence.

student.name: Student Internship Programme
student.description: The Student Internship Program, a unique learning opportunity aims to provide the Interns exposure to the functioning of the CAG of India and the Indian Audit & Accounts Department.

student.name: State Art Exhibition (Student Category)
student.description: The "State Art Exhibition (Student Category)" is an annual event organized by the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Government of Goa, to promote and encourage creativity in the visual arts field among local students.

student.name: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
student.description: The Bihar Government launched the Bihar Student Credit Card (BSCC) scheme to provide financial aid to applicants to complete their higher education.

student.name: Student READY (Rural Entrepreneurship Awareness Development Yojana)
student.description: The Student READY (Rural Entrepreneurship Awareness Development Yojana) program aims to provide rural entrepreneurship awareness, and practical experience in a real-life situation in rural agriculture, and create awareness to undergraduate students about practical agriculture and allied sciences.

student.name: Student Program Under AcSIR
student.description: The scheme "Student Program Under AcSIR" implemented by the Academy of Scientific and Innovative Research (AcSIR), aims to promote high-quality research and leadership development in Earth Sciences through doctoral education. It provides research opportunities to geoscience postgraduate students.

student.name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Diploma)
student.description: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

student.name: AICTE – Saksham Scholarship Scheme For Specially-Abled Student (Degree)
student.description: Saksham is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Education, implemented by AICTE, aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. This is an attempt to give every young specially-abled student the opportunity to study further.

student.name: Student Welfare Scheme
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide assistance to economically weaker ST students to meet their emergency needs in special circumstances. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to ST students studying in Class 1 to 10 in cases of urgency or emergency.

student.name: West Bengal Student Credit Card Scheme
student.description: The Higher Education Department, Government of West Bengal has introduced the Student Credit Card Scheme for the students of West Bengal to enable them to pursue higher education without having any financial constraints.

student.name: Dr. A.N. Mukhopadhyay Needy Student Fund (B.Sc. Agriculture - Final Year Student)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹25,000/- per year to meritorious & needy students pursuing B.Sc. Agriculture course in their final year of study, based on their genuine financial need, thereby helping to reduce their economic burden & support the continuation of their education.

student.name: Scholarship To 2 Years Pre-Service Student Teachers Undergoing D.El.Ed Programme At DIETs And CTTC Sohra
student.description: The scheme “Scholarship to 2 Years Pre-Service Student Teachers undergoing D.El.Ed Programme at DIETs and CTTC Sohra” was launched by the Dept. of Education, Govt. of Meghalaya in 2012. The scheme offers a scholarship of ₹5000 p.m. for 2 years (10 months per year) to attract the state's best talent.

student.name: Guruji Student Credit Card (GSCC) Scheme
student.description: Under this scheme, a financial support initiative by the Jharkhand Government to help students pursue higher education without financial constraints. Under this scheme, eligible students can avail of education loans up to ₹15,00,000 at a subsidized 4% simple interest rate, with additional benefits.

student.name: State Technical Scholarship for ST Student
student.description: The financial assistance is provided to students of Scheduled Tribe Communities who are pursuing Diploma/ Degree/Post Graduated/course in Engineering Institutes recognized by All India Council for Technical Education and, also provided to students who are pursuing UG or PG in Forestry courses.

student.name: Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar Meritorious Student Award Scheme
student.description: This scheme awards special prizes to meritorious Scheduled Caste students who secure the highest marks in the Class 10th and 12th board examinations conducted by the Board of Secondary Education, CBSE, and ICSE in the state.

student.name: BPL (Below Poverty Line) Student Welfare Scholarship - Technical Education
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in the form of scholarships to the economically weaker students studying in government engineering and polytechnic colleges of Chhattisgarh.  The scheme offers financial aid to students enrolled in professional courses.

student.name: Dr. A.N. Mukhopadhyay Gold Medal Award (B.Sc. Agriculture - Final Year Student)
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their final year of study, thereby recognizing their academic excellence and providing financial support to reduce their burden.

student.name: Super 5000
student.description: In 2017, Madhya Pradesh State Government started a scheme "Super 5000" for student scholarships.

student.name: National Scholarship For Post Graduate Studies
student.description: A scheme started by Ministry of Education for the student Higher education.

student.name: Scheme of Free Supply of Textbooks, Stationery, Uniforms and Footwears to Poor Children
student.description: Through this scheme, textbooks, notebooks, Uniforms, dictionaries, stationery, etc. are provided free of cost to all students studying in LKG to 12th Standard of all Government and Government-aided Private Schools. The objective of this scheme is to achieve 100% student enrolment.

student.name: Free Shoe and Bag Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in all government & government-aided schools for purchasing shoes & bags. An amount of ₹318/- per student for Classes 1 to 5 & ₹462/- per student for Classes 6 to 8 is provided through Direct Benefit Transfer.

student.name: Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship
student.description: "Swami Vivekananda Merit-cum-Means Scholarship" started by the Higher Education Department of West Bengal State for the financial assistance to the student.

student.name: Backward Class Students Meritorious Award Scheme
student.description: "Backward Classes Student Merit Award Scheme" aims to recognize and reward academic excellence among backward-class students. Monetary awards are provided to one boy and one girl student from backward classes who secure the highest marks at the district level in class 10th and 12th board exams.

student.name: Chief Ministers House Rent
student.description: The "Chief Minister's House Rent" scheme by the Department of De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides ₹1,000 to ₹2,000 per student per month in Bhopal, Indore, Jabalpur, Gwalior, and Ujjain.

student.name: Bharati Scheme for Education - 6th Class to 10th Class
student.description: "The Bharati Scheme for Education - 6th Class to 10th Class" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

student.name: NIELIT Internship Programme
student.description: The Internship Programme by NIELIT is an opportunity for a student to secure first-hand and practical work experience under the guidance of qualified and experienced Supervisors/Mentors. It also aims at active participation in the learning process through experimentation.

student.name: Bharati Scheme for Education - 1st Class to 5th Class
student.description: "The Bharati Scheme for Education - 1st Class to 5th Class" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education.  Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

student.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for the Children of Parents/Guardians Engaged in Unclean and Hazardous Occupations - Goa
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to children whose parents belong to Other Disadvantaged Categories, supporting their education at pre-matric level. This initiative seeks to enhance student participation & reduce dropout rates, particularly during the transition from primary to upper

student.name: Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu
student.description: "Grant of Annual Scholarship to the Students Belonging to UT of Puducherry Selected and Studying in the Sainik School, Amaravathi Nagar, Tamil Nadu" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Directorate of School Education, Puducherry. A scholarship of ₹10,000/- per annum per student is provided.

student.name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship Program
student.description: Begum Hazrat Mahal National scholarship is a scholarship scheme also known as Maulana Azad National scholarship scheme was first announced on 3rd May 2003. It is a national level scholarship started for the benefit of the girl’s student belonging to the minority communities.

student.name: Printing and Free Distribution of Sanskrit Textbooks
student.description: The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education by providing free Sanskrit textbooks to students studying in Classes 1 to 12. Under this scheme, annual financial assistance ranging from ₹250/- to ₹700/- is provided to each student enrolled in Classes 1 to 12 of Sanskrit schools.

student.name: Skill Loan Scheme
student.description: A Skill loan scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship to provide loan upto Rs. 1,50,000 to student who has secured admission in a course run by Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs), Polytechnics or in a school recognized by Central or State education Boards or in a college affil

student.name: Post Matric Scholarship To Scheduled Tribe Students Of Nagaland
student.description: The Directorate of Higher Education (DHE) has launched the Post Matric Scholarship to ST students of the Nagaland scheme for providing socio-economic welfare to the students belonging to the residentship of Nagaland state. The student must be studying or getting admission to the post-matric class.

student.name: Anya Pichhda Varg Kalyan Chhatravaas
student.description: The Scheme "Anya Pichhda Varg Kalyan Chhatravaas" under the BC & EBC Welfare Department, Bihar. under this scheme, provied ₹1,000/- per month hostel grant is provided for each student and 15 kg of free food grains per month (9 kg rice + 6 kg wheat).

student.name: Fee Waiver Scheme For SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education
student.description: "Fee Waiver Scheme for SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education" provides free access to every SC/ST student, to the institutions of higher learning so that that no eligible SC/ST students are deprived of higher education for want of resources.

student.name: Award of Puducherry State Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme make sure that no brilliant student is prevented on the grounds of poverty alone from pursuing the academic career. Scholarship is awarded to students in 11th & 12th standards who have secured promotion to the next higher class with 60% & 50% marks in 10th & 11th standard respectively.

student.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribe Students Studying In Classes 9th & 10th
student.description: The scheme aims to support Scheduled Tribe children in classes 9th and 10th to minimize drop-out rates and aid progression to higher education. The scheme provides a recurring monthly scholarship, an annual book grant, and disability allowances directly to the Scheduled Tribe student beneficiaries.

student.name: Uniform Assistance To SC Students
student.description: The Government of Gujarat launched a financial Assistance scheme for the student who comes under the scheduled caste.

student.name: Eklavya Prashikshan Yojana - Coaching To Scheduled Tribe Student Studying In Class Xth, XIth & XIIth
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to impart coaching to ST students across Goa studying in classes Xth, XIth (Science), and XIIth (Arts, Science and Commerce). The scheme prepares the students for various professional courses such as Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Paramedical Sciences, Law, etc.

student.name: Scheme of Post Matric Scholarship to Lower Income Group Student for Studies in India
student.description: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship to Lower Income Group Students for Studies in India" aims to provide financial assistance to students from the Lower Income Groups to enable them to complete their education. Students are provided maintenance allowances, tuition fees, and additional benefits.

student.name: Maintenance Allowance To VJNT And SBC Students Studying In Professional Courses And Living In Hostel Attached To Professional Colleges
student.description: Government of Maharashtra introduced the scheme to complete the education of V.J.N.T and S.B.C students who are the student of professional courses.

student.name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Professional Education Course
student.description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education - Professional Education Course" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin student applicants.

student.name: AICTE-Swanath Scholarship Scheme For Students
student.description: A scholarship scheme by the Student Development Cell (StDC) of All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) to provide encouragement and support to orphans, wards of parents who died due to Covid-19, wards of Armed Forces, and Central Paramilitary Forces martyred in action (Shaheed).

student.name: Freeship less than ₹1,00,000 (UG students only)
student.description: The scheme "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000 only for UG students" by the Dean Student Welfare, GBPUAT, Pantnagar aims to support meritorious undergraduate students from low-income families. This Freeship scheme provides full tuition fee exemption to eligible students.

student.name: Digital India Internship Scheme
student.description: An opportunity for a student to secure practical work experience under the guidance of a qualified and experienced Supervisor/Mentor in Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) in the form of Digital India Internship Scheme.

student.name: Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Memorial Award to Scheduled Caste Students
student.description: "Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Memorial Award to Scheduled Caste Students” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Govt of Puducherry, is granted to top ranking boy and girl student in each region (Pondicherry, Karaikal and Yanam) who have secured 55% marks in the Higher Secondary Examination.

student.name: Freeship less than ₹1,00,000 (UG students only)
student.description: The scheme "Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000 only for UG students" by the Dean Student Welfare, GBPUAT, Pantnagar aims to support meritorious undergraduate students from low-income families. This Freeship scheme provides full tuition fee exemption to eligible students.

student.name: Scholarship to Divyang Students (Class 1 to 8)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹600/- for students in Class 1 to 5 and ₹960/- for students in Class 6 to 8, to regularly enrolled disable students.

student.name: State Government SC Scholarship (Class 1 to 10)
student.description: The scheme was launched by School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to improve educational status of SC students by providing scholarships. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to SC girl students in Classes 1 to 5,and to both boys & girls in SC category in Classes 6 to 10.

student.name: Financial Support To The Students Of N.E.R For Higher Professional Courses (NEC Merit Scholarship)
student.description: The scholarship scheme aims to support students of the North Eastern States undergoing studies in different disciplines at different levels in Institutions inside as well as outside the North-East but within the country.

student.name: Rishi and Milan Khosla Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to promote higher education among girl students in the state by providing scholarships to those pursuing their first year of post-graduation in various government colleges across Uttarakhand.

student.name: NITI Internship Scheme
student.description: This Scheme seeks to engage students pursuing Under Graduate/Graduate/Post Graduate Degrees or are Research Scholars enrolled in recognized University/Institution within India or abroad, as "interns". They shall be given exposure to various Verticals/ Divisions/Units within NITI Aayog.

student.name: Dr. S.K. Sharma (Ph.D. Mathematics)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹25,000/- per year to deserving scholars pursuing a Ph.D. in Mathematics, supporting advanced research and reducing their financial burden.

student.name: Assam Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme
student.description: "Assam Abhinandan Education Loan Subsidy Scheme" was launched on 26 December 2019 by the Hon'ble Chief Minister of Assam. The scheme is managed by the Finance Department, Govt. of Assam. The govt. will provide a loan subsidy of up to ₹ 50,000 on education loans to students pursuing higher education.

student.name: Saksham Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to support meritorious differently-abled students pursuing graduate-level studies in the state by providing them with financial assistance in the form of scholarships.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Alpasankhyak Medhwi Balika Protsahan Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial incentives to meritorious girl students belonging to minority communities based on their performance in the High School Examination or its equivalent (Munshi/Maulvi) and Intermediate Examination or its equivalent (Alim).

student.name: Sanskrit Scholarship
student.description: Under this scheme, students studying Sanskrit at various levels—Post Graduate (M.A. Classic), Acharya, Graduate (B.A. Classic), Shastri, Uttar Madhyama, Purva Madhyama, and Prathama—in any government or aided non-government college receive a monthly scholarship of ₹300/- for 10 months.

student.name: Free Scooty Distribution for Girls (GEN-CATEGAORY-EWS)
student.description: Under this scheme, meritorious girl students from government and private schools who have scored 85% or above in the Class 10th and 12th (Arts, Commerce, Science streams) examinations are provided with a free scooty, along with a helmet and petrol.

student.name: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Scholarship For Higher Education (SHE)
student.description: The scheme "INSPIRE Scholarship for Higher Education (SHE)" aims to attract students to study basic and natural Science subjects at undergraduate and postgraduate levels and pursue research as a career by providing scholarships to interested and deserving students.

student.name: Scholarship For Transgender Students
student.description: The scheme “Scholarship for Transgender Students” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala for providing scholarships to Transgender students from 7th standard onwards studying in State Government/ Government aided/ Self Financing schools.

student.name: The Inland Waterways Authority of India Internship Scheme
student.description: The purpose of this scheme is to provide with Selected Candidates” short term exposure to different verticals/ divisions/ units of IWAI as “Interns”. An intern may be required to work at Head Office or Project Office depending upon the requirement of the Authority.

student.name: Nishulk Ganavesh Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free uniforms to all girl students studying in Classes 1 to 8 of government and government-aided schools, as well as to all boys belonging to Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes, and boys from the General category who fall under the BPL category.

student.name: National Scheme of Apprenticeship Training
student.description: The primary goal of this scheme is to bridge the gap in practical experience for fresh Graduate Engineers, Diploma holders, and 10+2 Vocational pass-outs in approximately 10,000 industrial establishments. The apprentices undergo a one-year training period, receiving a monthly stipend.

student.name: Visitor's Award
student.description: The Awards are given to recognize excellence in research and innovation of faculty members/researchers of the Central Universities

student.name: Internship Scheme
student.description: The aim of this scheme is to allow short-term exposure to youth about working of the different sections of the Department of Forests and Wildlife, GNCTD as ‘Interns’.

student.name: Incentives to Students who Passed the Civil Service Examination
student.description: The "Incentives to Students Who Passed the Civil Service Examination" scheme provides incentives to Scheduled Tribe candidates who clear the Civil Services exams (Preliminary, Main, and Interview) conducted by M.P. PSC and UPSC.

student.name: Training Assistance for Competitive Examinations
student.description: The "Training Assistance for Competitive Examinations" scheme provides financial assistance to non-reserved category students who are undergoing training in recognized institutions for competitive recruitment examinations.

student.name: Merit cum Means Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
student.description: "Merit cum Means Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized Polytechnic Institutions in Chhattisgarh.

student.name: Bicycle Distribution Scheme for Girl Students of Economically Weaker Section
student.description: Under this scheme, free bicycles will be distributed to 5,800 girl students belonging to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), who are studying in government schools from Class 6 to Class 8, to facilitate their commute between home and school.

student.name: Minority Scholarship Scheme for Class 1 to 10
student.description: The scheme aims to provide scholarships to students belonging to minority communities who are studying in Classes 1 to 10 in any recognized government/non-government educational institution in Uttarakhand.

student.name: Banishree Scholarship
student.description: The aim provides assistance and encourages them to study as well as acquire technical/ professional/ vocational training.

student.name: Merit·cum·Means Scholarships For Under Graduate Studies In Various Branches Of Agriculture And Animal Science Subjects
student.description: The scheme of "Merit·cum·Means Scholarships For Under Graduate Studies In Various Branches Of Agriculture And Animal Science Subjects" was introduced by ICAR with a view to attracting meritorious undergraduate students to prosecute their studies up to graduation level.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Education (HPBOCWWB)
student.description: The Financial Assistance for Education Scheme has been introduced by the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB) to provide annual educational assistance for up to two children of a beneficiary, from Class I to professional and research courses.

student.name: Sudama Shishyavritti Scheme (Class 11th and 12th)
student.description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Class 11 and Class 12 in government schools who reside in a hostel, have an annual family income of less than ₹1,00,000/-, and belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Noni Babu Medhavi Shiksha Sahayata Yojana
student.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Mukhyamantri Noni Babu Medhavi Shiksha Sahayata Yojana" for Building and other construction worker on 06 January 2012.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Konya Atmonirbhor Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide a free Scooty to the meritorious girl students, which will be useful for them to travel to their College.

student.name: Educational Award Scheme - Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
student.description: The scheme has been implemented by the Gujarat Labour Welfare Board to encourage the children (students) of the Labours to increase their enthusiasm and to get higher education through it.

student.name: Subsidy for School Uniforms to the Students
student.description: The scheme aims to provide cash subsidies for school uniforms to students from Nursery to Class XII in government and aided schools. Benefits include annual payments ranging from ₹1,100/- to ₹1,500/-, ensuring financial support for all eligible students.

student.name: Lab on Wheels
student.description: This program has been launched to promote & popularize science education among school students and youth studying science subjects across all 13 districts of Uttarakhand.

student.name: Dr. S.K. Mukherjee Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture Students (2nd & 3rd Year)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. Agriculture course in their 2nd and 3rd years of study by awarding a one-year scholarship of ₹1,100 per month.

student.name: Vyasakabi Fakir Mohan Bhasabruti Scholarship
student.description: "Vyasakabi Fakir Mohan Bhasabruti Scholarship" is a Scholarship by the Higher Education Department, Govt. of Odisha. The objective of the scheme is the promotion of the Odia Language by way of encouraging meritorious students to take up higher studies in Odia Language at the U.G. and P.G. levels.

student.name: Pichda Varg Post Matric Chhatravritti
student.description: Under Pichda Varg Post Matric Chhatravritti Madhya Pradesh Government aimed at providing financial assistance to economically disadvantaged students belonging to these marginalized communities.

student.name: Pre- Matric Scholarships Scheme for Scheduled Castes & Others
student.description: The Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for Scheduled Castes & others is a Centrally Sponsored Scheme implemented by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India.

student.name: Scheme of Internship for Post-Graduate/Research Students
student.description: MoSPI is implementing the scheme of Internship for Post-graduate/Research Students of Statistics/ Mathematical Statistics/ Operations Research/ Economics/ Demography or any of the applied field of Statistics of recognized Universities//Institutions.

student.name: National Talent Scholarship Postgraduate
student.description: Merit-based support through the National Talent Scholarship to the post-graduate students seeking admission in agricultural universities in a state other than the state of their domicile through ICAR All India Entrance Examination (AIEE).

student.name: Innovation In Science Pursuit For Inspired Research (INSPIRE) - Internship
student.description: INSPIRE INTERNSHIP aims to provide exposure to the top 1% of students at the Class X Board level by organizing Science Camps either during summer or winter which provides an opportunity for them to interact with Science icons from India and abroad, including Nobel Laureates.

student.name: Cash Benefit Scheme Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
student.description: The objective of the "Cash Benefit Scheme" is to provide educational financial assistance to the wards of construction workers who have secured the top three ranks at the State Level and Regional Level in the Higher Secondary course or its equivalent examinations. The amount is credited through DBT.

student.name: State Government Backward Class Scholarship (Class 6 to 10)
student.description: The scheme is implemented by the School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to ensure the continuity of education for students from the Backward Classes. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to Backward Classes students studying in Classes 6 to 10.

student.name: Arivu Education Loan Scheme
student.description: The "Arivu Education Loan Scheme," launched by the Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Karnataka, and implemented by the Karnataka Minorities Development Corporation, offers loans to students pursuing professional courses like MBBS, B.E., B.Tech., MBA, MCA, LLB, and others in various fields

student.name: Integrated Hostel Scheme
student.description: "Integrated Hostel Scheme" by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides free residential facilities, meals, and basic amenities to SC/ST/OBC students studying in classes 1st to 12th and also to the students pursuing college education.

student.name: Free Distribution of Text Books to Students
student.description: Launched on 1st January 2008, the scheme "Free Distribution of Textbooks to Students" by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides free textbooks to students studying in classes 9th to 12th in government schools.

student.name: Primary Education Scholarship (Madhya Pradesh)
student.description: The "Primary Education Scholarship" scheme provides ₹150/- annually to students from De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic communities who are studying in classes 1st to 5th.  The scholarship distribution is managed through the Directorate of Public Education, Government of Madhya Pradesh.

student.name: Food Bill Assistance
student.description: The "Food Bill Assistance" scheme provides financial support to non-reserved category students pursuing graduate-level medical, dental, technical, and para-medical courses.

student.name: Scholarship for C.G. Domicile Students Pursuing Engineering Courses Outside Chhattisgarh State
student.description: The scheme supports students in their first year and fills vacant awards in subsequent years (II/III/IV). Key benefits include financial aid to cover educational expenses and encouragement for students to pursue quality education. Eligible applicants must be Chhattisgarh domicile.

student.name: STEM Lab
student.description: It aims to promote hands-on learning in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics by establishing labs across all blocks, giving students and teachers practical exposure to STEM experiments.

student.name: SC Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th
student.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste girl students of Madhya Pradesh enrolled in Class 11 to encourage them to continue their education and prevent dropouts.

student.name: State Disability Scholarship (Scholarship for Persons with Disabilities)
student.description: The scheme “State Disability Scholarship” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Nagaland to provide financial assistance to students from Class I to Class VIII who have a disability of 40% and above.

student.name: Scholarships to Students with Disabilities Scheme
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to assist students with disabilities to secure education, academic, technical, or professional training to enable them to earn a living and to become useful members of society.

student.name: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC students
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to increase the Gross Enrolment Ratio of SC students in higher education by providing financial assistance to students from economically weaker families at the post-matriculation or post-secondary level, enabling them to continue and complete their education.

student.name: Laptop Supply Scheme
student.description: "Laptop Supply Scheme" by the School Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides ₹25,000/- for purchasing a laptop to students who score 80% or more in 12th Standard from a Government Higher Secondary School or a Madhya Pradesh Board (MP Board) affiliated school.

student.name: Schemes for welfare of School Children belonging to BPL and BC(A) families: Monthly Stipend for BPL Students
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from BPL students to support their education. Under this scheme, a monthly stipend is provided to students studying in classes 1 to 12 in Haryana Government schools.

student.name: Sanskrit Chhatra Pratibha Samman
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage and motivate students to pursue higher studies in Sanskrit by rewarding those who achieve top positions in the subject at the high school, intermediate, undergraduate, and postgraduate levels.

student.name: ST Girl Child Literacy Incentive Amount - Class 11th
student.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to Scheduled Tribe girl students of Madhya Pradesh enrolled in Class 11 to encourage them to continue their education and prevent dropouts.

student.name: Girl Education Promotion (Bicycle Scheme)
student.description: The scheme aims to promote girls' education in the state by providing financial assistance for the purchase of bicycles to girl students studying in Class 9 in government and government-aided secondary schools.

student.name: National Talent Scholarship Undergraduate
student.description: The scholarship aims to support meritorious students by providing financial assistance of ₹3,000 per month during their undergraduate studies.

student.name: Bidya Lakshmi Loan
student.description: "Bidya Lakshmi" aims to provide education loans for higher studies to children of Assam State Government employees. Benefits include loans up to ₹10,00,000/- at 4% interest, with subsidies for eligible candidates.

student.name: Young Interns Program
student.description: The Young Interns Program (YIP) is an internship program, envisaged by the Government of Rajasthan, for providing opportunities for talented and progressive youth to upgrade their skills by gaining practical experience working in programs, schemes and projects of the government departments.

student.name: Nirman Shramik Siksha Kaushal Vikas Yojana
student.description: The NIRMAN SHRAMIK SIKSHA KAUSHAL VIKAS YOJANA (NSKKVY) is a scheme launched by the Government of Rajasthan to provide financial assistance for education and skill development to the children of registered construction workers in the state.

student.name: Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme - Sikkim
student.description: The "Comprehensive Educational Loan Scheme" was launched by the Department of Personnel, and Reforms, Training, Public Grievances, Government of Sikkim. The scheme aims to provide loans free of interest for the duration of one particular course of study with one one-year moratorium period offered...

student.name: Digital J&K Internship Scheme
student.description: The "Digital J&K Internship Scheme" is an opportunity for the students to secure first-hand and practical work experience. It also aims at active participation in the learning process through experimentation and putting into practice the knowledge acquired in the studies.

student.name: State Government ST Scholarship (Class 1 to 8)
student.description: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to give benefits for improving the educational status of scheduled tribe students. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to Scheduled Tribe students in Classes 1 to 8.

student.name: Sainik School Scholarship Located Outside the Uttarakhand
student.description: The scheme offers financial assistance to students from Uttarakhand enrolled in classes 6 to 12 at Sainik Schools outside the state, with scholarships awarded based on family income.

student.name: Gargi Sanskrit Balika Chhaatravrtti Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage and motivate girl students studying in Classes 6 to 12 at Sanskrit schools in the state by providing financial scholarships to support their education.

student.name: Scholarship For Differently Abled Students
student.description: The scheme “Scholarship for Differently Abled Students” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

student.name: Chief Minister's Scholarship Scheme
student.description: Under this scheme, financial support is provided to students from Class XI to Ph.D. level. It offers a fixed annual scholarship of ₹6,000 for post-matric studies, which is paid directly into the students’ bank accounts. This scholarship is often provided in addition to other scholarships.

student.name: Internship Scheme Of The Department Of Economic Affairs
student.description: The Internship Scheme aims to familiarise students with macro-economic policy formulation and economic research. Through this scheme, internship opportunities with token remuneration are provided to eligible Post Graduate and PhD students.

student.name: Boarding House Stipend Scheme (Tripura Govt.)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide accommodation support and reduce dropouts for ST students from remote areas, by offering a stipend per day (including LPG and upkeep) for those in hostels.

student.name: Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme
student.description: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Kali Bai Bheel Medhavi Chhatra Scooty Scheme" for Girls students.

student.name: Programme For Internship For LL.B./ LL.M./ Environmental Studies/ Research Students
student.description: The National Green Tribunal provides opportunities to college students by holding Summer Internship Programs (March, April, May and July ordinarily) and Winter Internship Programs (November, December and January ordinarily) Internship Programs for LL.B./ LL.M./ Env. Studies/ Research Students.

student.name: Government Hostel for Working Women/ Girl Students
student.description: The scheme aims to provide suitable, inexpensive, and safe accommodation to women employed in government offices, organizations, and firms, as well as girl students studying in colleges. Essential facilities include a cot with mattress, lockable cupboards, television, newspapers, magazines, etc.

student.name: Cash Award to the Meritorious Visually Impaired Students Obtaining First Three Ranks at the State Level in the SSLC and HSC Examination
student.description: The objective of this scheme is to award cash prizes to meritorious differently-abled persons (visually challenged students) who are studying in government and private schools of Puducherry and secure first, second and third rank concerning total marks in the SSLC and HSC exams.

student.name: State Agriculture Scholarship for B.Sc. & M.Sc. Agriculture
student.description: The scheme “State Agriculture Scholarship for B.Sc. & M.Sc. Agriculture” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Nagaland to provide educational assistance to students who are undergoing undergraduate (B.Sc. Agriculture) and post-graduate programme (M.Sc. Agriculture).

student.name: Scheme for Award of Scholarships to School or College-Going Children of Employees/Industrial Employees in Various Establishments
student.description: "Scheme for Award of Scholarships to School or College-Going Children of Employees/Industrial Employees in Various Establishments" by the Dept of Labour and Employment, Goa provides financial assistance to the children of industry workers to support their educational pursuits.

student.name: Aam Aadmi Bima Yojana (Maharashtra)
student.description: The "Aam Aadmi Bima Yojana" scheme is implemented by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra. This Centrally Sponsored Scheme is aimed at providing insurance and scholarship benefits to landless labourers in rural areas, aged 18 to 59 years.

student.name: Uchch Shiksha Puraskar Yojana
student.description: "Uchch Shiksha Puraskar Yojana" aims to encourage and motivate students from weaver families to pursue higher education. ₹20,000/- is provided to talented students from weaver families who get admission in first year of Engineering/Medical/CA/MBA courses in any government college in Chhattisgarh.

student.name: Children's Drawing Painting Competition
student.description: The "Children's Drawing and Painting Competition", organized by the Art, Culture and Museums Department, Goa, aims to encourage creativity and artistic expression among Goan children and to develop a healthy competitive spirit at a young age.

student.name: Sanskrit Shodh Chhaatravrtti Yojana
