student.description: The aim of the scheme is to encourage and support high-quality research in Sanskrit by providing financial assistance to meritorious Ph.D. students across state universities.

student.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Economically Backward Class
student.description: The scheme aims to support the education of poor students by offering scholarships from class 1st to 10th in government and aided schools.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Gyansetu Merit Scholarship Yojana
student.description: This scheme introduced by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to support meritorious students by providing scholarships from Class 6th to Class 12th in selected schools.

student.name: Margadeepam Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide educational financial support to minority community students in Kerala. It offers ₹1,500/- annual scholarship to eligible students from Class 1st to Class 8th studying in government and government-aided schools.

student.name: Sanskrit Chhaatr Pratiyogita
student.description: The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education among students by organizing Sanskrit competitions at various levels. Under this scheme, Sanskrit competitions are organized at various levels for both junior (Class 6 to 10) and senior (Class 11 to post-graduation) categories.

student.name: Mukhya Mantri Gyandeep Yojna
student.description: A scheme to provide financial support in the form of interest subsidy on Educational Loans availed from Banks by Himachali Students for pursuing Higher Education in India and Abroad.

student.name: Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for the Under Graduate Meritorious Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University
student.description: The "Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for the Under Graduate Meritorious Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University" provides monthly scholarships to students pursuing Under Graduate in various faculties at Junagadh Agricultural University.

student.name: National AIDS Control Organisation (NACO) Internship Programme
student.description: NACO initiated the Internship Programme for young students who wish to engage with the Government. The internship programme envisages an opportunity for young students to get familiar with and understand the various dimensions of policy-making & implementation of the National AIDS Control Programme.

student.name: Internship Program At The Indian Patent Office
student.description: The Internship Program by the Indian Patent Office recognizes the abundance of creative and innovative energies that flow in India, and the need to tap into and channelize these energies. The program aims to work towards the fulfilment of the objectives of the National IPR Policy.

student.name: Devnarayan Post Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: In Rajasthan, the Post-matriculation scholarship scheme is run by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment for the educational upliftment of students.

student.name: Internship Scheme For Students Of Counselling/ Psychology/ Social Work/ Home Science Etc
student.description: The objective of this scheme is to offer aspiring postgraduate students an opportunity for internship facilities to be trained as qualified interns in state-run private children's and shelter homes who can be offered hands-on job training experience.

student.name: Chief Minister’s College Students Rehabilitation Scheme (CMCSRS)
student.description: CMCSRS aims at providing the required educational facilities to the displaced and affected undergraduate students because of the prevailing social unrest in the state. This scheme is initiated to enable such students to continue with their education without interruption.

student.name: Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students
student.description: The scheme “Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry is introduced to provide scholarship to the differently abled students, studying from Class 1st upto Postgraduate/ Professional courses.

student.name: Award of Attendance Scholarship to Girl Students in the Middle Stage of Education
student.description: "Award of Attendance Scholarship to Girl Students in the Middle Stage of Education" was launched by the Directorate of School Education, UT of Puducherry aims to raise the enrolment of girls in schools in the age group of 11-14 years in the middle stage of education, and to avoid dropout.

student.name: Higher Educational Finance Assistance Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
student.description: The "Higher Educational Finance Assistance" is a Welfare Scheme by the Puducherry Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board. Through this scheme, financial assistance is extended to the wards of the Construction Workers who get admission into higher education programs.

student.name: Laptop Purchase Assistance Scheme- Gujarat Labour Welfare Board
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to encourage the children of laborers who are enrolled in professional or design courses by providing assistance for purchasing laptops, thereby reducing the financial burden of education.

student.name: General Poor Class Scholarship (Class 6 to 8)
student.description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Classes 6 to 8 in government schools. Students whose annual family income is less than ₹1,00,000/- and who belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category are eligible for the benefits.

student.name: International Centre for Environment Audit and Sustainable Development (iCED)
student.description: The "International Centre for Environment Audit and Sustainable Development (iCED)" scheme provides a platform to young students pursuing courses in Ocean Science, Environmental Science, Environment Management, Environment Audit, etc. to help develop awareness about the work of iCED with special.

student.name: Chief Minister Higher Education Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme was launched by the Higher Education Department, Government of Rajasthan. This scheme aims to enhance educational levels and provide scholarship to children from low-income families.

student.name: Free Education Scheme
student.description: The scheme provides financial support to Backward, Most Backward Classes, and Denotified Communities students pursuing 3-year undergraduate courses (B.A., B.Sc., B.Com.) in Government and Government Aided Arts and Science Colleges.

student.name: Post Matric Scholarship for Class 11th 12th And College
student.description: The scheme "Post-Matric Scholarship" started in 1945 by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Madhya Pradesh, provides scholarships to Scheduled Tribe students studying in classes 11th, 12th, Colleges, PhD, and Professional Courses.

student.name: Operation of SC Senior Hostel
student.description: The scheme "Operation of SC Senior Hostel" provides accommodations and a conducive learning environment for Scheduled Caste students. Through this scheme, separate junior, senior, and college hostels with free boarding and lodging facilities are provided to both boys and girls.

student.name: Free Caste Hostel (De-Notified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Communities)
student.description: The "Free Caste Hostel" scheme by the Department of De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides a scholarship of ₹1,230 per month for boys and ₹1,270 per month for girls for 10 months.

student.name: Haryana State Meritorious Incentive Scheme
student.description: The scheme "Haryana State Meritorious Incentive Scheme" by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Haryana, aims to promote academic excellence among students in government colleges. It provides financial incentives to top-performing students based on merit in annual examinations.

student.name: University Scholarship (Ph.D.) - Uttarakhand
student.description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance of ₹6,000/- in the form of scholarships to students who are pursuing a Ph.D. programme for 36 months or have submitted their rough thesis.

student.name: Tiatr Competition for Educational Institutions at Higher Secondary/College/University Level
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage and develop Tiatr activities among students of educational institutions. It provides financial support and awards to participating institutions for staging traditional Tiatr performances in competition format.

student.name: Freeship Less than ₹1,00,000/- (UG Students Only)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide tuition fee concessions to students enrolled in 3-year undergraduate programs and 4-year veterinary programs. Through this scheme, tuition fee concessions are provided to students in higher years of study whose tuition fees are less than ₹1,00,000/-.

student.name: Award of Merit Scholarship for Agricultural Engineering Students (B.Tech 3rd/4th Year)
student.description: The scheme aims to support meritorious students pursuing B.Tech in Agricultural Engineering in their 3rd and 4th years by providing scholarship of ₹2000/- per month for one year.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Chhatra Protsahan Scholarship Scheme (Junior Level)
student.description: The scheme aims to promote academic excellence among students entering Classes 6, 7, and 8 by providing financial assistance to meritorious students, based on their performance in a competitive examination conducted by the SCERT, Uttarakhand.

student.name: H.P. Swaran Jayanti Middle Merit Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The “H.P. Swaran Jayanti Middle Merit Scholarship Scheme” scheme was launched by the Department of Elementary Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh for students studying in Class V is meant to identify the talent and nurture it at an early stage.

student.name: Scheme for Grant of Additional Scholarship to the Students of Other Backward Classes of Andaman and Nicobar Islands, for Pursuing Higher Studies Anywhere in India after Secondary Level (Except Class XI & XII)
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide additional scholarship to the OBC students belonging to the non-creamy layer of Andaman & Nicobar Islands for pursuing higher education after Secondary (X)/Senior Secondary (XII), in government-recognized Polytechnic/ITI/College/University anywhere in India.

student.name: Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
student.description: The scheme "Fellowship for the Post-Graduate Students in Various Faculties Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides a monthly fellowship to meritorious Post-Graduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

student.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for the Students of Minority Castes
student.description: The scheme aims to support education among minority students by providing financial assistance from class 1st to 10th in government and aided schools.

student.name: Post SSC Scholarship for Boys/Girls from Socially and Educationally Backward Classes
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Socially & Educationally Backward Classes and Nomadic & De-notified Tribes pursuing education after SSC. Under this scheme, eligible students receive yearly scholarships ranging from ₹1,500 to ₹5,000, depending on their academic group.

student.name: NPC Students Internship Program
student.description: National Productivity Council (NPC) provides internship training to students pursuing graduation and post-graduation. The interns shall be given exposure to related interventions being activities undertaken by NPC which will provide opportunities to learn and implement new concepts.

student.name: Internship Programme At Serious Fraud Investigation Office
student.description: The Internship Programme at SFIO was started in 2017 to provide a platform for the interaction of talented and young scholars and researchers from reputed academic institutions who are pursuing Post-Graduation/Research Programs in Economics/ Commerce/Law/ Management and Computer Forensics, etc.

student.name: CBSE Merit Scholarship Scheme For Single Girl Child
student.description: The scheme aims to promote girls’ education and provide ₹1,000 per month to meritorious single girl students studying in classes 11th and 12th.

student.name: MANAGE Internship Programme
student.description: MANAGE Internship Programme is open to students from the disciplines of Extension Education, Economics, Sociology, Psychology, MSW, Journalism, Communication, and Environmental Science. The internships are open year-round, and the duration ranges from 3 months upto 6 months.

student.name: Border Areas Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide annual scholarships to economically weaker students from border areas, supporting them in pursuing education up to the degree level.

student.name: Post-matric Scholarship Scheme- Uttar Pradesh
student.description: The UP scholarship program was started by the state of Uttar Pradesh to increase literacy rates and generate a skilled youth force to boost social and economic growth.

student.name: Land Ports Authority Of India (LPAI) Internship Scheme
student.description: The Land Ports Authority of India (LPAI) is pleased to announce its annual internship program for the academic year 2025-26. This program provides a unique opportunity for students and research scholars from BBIN countries (Bhutan, India, Nepal, and Bangladesh) to gain practical experience in LPAI

student.name: State Agriculture Thesis Grant for M.Sc. Agriculture
student.description: The scheme “State Agriculture Thesis Grant for M.Sc. Agriculture” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Nagaland to provide a Thesis Grant to all the inhabitants of Nagaland who passed the M.Sc. Agriculture programme.

student.name: Aaws Bhatta Sahayata Yojana
student.description: The Aaws Bhatta Sahaayata Yojana Government of Madhya Pradesh runs this scheme for those poor students belonging to Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe of its state whose college is very far from their house and they have to rent accommodation near the college to study.

student.name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Intermediate or Equivalent
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible poor Brahmin students.

student.name: Professional Education (PEJKBOCWWB)
student.description: The "Professional Education" scheme by the JKBOCW Welfare Board, Jammu & Kashmir, provides financial assistance to regular students pursuing Para Medical, ITI, Engineering, and other recognized diploma or professional/technical degree courses.

student.name: Academic Education (JKBOCWWB)
student.description: The "Academic Education" scheme by the JKBOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Jammu & Kashmir, provides financial assistance to regular students from Class 9th to Post-Graduation.

student.name: Ashram Schools (Scheduled Tribes)
student.description: The scheme "Ashram Schools" was launched on 1st January 1966 by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides free accommodation, mess, and education facilities to Scheduled Tribe students.

student.name: Maanki Munda Scholarship for Female Students
student.description: The "Maanki Munda Scholarship for Female Students" scheme was launched by the Department of Higher & Technical Education, Govt. of Jharkhand. This scholarship program aims to make the girl students aware of enrollment in technical education, making them self-reliant & providing financial assistance.

student.name: Refund of Fees
student.description: Under the "Refund of Fees" Scheme, Higher Education Department, Madhya Pradesh, students can get a refund of the remaining fee (including caution money) after deducting ₹100 if they leave college, fail after provisional admission, or have their admission cancelled.

student.name: Scheduled Caste Boys/Girls Housing Assistance Scheme
student.description: The scheme "Scheduled Caste Boys/Girls Housing Assistance Scheme" by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides financial support for residential facilities to Scheduled Caste students who are studying in colleges outside their native village/city.

student.name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Pre Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
student.description: The scheme aims to support transgender students by providing scholarships to encourage their education and social upliftment. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹225/- per month to cover educational expenses from primary to pre-matric levels.

student.name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
student.description: The scheme aims to support transgender students pursuing post-matric education. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to cover educational expenses for their post-matric studies.

student.name: Bunkar Parivar Ke Pratibhavan Chatra-Chatraon Ko Protsahan Puraskar Yojana
student.description: "Bunkar Parivar Ke Pratibhavan Chatra-Chatraon Ko Protsahan Puraskar Yojana" aims to motivate and encourage children of weaver families for higher education. Monetary rewards are given to talented students who score well in 10th/12th board exams.

student.name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (PM-Vidyalaxmi) Scheme
student.description: The "Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (Pm-vidyalaxmi) Scheme" aims to provide financial support for higher education through education loans. Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to meritorious students seeking admission to domestic institutions.

student.name: Jan-Nayak Karpoori Thakur Kalyan Hostel Scheme
student.description: The "Jan-Nayak Karpoori Thakur Kalyan Hostel Scheme" by the BC & EBC Welfare Department, Bihar provides hostel facilities for students near Saharsa District with food grains (9 kg rice, 6 kg wheat) and ₹1000/- per month as a grant.

student.name: Merit cum Means Scholarship: Engineering University
student.description: "Merit cum Means Scholarship: Engineering University" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹1,000/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized engineering universities in Chhattisgarh.

student.name: All Goa Classical Dance Competition
student.description: The scheme "All Goa Classical Dance Competition" is open for Bharatnatyam and Kathak disciplines. Only solo dance will be considered for the competition. Costumes and accompanists are to be arranged by the participants at their own cost. Open to local students between 12 to 20 years of age.

student.name: Prof. Joseph Mundassery Scholarship Award
student.description: The aim is to provide financial assistance to financially backwards students from minority communities. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to eligible students from Christian, Buddhist, Jain, Sikh, Muslim, and Parsi communities.

student.name: Fellowship Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The "Fellowship Scholarship Scheme" by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to provide financial help to students by granting an annual monetary award to those who secure 70% or more marks in Class 10th and pursue higher education.

student.name: Tiatr Research Scholarship Program
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage college and university students to undertake research in Tiatr, its song, and music. It provides scholarships and publication opportunities for research work, targeting students pursuing Graduation, Post-Graduation, and PhD studies.

student.name: Scheme For Residential Education For Students in High Schools in Targeted Areas (SHRESHTA): Mode 1 - SHRESHTA Schools (Best CBSE Private Residential Schools)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide access to high quality education to students from Scheduled Caste communities in best private residential schools. It provides scholarships and bridge courses to meritorious Scheduled Caste students selected through national entrance test.

student.name: Scheme For Residential Education For Students in High Schools in Targeted Areas (SHRESHTA): Mode 2 - NGO Operated Schools
student.description: The sub-scheme aims to provide quality education and opportunities to students from SC communities through grant-in-aid institutions run by Non-Governmental Organizations and residential high schools, addressing the gap in service deficient Scheduled Caste dominant areas in the education sector.

student.name: Kalakar Kritadnyata Nidhi: Scholarships/Incentives
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to the wards of recognized Goan artists who are pursuing higher education, thereby addressing the economic challenges faced by artist families in supporting their children's educational aspirations and ensuring continuity of educational opportunities.

student.name: Scheme to Encourage Students for Innovative Projects
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage students in the State of Goa who have technological innovative ideas, which they want to translate into a working prototype, by providing financial assistance. It offers financial support of up to ₹50,000/- to eligible students for innovative academic projects.

student.name: Sudakshya For Girls Child Scholarship
student.description: This scholarship provides financial assistance to all deserving students who want to pursue higher studies.  Under this scholarship scheme, the students fulfilling the eligibility criteria will receive a maintenance allowance and other benefits.

student.name: Scheme of Scholarship for Sainik Schools
student.description: "Scheme Of Scholarship For Sainik Schools" was launched by the Directorate Of Higher and Technical Education, Meghalaya, to prepare young boys for a career in the Cadre of the Armed Forces. The scholarships are awarded to students whose family income is less than ₹8,000/- per month.

student.name: Prathibha Scholarship Programme
student.description: Prathibha Scholarship Programme is aimed at motivating bright Students to higher studies in Science by awarding Scholarships. Prathibha Scholars are also provided opportunities to attend Science Orientation Programmes and interact with pioneers in Science through the SPEED Scheme.

student.name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC students (Delhi)
student.description: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students" aims to support SC students financially for post-matriculation studies. Benefits include fee reimbursement and monthly allowances. Intended beneficiaries are SC students with a family income below ₹2,50,000/- annually.

student.name: National Service Scheme
student.description: The objective of the National Service Scheme (NSS) is to develop the personality and character of students through voluntary community service. The scheme aims to promote social responsibility, leadership, national integration, and a spirit of selfless service among youth.

student.name: The Scheme for Fellowship to Under Graduate Students for Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University
student.description: "The Scheme for Fellowship to Under Graduate Students for Various Faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University" provides monthly fellowship to meritorious undergraduate students across various faculties of Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University.

student.name: Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana (Scholarship For Promotion Of Aptitude & Research In Stamps As A Hobby)
student.description: "Deen Dayal SPARSH Yojana" awards annual scholarships to students who have good academic records and are also pursuing 'Philately' as a hobby. The objective is to “Promote Philately among children at a young age in a sustainable manner that can reinforce and supplement the academic curriculum.

student.name: National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme
student.description: The "National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme" by MNRE provides internship opportunities to facilitate students pursuing undergraduate/graduate/post-graduate degrees (Engineering, Science, Management, Law, etc) or research scholars enrolled in recognized institutes/universities.

student.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for Railway Protection Force
student.description: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme (PMSS) for RPF was announced by Hon’ble Prime Minister of India in his address to the nation from the historical Red Ford on 15th August 2005 to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex/Serving RPF/RPSF personnel& widows.

student.name: Internship Scheme Of The Ministry Of Labour & Employment
student.description: Through the Internship Scheme, the Ministry of Labour & Employment engage eligible students as “Interns" to work for mutual benefit. The “Interns” shall have an opportunity to know about the Government functioning and Department Policy issues in the Government of India.

student.name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Upgradation of Merit of Scheduled Caste Students
student.description: The scheme aims to upgrade the merit of Scheduled Caste students by providing them with facilities for all round development through education in residential or non-residential schools, addressing their educational deficiencies that prevent them from taking advantage of reservation quotas.

student.name: Chief Ministergi Artistesinggi Tengbang (CMAT): Support For Purchase Of Instruments / Equipment
student.description: The scheme "CMAT: Support for Purchase of Instruments / Equipment" aims to support many talented students and budding artistes, who are economically well but in need of instruments/equipment for their learning and performance purpose to help them groom towards professionalism.

student.name: Saraswati Cycle Yojana
student.description:
Chhattisgarh Saraswati Cycle Yojana has been started by the Government of Chhattisgarh in 2004. 
Saraswati Cycle Yojana is being operated by the Department of School Education, Government of Chhattisgarh.

student.name: Indirect Tax Internship Scheme In Central Board Of Indirect Taxes And Customs (CBIC)
student.description: The "Indirect Tax Internship Scheme" by CBIC takes Law Students/ Graduates as Interns every year. The interns are expected to study case files, assist in legal research and drafting of petitions, brief the counsels and extend any other related legal/general assistance to officers/counsels.

student.name: Devnarayan Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: In Rajasthan, the Pre-Matriculation scholarship scheme is run by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment for the educational upliftment of Very Backward Class students.

student.name: Award of Pre-matric Scholarship to the Students Whose Parents Are Engaged in Unclean Occupation
student.description: "Award of Pre-matric Scholarship to the Students Whose Parents Are Engaged in Unclean Occupation” by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Govt of Puducherry, provides scholarships to the students whose parents are engaged in unclean occupations to improve the status of the unprivileged society.

student.name: Veda Vyasa Scheme for Vedic Education
student.description: Andhra Pradesh Brahmin Welfare Corporation launched the “Veda Vyasa Scheme for Vedic Education” for the year 2019-20, to encourage Vedic Education in Andhra Pradesh.  Under this scheme, selected applicants will be granted Annual Financial Assistance.

student.name: Bharati Scheme for Education - Graduation
student.description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education - Graduation (Any regular course of 3 years duration after 10+2 will be considered under this category. i.e., B.A., B.Com, B.Sc., etc., including B.Ed.)" provides financial assistance to encourage Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education.

student.name: The NSFDC Internship Scheme
student.description: "The NSFDC Internship Scheme 2024" is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. The internship will expose students to various programs & schemes undertaken by NSFDC, offering them hands-on experience in

student.name: Handicapped Students Stipend Mizoram
student.description: Under this scheme, provide financial support to differently-abled students for purchasing essential items like books and uniforms. Students enrolled in both government and private schools are eligible to receive a monthly stipend.

student.name: Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana
student.description: The Savitribai Phule Kishori Samriddhi Yojana was initiated by the "Department of Women, Child Development, and Social Security, Government of Jharkhand."

student.name: Running of Scheduled Caste Hostel
student.description: The "Running of Scheduled Caste Hostels" scheme by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide housing and a conducive study environment for Scheduled Caste students. Separate junior, senior, and college hostels are operated for boys & girls.

student.name: Merit Scholarship: Engineering University
student.description: The scheme provides ₹1000/- per month to eligible students for pursuing B.E. from a recognized engineering college in Chhattisgarh.  The applicants can either be students who have passed their 10th and 12th standard examinations, or Diploma holders newly admitted to the second year of B.E.

student.name: Foreign Study Loan
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from non-reserved categories for pursuing higher studies abroad in medical and post-graduation courses. It offers loans up to ₹15,00,000/- at 4% simple interest per annum to eligible students.

student.name: Enhancement of Spoken English Programme
student.description: The scheme aims to enhance the spoken English skills of students of Classes 9 to 12 studying in all government schools across the districts of the state of Uttarakhand.

student.name: Free Uniforms for Students
student.description: This scheme Launched on 1 July 2004 with the aims to ensure regular attendance and continuity in education by offering uniform assistance to both boys and girls enrolled in Classes 1 to 8.

student.name: Award of Cash Incentive to the Toppers at Regional Level and Students Scoring Centum in the Subjects Involving Theory in Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Secondary School Certificate/Intermediate/Higher Secondary Public Examinations in Government Schools in the Union Territory of Puducherry
student.description: The scheme aims to award cash incentives to encourage students in their education by recognizing top three regional rank holders and those scoring centum in theory subjects in Secondary School Leaving Certificate/Secondary School Certificate/Intermediate/Higher Secondary Exams in Govt. Schools.

student.name: Simon Sing Horo Special Post-Matric Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide a one-time incentive of ₹10,000/- to students of the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Community who have cleared High School Leaving Certificate or Higher Secondary School Leaving Certificate examinations during the current year.

student.name: Gunavatta Evam Navaachar Nishulk Paathy Pustak Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free textbooks to all students from Classes 1 to 8 studying in government and government-aided schools, as well as recognized madrasas that follow the state government curriculum.

student.name: Technical Education Scholarship Scheme For Diploma Level
student.description: This scholarship will be awarded to students who are pursuing Diploma level Courses in Engineering/Technology including Architectural Assistantship or any other equivalent courses as approved by the All India Council of Technical Education (AICTE).

student.name: Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Other Backward Classes Students
student.description: The scheme “Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Other Backward Classes Students” was started by Dept. of Education, H.P. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to top 1000 meritorious students of OBC declared as such in the result of Matric Examination conducted by H.P. Board.

student.name: Loan For Foreign Study (S.E.B.C.)
student.description: The scheme aims to support higher education abroad for eligible students from the Socially and Educationally Backward Class (SEBC). It provides a maximum Foreign Study Loan of ₹15,00,000/- at an annual interest rate of 4% to SEBC students.

student.name: Raman-Charpak Fellowship
student.description: The “Raman-Charpak Fellowship Programme” is in honour of two Nobel Laureates in Physics, Prof C.V. Raman, Indian Nobel Laureate (1930) & Prof Georges Charpak, French Nobel Laureate (1992). The Fellowship was launched during the State visit of the President of France to India in February, 2013.

student.name: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme
student.description: The Lokpal of India Internship Scheme offers students exposure to anti-corruption laws and institutions. Interns learn about governance, legal frameworks, and contribute ideas to enhance transparency and accountability in public administration.

student.name: Right To Information Fellowship
student.description: Under this scheme, DOPT proposes to offer four short-term fellowships to researchers from the field of media / Civil Society professionals / RTI Trainers to conduct field-based research on themes relating to RTI. It is hoped that the research output will enhance their understanding of the RTI Act.

student.name: Scholarship For Cadets Of Rashtriya Indian Military College (RIMC), Dehradun
student.description: The objective of the Scheme is to provide financial assistance to Mizo students permanently residing in the States of studying at RIMC, Dehradun, to enable them to qualify and joint National Defence Academy and further to the Armed Forces. The scheme is 100% funding from the State Plan Fund

student.name: Internship Policy Of The Madhya Pradesh Tourism Board
student.description: The Internship Policy of the Madhya Pradesh Tourism Board intends to provide practical training experience (in summer/ winter etc.) to the students studying in various hospitality / tourism-related schools in Madhya Pradesh or outside the state.

student.name: Internship Policy Of Indian Council For Cultural Relations (ICCR)
student.description: ICCR provides an excellent opportunity for budding scholars to familiarise themselves with the role of soft power in foreign policy formulation in the Govt of India. These ‘Interns’ would be expected to supplement the process of analysis in various fields (creative writing, cultural mapping, etc).

student.name: Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows
student.description: “Reimbursement of Tuition Fees for Typewriting and Shorthand Courses for Children of Widows” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to encourage the children of widows to pursue Typewriting and Shorthand courses and facilitate the reimbursement of course fees.

student.name: Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students
student.description: The "Award of Pre-Matric Scholarship to Other Economically Backward Class (OEBC) Students" initiated by the Department of Information & Publicity, Union Territory of Puducherry, is designed to extend financial assistance to OEBC students, mitigating the risk of dropouts due to financial constraints.

student.name: Award of Scholarship to the Children who are Recipients of National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and Other National / International Merit Awards
student.description: The objectives of this scheme are to recognize the talents of children who are recipients of the National Child Award for Exceptional Achievements and other National/International Merit Awards and to recognize the talents of children who are pursuing outstanding achievements in different fields.

student.name: Grant of Financial Assistance for Purchase of Textbooks/Notebooks to School-Going Children of Industrial Workers/Employees (GLWB)
student.description: Through this scheme, the children of industrial workers/employees, studying in classes 1st to 4th in recognized/approved schools are provided financial assistance for the purchase of textbooks/notebooks. The scheme aims to provide financial support for the educational needs of the children.

student.name: Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Shramik Pravidhik Shiksha Sahaayata Yojana
student.description: The Government of Uttar Pradesh initiated a scheme "Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Shramik Pravidhik Shiksha Sahaayata Yojana" to encourage the children towards the education.

student.name: Alpasankhyak Post-Maitrik Chhaatravrtti Yojana
student.description: The Alpasankhyak Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme under the Madhya Pradesh Government is to provide financial assistance to students from minority communities in Madhya Pradesh pursuing post-secondary education.

student.name: Scholarship for Fatherless Girls
student.description: The objective of this scheme is to support the education of girls who have lost their fathers and are studying in government schools. Under this scheme, scholarships ranging from ₹350/- to ₹450/- are provided to eligible girls from Class 1 to Class 12.

student.name: Overseas Educational Loan Scheme
student.description: The "Overseas Educational Loan Scheme" objective is to provide financial/loan assistance to students belonging to minority communities who are pursuing graduate or postgraduate degree courses in recognized universities abroad.

student.name: Junior Hostel (Scheduled Tribes)
student.description: Launched on 1st January 1966, the scheme "Junior Hostel" by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides free accommodation and mess facilities to students studying in classes 6th to 8th.

student.name: Housing Assistance (Madhya Pradesh)
student.description: The scheme "Housing Assistance (Madhya Pradesh)" by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste (SC) Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides housing support to tribal boys and girls pursuing higher education outside their hometown, where hostels are not available.

student.name: Post Matric Students of Class 11th &12th ( Scheduled Caste)
student.description: Launched in 1976-77, the "Post Matric Students of Class 11th &12th " scheme is a welfare initiative by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides a facility for the reimbursement of scholarship fees to students.

student.name: Admission in Post Matric Hostel
student.description: The scheme was launched on 1st January1900, the scheme "Admission in Post Matric Hostel" by the Backward Classes and Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides free accommodation to backward class students to support their education.

student.name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana
student.description: The KVPY is a national fellowship program in basic sciences, initiated and funded by the Department of Science and Technology to attract exceptionally motivated students to pursue basic science courses and a research career in science.

student.name: National Awards to Teachers
student.description: "National Awards to Teachers" aims to celebrate the contributions of outstanding teachers and enhance the quality of school education. This award provides public recognition and honours the commitment of teachers, benefiting meritorious teachers working in primary, middle, and secondary schools.

student.name: Gujarat Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme for Standard 1st to 10th
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance for educational development to Scheduled Tribe students studying in Classes 1 to 10. Through this scheme, scholarships are annual

student.name: Namo Saraswati Vignan Sadhana Yojana
student.description: The scheme "Namo Saraswati Vignan Sadhana Yojana (8620)" by the Education Department, Government of Gujarat, aims to promote science education by providing financial assistance to students enrolling in the science stream in Class 11th and 12th.

student.name: S.T. Bus Pass Fee Concession Scheme For Government/ Non Government Primary, Secondary & Higher Secondary and Higher Technical Education Students
student.description: The scheme aims to provide concession in bus fare fees to the students studying in Primary, Secondary, Higher Secondary, and Higher Secondary Technical Education in Government and Non-Government schools. The scheme is implemented by the Gujarat State Road Transport Corporation (GSRTC).

student.name: Awas Sahayta Yojana for 100% Hearing and Visually Impaired Disabled Students in Special Trades of Industrial Training Institutes
student.description: The scheme aims to ensure qualitative admission and enable 100% hearing and visually impaired students to obtain high-quality technical education free from economic constraints. It provides housing assistance and expenses for food and accommodation, up to ₹4,000/- to PwD Students.

student.name: Coaching For Higher Studies
student.description: The scheme aims to provide coaching to students of Tea Tribes and Adivasi community for preparing them for various competitive examinations like Civil Services, Medical, Engineering, Staff Selection Committee (Graduate level), Banking (Probationary Officers), etc.

student.name: Asian Agri-History Foundation Research Fellowship (M.Sc. Agriculture - All Disciplines)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to meritorious students pursuing an M.Sc. in Agriculture across all disciplines by awarding a monthly fellowship of ₹1,200/- for one year.

student.name: Dr. K.C. Sharma Fellowship (M.Sc. Agriculture, Agronomy (Second Year) Students)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing an M.Sc. in Agriculture (Agronomy) who are in their second year of study, by awarding them a monthly fellowship of ₹1000/- for one year.

student.name: Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme “Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra Scholarship Scheme” was started by the Department of Education, Himachal Pradesh. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to the students of Himachal Pradesh who are studying in Sainik School Sujanpur Tihra.

student.name: Indira Gandhi Utkrisht Chattervriti Yojana
student.description: A merit-based scholarship scheme of ₹18,000 per annum by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Himachal Pradesh will be awarded to 10 toppers each from Class 12 (Arts, Science, and Commerce) and from the merit list of B.A., B.Sc. and B.Com

student.name: Free Studentship
student.description: The "Free Studentship" initiative, administered by the Directorate of Higher & Technical Education, Meghalaya, is a state-sponsored program aimed at providing financial assistance to students belonging to the SC/ST/OBC categories for their tuition fees and other fee according to prescribed rates.

student.name: Post Matric Merit Scholarship
student.description: The objective of the Scheme is to provide financial assistance to permanent residents of Mizoram States securing 60% marks in Board/University Examination. The scheme is 100% funded by the State Plan Fund.

student.name: Loan For Foreign Study (E.B.C.)
student.description: The scheme aims to support higher education abroad for eligible students from the Educationally Backward Class (EBC). It provides a maximum Foreign Study Loan of ₹15,00,000/- at an annual interest rate of 4% to EBC students.

student.name: ICRO Amrit Internship Programme
student.description: The IPL Centre for Rural Outreach (ICRO) has launched ICRO Amrit Internship Programme focused on youth productivity for prosperity. The interns will be placed at the headquarters and Regional Offices of NPC/ IPL. The duration of the internship will be 3 months initially, renewable up to four times.

student.name: Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme
student.description: The Vice Chancellor Internship Scheme (VCIS) by the University of Delhi aims to provide students with experiential learning opportunities, integrating academic knowledge with practical work experience. This initiative aligns with the objectives of "Samagra Shiksha" (holistic education) as outlined..

student.name: INAE Travel Grant Scheme for Engineering Students from IITs/NITs/Govt. Approved Engineering Colleges/Institutions other than AICTE
student.description: A Travel Grant Scheme by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and by the Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE), for the students from AICTE approved Engineering College/institutions. The scheme aims at enhancing the quality of engineering education in the country.

student.name: LIDCOM Education Loan Scheme
student.description: The "Education Loan Scheme" is a scheme by the Leather Industries Development Corporation (LIDCOM), Govt. of Maharashtra. In this scheme, finance of upto ₹ 20,00,000 is provided for post graduate students in the 18-50 years age group from Charmakar Community for studies in India and in abroad.

student.name: Internship Scheme Of Employees’ Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
student.description: The Internship Scheme of Employees’ Provident Fund Organization invites applications for Internships from students for engagement as “Interns” with EPFO. The “Interns” shall have an opportunity to know about the EPFO’s functioning and Departmental Policy issues in EPFO and Government of India.

student.name: Pre-SSC Scholarship for Scheduled Caste Students (Parixitlal Majmudar Scholarship)
student.description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to Scheduled Caste students who are studying in Class 1 to 10 in Government/Grant-in-Aid Schools/Private Schools.

student.name: Mahadevi Verma Shramik Pustak Kraya Dhan Yojana
student.description: The Mahadevi Verma Shramik Pustak Kraya Dhan Yojana (MVSPKDPY) is a scheme launched by the Uttar Pradesh government in 2022 to provide financial assistance to the daughters of construction workers for purchasing books.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Education (GBOCWWB)
student.description: Through the "Financial Assistance for Education (GBOCWWB)" scheme, the worker registered with the Board is provided with financial assistance, as determined by the Board, for the education of their children. The applications are accepted offline.

student.name: Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) Internship
student.description: The SECI Internship Policy is designed to provide practical experience to students in the renewable energy sector. The program aims to give interns exposure to SECI's various divisions, helping them understand the renewable energy sector.

student.name: Cycle Distribution Scheme
student.description: Under this scheme, tribal girl students in Class 11th who travel more than 2 km to reach school and did not receive a bicycle in Class 9th are given a cash amount equivalent to the cost of a bicycle.

student.name: State Scholarship of Class 6th to 10th (Scheduled Caste)
student.description: Launched in 1966-67, the "State Scholarship for Class 6th to 10th" is a scheme by the Scheduled Caste Welfare Department, Govt of MP. It provides ₹200 per year for boys and ₹600 per year for girls from Scheduled Caste communities, until 31st October.

student.name: Rani Durgavati and Shankarshah Puraskar Scheme (Reward Scheme for Meritorious Students)
student.description: "Rani Durgavati and Shankarshah Puraskar Scheme (Reward Scheme for Meritorious Students)" provides awards ranging from ₹3,000/- to ₹51,000/- to the meritorious students from the Scheduled Tribe community based on their performance in the 10th and 12th board examinations.

student.name: Post Metric Scholarship (Denotified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic)
student.description: The "Post-Metric Scholarship" scheme, implemented by the Department of Denotified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides financial assistance to students from class 11 to college level, including medical, engineering, science other courses.

student.name: Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme
student.description: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office.

student.name: Mukhya Mantri Sarvajan Uchcha Shiksha Chhatravriti Yojana
student.description: This scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from all sections of Rajasthan who are pursuing higher education at IITs, IIMs, and other national-level institutions. Under this scheme, 50% of the non-refundable fees are reimbursed to eligible students.

student.name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Financial Assistance for Studying Bisexual Children
student.description: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance of ₹6,000 per month for up to 12 months to transgender students from Class 6 and above for accommodation and daily needs if they live away from their homes for education.

student.name: Academic Scholarship Scheme (Labor Welfare Board Madhya Pradesh)
student.description: Under this scheme, up to two children of workers employed in industrial institutions/establishments covered under the Board are eligible for scholarship benefits. The scholarship is provided to students from Class 5th to 12th and higher education, who have passed their previous class.

student.name: Financial Assistance to OBC Students Appearing in the Mains Examination of UPSC
student.description: The scheme provides financial grants to the OBC students for appearing in the UPSC Mains Exam. An amount upto ₹50,000/- is provided to each beneficiary. The assistance is extended depending on the applicant meeting the eligibility criteria and the documents submitted.

student.name: Scholarships to Meritorious Students of Sanskrit Schools
student.description: The scheme aims to promote Sanskrit education by providing scholarships to meritorious students of Prathmik Madhyama (Class 10) and Uttar Madhyama (Class 12) in Sanskrit schools who secure the highest marks.

student.name: Government of Mizoram Incentive Cash Award Scheme To Successful Candidates for Central and All India Service Examination
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage educated youth among the citizens of India and bonafide residents of Mizoram who aspire to succeed entry to Central and All India Services, addressing the issue of Mizo educated youths lagging behind and becoming increasingly marginalized in examinations.

student.name: Establishment of Digital Learning Platform
student.description: The scheme aims to establish Digital Learning Platform to provide training and career counseling on various subjects, including ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes for students of secondary schools across the state.

student.name: Tour Program of Modern Laboratories
student.description: The scheme aims to promote biotechnology education and research by providing students, researchers, and farmers with exposure to modern laboratories, advanced research activities, and innovative technologies.

student.name: Combined Merit Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide merit-based scholarship to students of Assam studying in first semester degree and master degree courses in recognized institutions. It benefits academically meritorious students who have obtained at least 60% marks in their last qualifying examination.

student.name: Scheme for Awarding Fellowships for Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students
student.description: The "Scheme for Awarding Fellowships for Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students" provides financial support in the form of monthly scholarships to students pursuing higher education in various faculties at Anand Agricultural University.

student.name: Private Tuition Assistance to Socially and Educationally Backward Class Students Studying in Science Stream of Class 11 & 12
student.description: Under this scheme, a grant of ₹15,000 each for class 11 and class 12 to cover private tuition fees for eligible SEBC students pursuing science education in higher secondary classes.

student.name: Scheme for Economic Empowerment of De-notified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes - "Educational Empowerment" Component
student.description: The scheme aims to provide good coaching quality for De-notified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes candidates to enable them to appear in competitive examinations. Provides free coaching and stipend support to students from these marginalized communities.

student.name: SAHAKAR MITRA: NCDC’s Scheme on Internship Programme
student.description: The programme aims at providing an opportunity to professional graduates to get experience in areas of functioning of NCDC and related aspects of cooperatives.

student.name: Medhavi Putra/Putri Chhatravritti Yojana
student.description: "Medhavi Putra/Putri Chhatravritti Yojana" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. This is a 100% State Sponsored Scheme. Only the residents/domicile of the state of Jharkhand can apply to this scheme.

student.name: Girl Students Health & Hygiene Scheme
student.description: The scheme “Girl Students Health & Hygiene Scheme” was announced by the Department of School Education, Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh in 2013 for the girl students studying in classes 6-12. The scheme's focus was to retain, maintain hygiene, and continue education throughout the year.

student.name: Post Metric Scholarship For OBC Students
student.description: This scheme is to provide financial assistance to the Other Backward Classes students studying at the post-matriculation stage to enable students to complete their education.

student.name: Fee Reimbursement Scheme
student.description: The Uttar Pradesh government has decided to launch UP Fee Reimbursement Scheme to reimburse fees and give scholarships to students from backward classes.

student.name: Rajiv Gandhi Scholarship For Academic Excellence
student.description: In order to provide financial assistance to meritorious students of Rajasthan to study in top foreign universities of the world. The scheme commenced from 5th October 2021.

student.name: Internship Scheme By The Unique Identification Authority Of India (UIDAI)
student.description: The Internship Scheme by the UIDAI enables the students to gain adequate exposure to various Technology tracks and other units within UIDAI Headquarters, Technology Centre and Regional offices. It would be expected to work in the field of application development, legal domains (cyber laws/IT) etc.

student.name: SEBI ITD Internship Program
student.description: The SEBI ITD Internship Program provides hands-on training to the students of the institutes based in and around Mumbai. The program accepts up to 15 interns. The Interns accepted under this program would be given an opportunity to work on different Information Technology (IT) projects.

student.name: Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme
student.description: The scheme “Moovalur Ramamirtham Ammaiyar Higher Education Assurance Scheme” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare & Women Empowerment, Government of Tamil Nadu.

student.name: Government Special School for the Visually Handicapped and the Hearing Impaired
student.description: The scheme “Government Special School for the Visually Handicapped and the Hearing Impaired” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry, was introduced to facilitate the education and self-confidence development of visually impaired and hearing-impaired children.

student.name: Cash Incentive to Wards of ESM (Academic Scholarship)
student.description: Through this scheme, the academically meritorious wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM pursuing higher education are provided cash incentive of ₹1,000 per month. The application should be submitted within three months from the date of publication of the result of the respective exam.

student.name: Uniform Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
student.description: "Uniform Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. The wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided allowances towards purchase of their uniform.

student.name: Grant to Meritorious Wards of ESM in Sports: National / International Level (Sainik Welfare)
student.description: "Grant to Meritorious Wards of ESM in Sports: National / International Level" is a Welfare Scheme by the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. The meritorious wards of the ESM are provided grants for their achievements in sports at national and international levels. The application is offline.

student.name: Out of School Children scheme under Goa Sarva Shiksha Abhivan
student.description: The "Out of School Children" scheme is designed to ensure that every child in the 6-14 age group receives a complete elementary education. The primary objective is to identify children who are out of school and to reintegrate them into the educational system through specialized training programs.

student.name: Education Development Scholarship for Single Girl Child
student.description: The scheme was launched by School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh to ensure continuity of education for girl students who are the only daughters of their parents. Under this scheme, eligible girl students who are only child of their parents receive a scholarship of ₹5,000/- per year.

student.name: Rural Girls’ Incentive Scheme
student.description: The Scheme provides financial support to girls students of Most Backward Classes (MBC) and Denotified Communities (DNC) studying in rural government or government-aided schools, aimed at encouraging education and reducing school dropouts.

student.name: Jharkhand State Backward Classes Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The "Jharkhand State Backward Classes Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme" aims to promote higher education among OBC students in Jharkhand. The scheme provides financial assistance to students pursuing professional and academic courses at the post-matriculation level.

student.name: Prak Pariksha Prashikshan Kendra
student.description: The scheme provides free pre-examination training to eligible candidates for various competitive exams to enhance their preparation and improve their chances of success.

student.name: Strengthening Skills, Arts and Employment through ITIs
student.description: The "Strengthening Skills, Arts, and Employment through ITIs" initiative by the Department of De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to connect these skills with modern technology, short-term, employment-oriented training has been provided through ITIs.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Shiksha Alankar Yojana for Students of Economically Weaker Section
student.description: Under the scheme, a cash award of ₹50,000 will be given to students studying in government schools affiliated with the Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, Ajmer, who secure the highest marks in the EWS category in the Class 10th and Class 12th examinations (Arts, Commerce, and Science streams).

student.name: Mukhyamantri Medhavi Chhatra Protsahan Scholarship Scheme (Secondary Level- Class 11 & 12)
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage academic excellence among students entering Classes 11 and 12 by providing financial assistance to meritorious students who have secured 80% or more marks in the Uttarakhand Board Examination of Class 10.

student.name: Maintenance of Govt Boys and Girls Hostels (SC)
student.description: Under this scheme, it provides free hostel, food, and academic facilities to scheduled caste students pursuing post-SSC education.

student.name: Pre-Matric Scholarships to the Children of Those Engaged in Occupations Involving Cleaning and Prone to Health Hazards
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to children whose parents/guardians belong to one of the following categories, to pursue Pre-Matric education: Tanners, Flayers, Waste Pickers and Persons who are either presently engaged in Manual Scavenging.

student.name: Post Graduate Scholarship for University Rank Holders Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to attract talented students towards higher education and promote academic excellence at the postgraduate level. The scholarship is tenable for the full duration of the postgraduate course, subject to a maximum period of two years.

student.name: Scholarship Scheme of Sainik School Chhingchhip, Mizoram
student.description: The scheme aims to award financial scholarships to eligible boys of Mizoram domicile who are admitted to Sainik School Chhingchhip, specifically to foster their development and prepare them for future entry into the officer’s cadre of the Armed Forces. Benefits include coverage for School Fee, etc.

student.name: Grant In Aid Hostels
student.description: The scheme aims to provide boarding and lodging facilities to tribal students who wish to pursue primary, secondary and higher secondary education. Free lodging and boarding facilities are provided to intended beneficiaries who are students studying in standards 5th to 12th.

student.name: Doodh Sanjeevani Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide fortified, flavored, double toned pasteurized milk to students, pregnant women and lactating women. The scheme is implemented by the Anganwadi Centers and also by the Child Development Project Officers.

student.name: Financial Assistance to Students who Cleared Civil Services Prelims Conducted by UPSC/APSC
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students belonging to the Tea Tribes and Adivasi Community who have cleared the Civil Services Preliminary Examination. The benefits support their preparation for the Mains Examination to ensure their success.

student.name: Merit Scholarship (Top 3 UG Students)
student.description: The scheme aims to recognize and support academically outstanding undergraduate students by providing monthly financial assistance of ₹800/- in the form of scholarships to students in their 3rd year of Medical and 4th year of Veterinary undergraduate (UG) programs.

student.name: Educational Assistance To Children Of Prisoners
student.description: The scheme “Educational Assistance to Children of Prisoners” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

student.name: State Medical Scholarship (Scholarship Scheme for MBBS & Allied Courses, Nursing and Paramedical Students)
student.description: The “State Medical Scholarship” is a scholarship scheme, launched by the Department of Health & Family Welfare, Government of Nagaland. Under the scheme, financial assistance is provided to students who are pursuing MBBS & Allied Courses, Nursing and Paramedical courses.

student.name: Biotechnology Young Entrepreneur Award
student.description: The “Biotechnology Young Entrepreneur Award (BYE)” is a programme to promote commercialisation of bioscience ideas among graduate/post graduate students in Biotechnology and to encourage them to develop biotechnology entrepreneurship.

student.name: Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Scheduled Caste Students
student.description: The scheme “Dr. Ambedkar Medhavi Chhatravriti Yojna to Scheduled Caste Students” was started by the Dept. of Education, H.P. Under the scheme, scholarship is given to top 1250 meritorious students of SC category as such in the result of Matric Examination conducted by H.P. Board of School Education.

student.name: TEC Internship Scheme
student.description: The ‘TEC Internship Scheme’ intends to engage 25 Interns in order to study/formulate/operationalize/assess various works/projects/policies etc. The internship will provide an opportunity for young scholars to contribute to the TEC work and have insight into the related technical work.

student.name: Food Safety & Standards Authority Of India (FSSAI) Internship Scheme
student.description: The Internship Program by the FSSAI provides interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. FSSAI is a statutory body established under the Food Safety & Standards Act, 2006 under the aegis of the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

student.name: Merit Awards
student.description: In the "Merit Awards" scheme, awards are given to the students with disability who rank 1st, 2nd, and 3rd among disabled students in the Secondary School Certificate (S.S.C.) and Higher Secondary Certificate (H.S.C.)  in their respective divisional boards of education.

student.name: Widow B.Ed Scheme-Rajasthan
student.description: In 2015-16, Rajasthan State started the "Widow B.Ed Scheme" for Widow/abandoned women.

student.name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC) Internship Scheme
student.description: CVC initiated an Internship Scheme in the year 2016. This Scheme seeks to engage Indian Nationals, who are Graduates (awaiting final year results) /Post Graduate or Research Students enrolled in reputed Universities/Institutions in India or abroad.

student.name: Grant Of Retention Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Girl Students
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to Scheduled Caste Girls Students to pursue their studies in Primary Education. Because of this assistance, the parents of those students may not lose any income that they would otherwise get by sending their girls to work.

student.name: Opening and Maintenance of Boys and Girls Hostels
student.description: The scheme "Opening and Maintenance of Boys and Girls Hostels” by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Government of Puducherry, provides boarding/lodging and hostel facilities to Scheduled Caste students in pursuance of their education and to dissuade dropping of education at school and college level.

student.name: Educational Allowances to the Children of Widows
student.description: “Educational Allowances to the Children of Widows” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry, was introduced to provide financial assistance (₹25 to ₹125) for the education of poor widows' children up to higher secondary or equivalent.

student.name: Tablet Assistance to Scheduled Caste Students of 12th Standard
student.description: Under the scheme, students in the 12th standard belonging to the Scheduled Caste category will receive a tablet by paying a token fee of ₹1,000/-.

student.name: Post Matric and Top Class Scholarship
student.description: The Scheme Post Matric and Top Class Scholarship for Madhya Pradesh is provide financial assistance to students from economically disadvantaged backgrounds to pursue higher education.

student.name: Scholarship (I to VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons
student.description: The 'Scholarship (I to VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to purchase notebooks for differently-abled students studying in government school.

student.name: Kanya Saksharta Protsahan Yojana
student.description: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Welfare Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh. The objective of the scheme is to motivate girls towards education. Under this scheme, girls in Class 11th who have passed their 10th class examination will receive ₹3,000/- per year as a monetary incentive.

student.name: State Government ST Scholarship (Class 9 to 10)
student.description: The scheme was launched by the Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to encourage education among Scheduled Tribe students and improve their educational status. This scheme provides scholarships to Scheduled Tribe students in Classes 9 and 10.

student.name: Research Scholarship for Disabled Students
student.description: The scheme is implemented by the Higher Education Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide financial support for PhD research to differently-abled students. Eligible candidates receive ₹16,000/- per month, which is directly transferred to their bank accounts.

student.name: Aawaas Sahayata
student.description: Launched in 2016, the "Aawaas Sahayata" scheme by the Department of Tribal Affairs, Madhya Pradesh, The scheme provides housing assistance to tribal students pursuing higher education outside their hometowns where hostels are unavailable.

student.name: Jharkhand State Scheduled Caste Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The "Jharkhand State Scheduled Caste Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme" promotes higher education among Scheduled Caste students in Jharkhand by providing financial assistance. This scheme aims to increase the participation of SC students in post-matric education.

student.name: Tuition Fee Reimbursement of Sainik/Public Schools
student.description: The "Tuition Fee Reimbursement of Sainik/Public Schools" scheme by the Department of De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Welfare, Government of Madhya Pradesh, reimburses tuition fees for eligible students enrolled in Sainik Schools or Institutions.

student.name: Free Supply of Text Books
student.description: The scheme provides textbooks or cash subsidies for textbooks and writing materials to students of Government and Aided Schools. Benefits include financial assistance ranging from ₹550/- to ₹830/- per annum, with additional support for geometry boxes. All students from Nursery to 12th are eligible.

student.name: Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions
student.description: "Merit Scholarship: Polytechnic Institutions" is a scholarship scheme by the Technical Education Department, Government of Chhattisgarh. The scheme provides ₹600/- per month to eligible students for pursuing education from recognized polytechnic institutions in Chhattisgarh.

student.name: Shridev Suman State Merit Scholarship
student.description: The scheme provides monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to meritorious students who qualify in eligibility test conducted by SCERT Uttarakhand. The scholarship is awarded to the next 5 students from each development block of Uttarakhand who are not selected for the Dr. Shivanand Nautiyal Scholarship.

student.name: Amit Gautam Memorial Scholarship (B.Tech in Electronics Engineering – 4th Year)
student.description: The scheme aims to support meritorious students pursuing a B.Tech in Electronics Engineering who are in their 4th year of study by providing a one-year scholarship amounting to ₹7,000/-.

student.name: Scheme To Provide Assistance To Students Seeking Education Outside Goa In Any Field Of Art And Culture
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage young talents in Goa to achieve the highest possible standard in fields of Art and Culture by providing financial support for training outside the State. Assistance is provided to eligible students for basic or advanced education in art.

student.name: Bhagwan Birsa Munda Lakshya Siddhi Yojana
student.description: The scheme provides financial assistance, in the form of a Scholarship, proportionate to the fees paid by Scheduled Tribe students at the Higher Secondary School Certificate (HSSC) level in order to take offline coaching assistance through reputed institutions for preparation for NEET & JEE.

student.name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan (PM-USP) Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University students
student.description: A scholarship scheme by the Dept. of Higher Education to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families to meet a part of their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies. The scholarships are awarded on the basis of results of Higher Secondary / Class 12th Board Exam

student.name: Scheduled Tribe Purvadasham Scholarship Scheme (Class 1 to 8) - Uttarakhand
student.description: The aim of this scheme is to help Scheduled Tribe students studying in Classes 1st to 8th by giving them financial support so they can continue their education without any financial difficulty.

student.name: Special Incentive to OBC Meritorious Students (Boys & Girls)
student.description: This scheme offers a financial incentive of up to ₹10,000/- to meritorious Other Backward Classes (OBC) students who have achieved 80% or higher marks in the HSSLC examination. The objective is to motivate and encourage OBC students to pursue higher education.

student.name: Coaching Assistance for Pre-preparation for Competitive Exams of ALL INDIA level like IIM, CEPT, NIFT, NLU and IELTS, TOFEL, GRE for going Foreign
student.description: The scheme aims to assist SEBC and economically backward students in coaching for premier Indian and international exams, the eligible candidates receive up to ₹20,000/- or the actual fee paid.

student.name: Mamasaheb Phadke Management of Govt Adarsh ​​Residential Schools (SC) Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to expand access to quality residential education for scheduled caste students in standards 9 to 12. Through this scheme, eligible SC students receive free boarding, lodging, textbooks, uniforms, meals, and additional support services to enhance academic participation.

student.name: Swami Vivekananda Utkrisht Chhatravriti Yojana
student.description: The scheme “Swami Vivekananda Utkrisht Chhatravriti Yojana” is a Scholarship Scheme by the Dept. of Education, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh. An amount of ₹ 18,000/- per year will be given to the general category students for two successive years after matric. 2000 scholarships are awarded every year.

student.name: The Post-Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribes Students
student.description: The scheme "Post-Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Tribes Students" by the Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India, and Government of Mizoram aims to provide financial assistance to ST students pursuing post-matriculation education. It covers various recognized courses.

student.name: Schedule Tribe Pre-Metric Scholarship Class 06 To 08
student.description: In the year 1984, Rajasthan Government started a scholarship to encourage the education of the Schedule Tribe.

student.name: Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed
student.description: In Rajasthan, "Incentive To Saharia Students For B.Ed" scheme is run by the "Tribal Area Development Department" from 2004-05.

student.name: Medhavi Chhatr/Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana
student.description: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Medhavi Chhatr/ Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana" for education.

student.name: Merit Based Award and Recognition Of High Performance In The Board Exams Of SSC And HSSC In The State Of Goa
student.description: The objective of this scheme is to motivate students by giving Merit Based Award on the benchmark of performance and to provide financial incentives to high-performing students who are economically weak. The scheme aims to increase the representation of the ST Community in the High-Rank Holders.

student.name: Chief Minister Breakfast Scheme
student.description: The objective of the Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Breakfast Scheme is that Breakfast will be provided to primary school children from 1st to 5th standard studying in Government schools on all school working days.

student.name: Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students
student.description: The scheme “Award of Post-Matric Scholarship to Scheduled Caste Students” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Government of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to benefit the students who are studying at the Post-matric level or Post-Secondary stage to complete their education.

student.name: "SUPER 30" Scheme
student.description: "Super 30" was launched by the Directorate of Secondary Education, Tripura. The scheme aims to provide free coaching for JEE/ NEET to the students who are appearing in the class 10th Board Final Exam and want to pursue Science Stream in Class 11th & 12th with the aspiration to crack JEE/NEET.

student.name: One Time Cash Incentive towards acquiring BEd, BPEd, DTEd, PGDCA (Sainik Welfare)
student.description: "One Time Cash Incentive towards acquiring BEd, BPEd, DTEd, PGDCA" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Department of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, up to ₹20,000/- is provided to the unemployed Ex-servicemen to pursue the mentioned programs/courses.

student.name: Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows (Sainik Welfare)
student.description: "Book Allowance to the Wards of Ex-Servicemen/Widows" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, the wards of the ESM / Widows of ESM studying in Government-recognized Institutions are provided allowances towards the purchase of books.

student.name: AlCTE - Distinguished Professional Scheme
student.description: AICTE-Distinguished Professionals Scheme has been launched by the All India Council for Technical Education, Ministry of Education to improve the quality of Technical Education in India by utilizing the expertise of Professionals, Emeritus professors & Eminent Personalities to share their knowledge.

student.name: Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) - Tamil Nadu
student.description: The 'Scholarship (Above VIII Standard) by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide scholarships to differently-abled students studying in government school/colleges/training centre

student.name: Gayathri Scheme for Academic Excellence
student.description: The "Gayathri Scheme for Academic Excellence" scheme aims to provide awards to the topper of the recognized and reputed School/ College/ Institute for his/her academic excellence in SSC/ Intermediate or equivalent/ Graduation/ Professional Education Course for the Academic year.

student.name: Bharati Scheme for Education Professional Education Course - Chartered Accountancy Final
student.description: The "Bharati Scheme for Education Professional Education Course - Chartered Accountancy Final" encourages Brahmin students of Andhra Pradesh to continue their education. Under this scheme, financial assistance for the academic year will be granted to eligible poor Brahmin students.

student.name: Senior Hostel (Scheduled Tribes)
