SC/ST for undertaking postgraduate level studies in Professional subjects like Engineering & Technology, Management, Pharmacy etc. in recognised Indian Universities/Institutions/Colleges.

student.name: Pragati Scholarship Scheme For Girl Students (Technical Diploma)
student.description: A scholarship scheme by AICTE for Girl Students admitted in 1st or 2nd Year of the technical diploma course in an AICTE approved institution. The benefits are provided for a period of max. of 3 years for first-year students and a max. of 2 years for second-year admitted students (later entry).

student.name: Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for SC Students
student.description: The scheme "Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for SC Students" aims to provide additional financial assistance to Scheduled Caste students to supplement their Post Matric Scholarship maintenance allowance. Additional monthly allowances are provided to meet food, travel, and disability-related expenses.

student.name: State Scholarship for Class 6th to 10th (Denotified, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic )
student.description: The "State Scholarship for Classes 6th to 10th" scheme provides an annual scholarship ranging from ₹200/- to ₹1,200/- (for 10 months) to the students belonging to De-notified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic communities studying in classes 6th to 10th.

student.name: Haryana State Merit Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to support meritorious students from economically backward sections in pursuing higher education. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to students pursuing Degree, Post-Graduate, and Doctorate courses.

student.name: Free Bicycle Distribution to Students of Vimukt, Ghumantu and Ardhghumantu Communities
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free cycles to students studying in classes 6th to 11th in government and recognized private educational institutions and belonging to Denotified Tribes, Nomadic and Semi-Nomadic Tribes communities of Rajasthan.

student.name: Pragati Scholarship (81 for Uttarakhand girl students (Diploma) and 50 for Graduation)
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage higher education among girl students of the state by providing financial assistance in the form of scholarship. Under this scheme, scholarships are awarded to 81 girl students enrolled in Diploma courses and 50 girl students enrolled in Graduation courses in Uttarakhand.

student.name: Shikshashree Scheme
student.description: The scheme "Shikshashree Scheme” was implemented by the Government of West Bengal during the year 2014-15  by merging the existing schemes of Book Grants & Maintenance Grants to provide financial assistance to Schedule Caste students studying in classes V to VIII.

student.name: Scheme for Grant of Additional Scholarship to the Students Belonging to Scheduled Tribes of Andaman and Nicobar Islands for Pursuing Higher Studies Anywhere in India Post-Senior Secondary Courses (Post 10+2 Courses)
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide additional financial assistance (scholarship) to the ST students pursuing higher education after Senior Secondary i.e. 12th Standard in the Colleges/Universities anywhere in India, as an incentive to supplement the cost of their education.

student.name: Saraswati Sadhana Yojana to Socially and Educationally Backward Girls studying in Class 9th
student.description: Under this scheme, free bicycle assistance is provided to Socially and Educationally Backward class girls studying in Class 9 in government and grant-in-aid schools across Gujarat.

student.name: IELTS & TOEFL Training Assistance
student.description: The scheme aims to help tribal students pursue higher studies abroad by offering professional IELTS/TOEFL training. It provides ₹3,10,000/- in training assistance and comprehensive guidance.

student.name: National Career Service Centers For SC/STs (erstwhile Coaching-cum-Guidance Centre for SC/STs)
student.description: The scheme provides vocational guidance, confidence-building programmes, personality development sessions, practice in typing and shorthand, special coaching for competitive exams, and computer training courses. The applicant must be an educated, unemployed SC/ST jobseeker.

student.name: Dr. Panjabrao Deshmukh Hostel Maintenance Allowance
student.description: This scheme is for the Students whose parent's annual Income is below 800000 and Students whose parents are Marginal Land Holder and registered laborers.

student.name: Modular Functional Artificial Limbs
student.description: The 'Modular Functional Artificial Limbs' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, modular functional artificial limbs are provided for orthopedically differently-abled students, employed or self-employed.

student.name: Kasturba Gandhi Residential Girls’ Hostel
student.description: The scheme aims to encourage girls’ participation in education at the upper primary and secondary levels and to provide quality education to girls from disadvantaged groups (SC, ST, OBC, Minority communities and BPL families) studying in Classes 6 to 12.

student.name: Samaaveshit Shiksha
student.description: The scheme aims to provide equal and inclusive educational opportunities to all children with special needs (Divyang children) studying in government schools from Classes 1 to 12.

student.name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The scheme was introduced from the Academic year 2006-07 to encourage higher technical and professional education for the dependent wards of Ex-servicemen/ Ex-Coast Guard personnel and their widows.

student.name: Other Backward Caste Dashamottar Scholarship Scheme (Starting from Class 11) - Uttarakhand
student.description: The scheme aims to support Other Backward Class (OBC) students of Uttarakhand from Class 11th onwards by providing financial assistance for their education, including tuition fees and other academic expenses.

student.name: Economically Backward Class (EBC) Dashamottar Scholarship Scheme (Starting from Class 11)
student.description: The scheme aims to support Economically Backward Class (EBC) students of Uttarakhand from Class 11th onwards by providing financial assistance for their education, including tuition fees and other academic expenses.

student.name: Food Bill Assistance for Medical & Engineering Students of Nomadic Tribes & Denotified Tribes
student.description: The scheme supports students from Nomadic Tribes and Denotified Tribes pursuing full-time Medical or Engineering courses in Gujarat by reducing their living expenses. Eligible students receive ₹1,500/- per month for up to 10 months each academic year to cover mess or canteen expenses.

student.name: Internship Programme Of The Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (MoEFCC)
student.description: Internship at Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB) provides an excellent opportunity for students/researchers to familiarize themselves with various issues related to wildlife & the functioning of WCCB. The intern shall have an orientation session and will be assigned specific areas of work.

student.name: National Centre For Communication Security (NCCS) Internship Scheme
student.description: The National Centre for Communication Security (NCCS) Internship Scheme allows young talent to be associated with the NCCS work for mutual benefit. It will enable NCCS to interact with young scholars and to get fresh ideas and study/ research support from the field of academics.

student.name: Cash Award (MBOCWWB)
student.description: Under the scheme, the Board annually awards cash prizes to three male and three female children of registered construction workers in each district who scores the highest marks in the SSLC examination.

student.name: Indira Priyadarshini Award
student.description: The scheme aims to promote academic excellence among girl students by providing one-time financial rewards to those securing the first position in Class 8th, 10th, and 12th examinations, along with vocational & Swami Vivekanand Government Model Schools achievers at the district and state levels.

student.name: Chief Ministers’ Education Assistance Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from economically weaker sections, marginalized communities & specially-abled students. Under this scheme, students receive financial aid for pursuing education within & outside the state, abroad, & in registered coaching institutions.

student.name: scholarship scheme - Uttarakhand Agricultural Production & Marketing Board, Uttarakhand
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to the sons and daughters of small and marginal farmers, agricultural laborers, and market workers of Uttarakhand to pursue higher education in Agriculture, Forestry, Fisheries, Horticulture & other related fields.

student.name: Welfare Measures for Children of Labourers
student.description: This scheme aims to provide welfare measures in the form of educational stipends, incentives for academic excellence, and financial support for higher education to the children of SC/ST labourers who demonstrate exceptional academic performance and pursue higher education after 10th grade.

student.name: Behind the Ear Hearing Aids by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons
student.description: 'Behind the Ear Hearing Aids by Welfare of Differently Abled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to encourage hearing-impaired students to wear hearing aids to increase their speech capacity.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Hostel Facility in Professional/Technical Institutions (HBOCWWB)
student.description: Under this scheme, the Board provides financial assistance of up to ₹1,20,000/- to the children of construction workers for hostel facilities while they pursue technical/professional courses in recognized institutes.

student.name: Distance Education Scheme for Girls
student.description: The scheme aims to support girls' higher education through distance learning by reimbursing their course fees for UG, PG, Diploma, Certificate, and PG Diploma undertaken by girls through distance education in Rajasthan.

student.name: OEC Pre-matric Educational Assistance
student.description: The Scheme “OEC Pre-matric Educational Assistance” was started by the Backward Classes Development Department, Government of Kerala to provide educational assistance to pre-matric students belonging to these communities who are studying in Government/Aided/Unaided schools from Classes 1st to 10th.

student.name: Maulana Azad Education Finance Foundation Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to provide interest-free loans of up to ₹5 lakh to students from minority communities for pursuing higher education in India and abroad.

student.name: Scholarship for Engineering and Medical Education
student.description: The scheme aims to support the higher education of dependents of ex-servicemen by providing financial assistance for pursuing engineering, medical, and PhD courses. Under this scheme, annual scholarships are awarded to beneficiaries based on their course of study.

student.name: Special Financial Assistance Scheme for Meritorious Students of the State for Preparation of Competitive Examinations
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support of ₹50,000/- to meritorious students who have cleared the preliminary examination conducted by the State or Union Public Service Commission for Group 'A' and 'B' services, or the written examination for the Armed Forces (e.g., NDA, CDS, OTA, etc.).

student.name: Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for Post Graduate Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University
student.description: The "Scheme for the Award of Scholarship for Post Graduate Students of Various Faculties of Junagadh Agricultural University" provides monthly scholarships to students pursuing Post Graduate in various faculties at Junagadh Agricultural University.

student.name: Special Incentive to ST (P)/OBC/MOBC Meritorious Students
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial grants to meritorious ST (P)/OBC/MOBC students in Assam who secure high marks in Matriculation, 10+2, Graduation, or Post Graduation. Benefits include fixed monetary assistance ranging from ₹10,000/- to ₹25,000/- based on educational level.

student.name: Chief Ministergi Shotharabasingi Tengbang (CMST): Scholarship Of Students With Disabilities
student.description: "CMST: Scholarship of Students with Disabilities" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, the Students with Disability who are a domicile of the State of Manipur, and are studying in Class 1st and and above are awarded with scholarship of upto ₹ 8,000/-.

student.name: Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons
student.description: 'Readers Allowance to Visually Impaired Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide readers allowance to visually impaired students, specific allowance rates based on the education level.

student.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to award scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest their drop out at class VIII and encourage them to continue their education at secondary stage.

student.name: Devnarayan Gurukul Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free residential education to students from Special Backward Classes. Under this scheme, selected students receive free education, accommodation, meals, uniforms, books, and study materials in government-approved schools.

student.name: Super-100 Programme - Uttarakhand
student.description: The scheme aims to identify and support the brightest Class 12 Science stream students by providing them with high-quality coaching and guidance for engineering and medical entrance examinations. The programme is a unique state-level initiative approved by the Government of India.

student.name: Scheme for Promoting Young Talents in Science-II
student.description: The scheme “Scheme for Promoting Young Talents in Science-II (SPYTiS-II)” is constituted for the purpose of providing financial and technical assistance to talented young students who have innovative ideas in scientific/technological pursuits.

student.name: Scheme to Encourage the Children of Sanitation Workers Who have Passed the Class 10/12 Examination (GSKVN)
student.description: Under this scheme, children of sanitation workers who have achieved first, second, or third rank in the board exams of Class 10 and Class 12 (General Stream and Science Stream) across the state are awarded cash prizes and certificates of appreciation.

student.name: Aswachh Dhandha Chhaatravrtti
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to motivate students from marginalized sections of society, whose parents are involved in unclean & hazardous occupations, to pursue their education. Under the scheme, financial assistance of ₹1,850/- per annum is provided to students from Class 1 to Class 10.

student.name: Smt. Bimla Rani Memorial Award (B.Sc. Ag., B.V.Sc. & A.H., B.H.Sc. & B.F.Sc.)
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance and encourage meritorious students pursuing Bachelor of Science in Agriculture (B.Sc. Ag.), Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & A.H.), Bachelor of Home Science (B.H.Sc.), and Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) courses.

student.name: Incentive for Purchase of Electric Scooter for the Daughter of a Registered Construction Worker (HBOCWWB)
student.description: Under this scheme, an incentive of ₹50,000/- or the actual ex-showroom price of electric scooter, whichever is lower, will be provided by the Board through e-RUPI to the daughter of a registered construction worker to facilitate her mobility while pursuing higher education.

student.name: Encouragement Scheme for Taking Admission in Science and Contemporary Subjects
student.description: This scheme provides scholarships to Scheduled Tribe students who have passed Class 10 and enrolled in Class 11 Science stream, and to those who have passed Class 12 and enrolled in a B.Sc. course in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Biology.

student.name: Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for OBC (Dhangar) Students
student.description: The scheme "Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for OBC (Dhangar) Students" by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Government of Goa aims to provide additional financial assistance to OBC (Dhangar) students to supplement their Post Matric Scholarship maintenance allowance.

student.name: Opening And Running Junior Colleges For VJNT Students Run By Voluntary Agencies
student.description: The Govt. of Maharashtra vide G.R. dated 26/6/2008 launched the scheme “Opening and Running Junior Colleges for VJNT Students Run by Voluntary Agencies” for the educational and social development of Vimukta Jatis and Nomadic Tribes (VJNT) students.

student.name: State Post-metric Scholarship For Disabled
student.description: The "State Post-metric Scholarship for Disabled" is a scheme by the Department of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to encourage students with disability (SwDs) to pursue higher education.

student.name: National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship Scheme
student.description: The “National Centre for Earth Science Studies Internship” scheme by the Earth System Science Organization, Ministry of Earth Sciences, provides various opportunities for school as well as college students to familiarise and/or pursue research on different branches of earth sciences.

student.name: Pre Matric Scholarship Scheme (Saral Vidya Sahay) for SC and OBC (V to VIII)
student.description: "Pre Matric Scholarship Scheme (Saral Vidya Sahay) for SC and OBC (V to VIII)" was introduced by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Government of Goa. The scheme aims to support parents of children belonging to Scheduled Castes and Other Backward Classes for the education of their wards.

student.name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - College/Higher/Technical Educational Fees Refund for Transgender Students
student.description: The scheme aims to promote higher and technical education among transgender individuals by providing financial assistance for their educational expenses. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a refund of their school, college, higher, or technical education fees.

student.name: Educational Loan Scheme (GBCDC)
student.description: The scheme provides financial support to students from socially and educationally backward classes for higher technical and professional education. It offers loans at concessional interest rates for approved graduate and postgraduate courses like engineering, medical, MBA, MCA, and more.

student.name: Hands-on Training and Exposure Visits under Experiential Learning
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free one-week residential hands-on certificate training programs to undergraduate, postgraduate students, researchers, and faculty members, including accommodation and meals.

student.name: Training/Capacity Building Programmes/Research work on Remote Sensing and GIS Applications
student.description: The scheme aims to strengthen scientific and technical capacity of researchers, students, and government personnel in the field of Remote Sensing and Geographic Information System (GIS) applications by providing training, conducting capacity-building programmes, and supporting research initiatives.

student.name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste Students
student.description: The scheme aims to support the education of Scheduled Caste students at the pre-matric stage, reduce dropouts, and improve educational participation. Through this scheme, annual academic allowances are provided to eligible Scheduled Caste students studying in Classes IX and X.

student.name: PM-YASASVI: Top Class School Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide premium education to the meritorious students belonging to OBC, EBC, and DNT categories by funding their education from Class 9 onwards till they complete Class 12.

student.name: Residential- Rajiv Gandhi Navodaya Vidyalaya/ Rajiv Gandhi Abhinav Vidyalaya
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free and accessible education for children from Class 6 to 12 by offering free education, accommodation, meals, study materials, sports facilities, and other essential services across all Rajiv Gandhi Navodaya Vidyalaya / Rajiv Gandhi Abhinav Vidyalaya in the state.

student.name: Scheme for Providing Soft Skill Training Courses to Students Studying in State Colleges
student.description: The scheme aims to enhance the soft skills of students studying in state colleges of Uttarakhand by providing training through Mahindra Pride Classroom and the Nandi Foundation.

student.name: Vidyakiranam Scheme-Educational Assistance To Children Of Disabled Parents
student.description: The scheme “Vidyakiranam Scheme-Educational Assistance to Children of Disabled Parents” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

student.name: Education Loan Scheme - Delhi
student.description: "Education Loan Scheme" provides financial assistance to the SC/ST/OBC/PwD students for pursuing professional and technical education in India and abroad, with loan limits of ₹7,50,000/- and ₹15,00,000/- respectively. Delhi residents with an annual family income below ₹5,00,000/- are eligible.

student.name: Top Class Education For Students With Disabilities
student.description: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwDs for Students with Disabilities (SwDs) pursuing studies beyond class 12th admitted in a full-time course in one of the 'notified institutions'.

student.name: Financial Assistance Scheme For Higher Competitive/ Entrance Examination To Scheduled Castes/ Backward Classes Students
student.description: The scheme “Financial Assistance Scheme for Higher Competitive/ Entrance Examination to Scheduled Castes/ Backward Classes Students” was launched by the Department of Welfare of Scheduled Castes & Backward Classes, Government of Haryana.

student.name: Reimbursement of Tuition Fee and Transport Facility to Scheduled Castes Students Studying in Technical Institutions in Haryana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Scheduled Castes students pursuing AICTE-approved technical courses. Under this scheme, eligible students receive tuition fee reimbursement and transport facility benefits.

student.name: Subsidy For Battery Operated Three-Wheelers
student.description: This scheme is introduced by the Climate Change Department, Gujarat, aims to promote the adoption of eco-friendly vehicles by providing a subsidy on the purchase of battery-operated three-wheelers.

student.name: Distance Education Scholarship–Scholarship For Disabled Students Pursuing Degree, PG Courses
student.description: The scheme “Distance Education Scholarship–Scholarship for Disabled Students Pursuing Degree, PG Courses” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Alpasankhyak Protsahan Yojana
student.description: The scheme supports minority community candidates of Uttarakhand by offering financial incentives for competitive exam preparation. Incentives are provided at different stages of success in exams like UPSC, UKPSC (including judicial services), and entrances to IITs & IIMs.

student.name: Marang Gomke Jaipal Singh Munda Overseas Scholarship Scheme
student.description: The "Marang Gomke Jaipal Singh Munda Overseas Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance to deserving Scheduled Tribes, Scheduled Castes, Minorities, and Backward Class students for pursuing postgraduate education in top-ranked universities abroad.

student.name: Post Matric Scholarship Students With Disabilities
student.description: A scholarship scheme by DoEPwD for students with disabilities pursuing a post-matric qualification from UGC/AICTE recognized universities, i.e. students of Class 11th, Class 12th, including Polytechnics, Post-Matriculation Diploma/Certificates and Bachelor’s/Master’s Degree/Diploma in India.

student.name: National Overseas Scholarship For Scheduled Caste Etc. Candidates
student.description: A scholarship scheme by MoSJE for regular, full-time students from Scheduled Castes, Denotified Nomadic and Semi Nomadic Tribes, Landless Agricultural Labourers and Traditional Artisans; to obtain higher education viz., Master degree or Ph.D courses by studying abroad

student.name: National Overseas Scholarship For Students With Disabilities
student.description: A scholarship scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment for regular, full-time students with disabilities to obtain higher education viz., Master's degree, or Ph.D. courses from foreign universities, in one of the specified fields of study.

student.name: PM-YASASVI: Top Class College Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to recognize and promote quality education amongst Students belonging to OBC, EBC and DNT categories by providing full financial support. The Scheme will cover OBC/EBC/DNT students for pursuing studies beyond Class XII.

student.name: Reimbursement of Tution Fee for SC/ST/OBC/Min students in Public Schools in Class I to XII
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support by reimbursing tuition and compulsory fees for SC/ST/OBC students from low-income families (below ₹3,00,000/- per annum) studying in recognized schools in Delhi. Beneficiaries must meet academic and attendance criteria.

student.name: Mahatma Jyothiba Phule Overseas Vidya Nidhi for BC and EBC Students
student.description: The scheme “Mahatma Jyothiba Phule Overseas Vidya Nidhi” was launched by the Backward Classes Welfare Department, Government of Telangana for meritorious students belonging to Backward Classes & Economically Backward Classes to pursue Higher Studies in foreign universities.

student.name: Subsistence and Transport Allowance to Disabled Students for Pursuing Education in Computer and Management
student.description: The scheme was implemented by Higher Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to provide incentives to disabled students. This scheme benefits students pursuing computer/management courses at government colleges, provided their annual parental/guardian income does not exceed ₹1.00 lakh.

student.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Education Loan
student.description: The scheme aims to provide education loans to the students from the community of safai karamcharis\manual scavengers & their dependents for pursuing higher education.

student.name: Educational Assistance (Scheme for the Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarship to Children of Construction Workers Registered with the MBOCWWB)
student.description: The scheme provides scholarships in the form of financial assistance to children of construction workers registered under the Board. These scholarships will be applicable for courses of study specified by the Board from time to time.

student.name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan Yojana: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme
student.description: The scheme provides full interest subsidy during the moratorium period on loan availed under Model Education Loan Scheme of Indian Banks’ Association (IBA) to students belonging to economically weaker sections whose annual parental income is up to ₹4.5 Lakhs from all sources.

student.name: Scholarships for Higher Education for Young Achievers Scheme (SHREYAS)  (OBC & Others)
student.description: The scheme aims to ensure the educational empowerment of OBC and EBC students. Through this scheme, fellowships and interest subsidies on overseas education loans are provided to eligible beneficiaries.

student.name: BC & EBC Girls Residential +2 High School
student.description: The scheme aims to provide quality education and holistic development opportunities for girls from backward and extremely backward classes. Free education, accommodation, study material, medical support, and skill development programs are provided.

student.name: State Talent Search Examination in Mathematics and Science for Tribal Students of Meghalaya at the Close of Upper Primary Stage (Class VIII)
student.description: The scheme “State Talent Search Examination in Mathematics and Science for Tribal Students of Meghalaya at the Close of Upper Primary Stage (Class VIII)” was launched by the Education Department, Government of Meghalaya.

student.name: Pre Matric Scholarship For Scheduled Tribe Students
student.description: A scholarship scheme by Ministry of Tribal Affairs for regular, full time students from Scheduled Tribe studying in Class 9th and 10th, in a Government School or in a School recognized by Govt. or a Central/State Board of Secondary Education.

student.name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC  and DNT Students for studying in India
student.description: "Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC  and DNT Students for studying in India" aims at providing financial assistance to OBC, EWS and DNT students to support their education. The scholarship covers tuition fees, maintenance allowances, and other academic expenses.

student.name: Ambedkar DBT Voucher Scheme
student.description: The scheme aims to support students from SC, ST, OBC, MBC, and EWS categories by providing financial aid for accommodation. The students receive ₹2,000/- per month for up to 10 months per academic year.

student.name: Shahidvir Kinariwaala Student Security Group Insurance Scheme
student.description: The scheme provides financial protection in case of accidental death or permanent disability to students or their guardians/heirs to help reduce the burden during unforeseen tragedies. The scheme covers students at Government and Non-Government Colleges, Gram Vidyapeeth GBTC colleges, etc.

student.name: Education Assistance - Folk Artist
student.description: The "Education Assistance - Folk Artist" scheme was launched by the Art and Culture Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme provides financial assistance for the education of children of registered folk artistes.

student.name: Shiksha Protsaahan Puraskaar yojana
student.description: By the Labour Department of Madhya Pradesh, a scheme (Shiksha Protsahan Puraskar Yojana) was initiated for the financial assistance to the children.

student.name: Scholarship Scheme for Worker's Children- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
student.description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Labour Welfare Board, Labour Department, Government of Haryana. The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to children of workers & workers employed in industrial and commercial institutions of Haryana state to continue their studies.

student.name: Safai Karmakar Ke Bachche Hetu Chhatravrtti Yojana
student.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakar Ke Bachche Hetu Chhatravrtti Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

student.name: Grant of Financial Assistance to the School Going Children of Industrial Workers/Employees Studying in 1st to 4th Standard for Supply of One Set of Uniform
student.description: "Grant of Financial Assistance to the School-going Children of Industrial Workers/Employees Studying in 1st to 4th Standard for Supply of One Set of Uniform" by the Dept of Labour & Employment, Goa, aims to provide financial assistance for the purchase of uniforms to school-going children.

student.name: Revised Education Scheme For Children Of Artisans/Weavers Of Handicrafts And Handloom Departments
student.description: A scholarship scheme by the Industries and Commerce Dept., Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir to provide financial support to the children of Artisans/Weavers of Handicrafts and Handloom Depts. in completion of education. The scholarship shall be provided to a maximum of two children of Weaver/Artisan.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Education- Haryana Silicosis Board
student.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹5,000/- to ₹12,000/- per year is given to the children of workers who are suffering from silicosis as confirmed by the Silicosis Diagnosis Board, Haryana.

student.name: Scholarships to Students Studying in Central Government Institution like IIT, IIM, IIIT, NIT and Central Universities
student.description: The scholarship provides financial assistance to students from Tamil Nadu's BC, MBC, and DNC communities pursuing UG/PG courses at premier Central Government institutions like IITs, IIMs, IIITs, NITs, and Central Universities.

student.name: Stipend Scheme for Grandchildren of Freedom Fighters
student.description: "Stipend Scheme for Grandchildren of Freedom Fighters" aims to honour the third-generation descendants of freedom fighters by providing financial assistance for higher education. Eligible students receive a monthly stipend and an annual allowance for books to support their education.

student.name: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Scholarship
student.description: The scheme aims to provide scholarship support for the education of registered drivers, conductors, and their dependents.

student.name: Grant of Financial Assistance to the Poor Parents Having Only One Girl Child Who is Studying 8th to 10th Standard
student.description: This scheme was introduced to promote small family norms, uplift the welfare of girl children, and ease the financial burden on parents during their daughter's marriage. The scheme provides ₹25,000/- financial assistance for single girl children studying in 8th to 10th standard.

student.name: KALIA Scholarship
student.description: The objective of the scheme is to extend financial assistance to the children of the beneficiaries under KALIA for pursuing Professional/Technical courses in the State of Odisha.

student.name: Mukhya Mantri Shramyogi Prathibhavan Vidyarthi Yojana (HBOCWWB)
student.description: Under this scheme, the Haryana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board provides financial assistance for books, stationery, hostels, and laptops/computers for higher education to the meritorious children of registered construction workers.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Coaching Classes (HBOCWWB)
student.description: The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹20,000/- for coaching classes for admission of children of registered workers in professional/technical courses and ₹1,00,000/- for preparation of Main Examination on passing Preliminary Examination of UPSC/HPSSC.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Purchasing School Uniforms, Books and Notebooks from Class 1st to 12th for Children of Workers- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
student.description: Under this scheme, one-time financial assistance is provided to the children (2 boys & 3 girls) of workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments of the state of Haryana at the time of admission to continue their studies.

student.name: Educational Assistance (ANBOCWWB)
student.description: This scheme provides educational assistance to the son or daughter of a registered construction worker who is studying in any class from Class I to Post Graduate Level/Professional Course.

student.name: Education Assistance/Ph.D Scheme (GBOCWWB)
student.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided once a year to any two children of a construction worker for the career development of bright and needy construction worker students seeking admission in the higher education courses of the state.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Studies (BBOCWWB)
student.description: The scheme is implemented by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Resources Department, Govt. of Bihar. Under this scheme, educational financial support is provided to the children of registered workers who have been members of the Board for at least one year.

student.name: Incentives for Meritorious Children (Students) of Workers (10th and 12th Class) (HBOCWWB)
student.description: Under this scheme, the scholarship (prize money) in the form of fixed deposit will be provided to meritorious children of construction workers who have achieved academic excellence in Class X/XII examination.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Coaching- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
student.description: The objective of the scheme to provide financial assistance up to ₹20,000/- for coaching of entrance examinations for professional courses and ₹1,00,000/- to the children of workers for preparing for the main examination on passing the preliminary examination of UPSC and HPSC.

student.name: Financial Assistance for Professional/Technical Courses (HBOCWWB)
student.description: This scheme is implemented by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department Haryana. Under this scheme, the full educational expenses of the children of registered workers in professional/technical courses are reimbursed by the Board.

student.name: Student Housing Scheme for Students with Disabilities
student.description: Under this scheme, there is a provision to provide free housing facilities to a group of 5 disabled students, to motivate them for higher education, by providing accommodations to them. The accommodations are provided at a rental building.

student.name: Free Bicycle Distribution Scheme
student.description: The "Free Bicycle Distribution Scheme" by the Welfare Department, Government of Jharkhand, aims to provide financial aid for bicycle purchases to Scheduled Caste (SC) students studying in Class 8th. Each student receives ₹3000 through DBT.

student.name: New Generation Innovation Network
student.description: The scheme aims to create an ecosystem that promotes innovation in educational institutions. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided to host institutes and student teams for running incubators and for student projects.

student.name: AICTE SHORT TERM TRAINING PROGRAMME-SFURTI SCHEME
student.description: Short Term Training Programme-SFURTI Program aims to provide financial assistance from AICTE to the institutions for conducting faculty and student trainings to enable faculty members and students in the field of technical education.

student.name: AICTE - Scheme For Promoting Interests, Creativity And Ethics Among Students
student.description: AICTE-SPICES scheme provides financial support to institutions for developing students' clubs for the well-rounded development of students by promoting their interests, creativity, and ethics. This club should serve as a model for other clubs in the institution and also those in other institutions.

student.name: Star College Scheme For Strengthening Of Science Education And Training At Undergraduate Level
student.description: The Dept. of Biotechnology has launched "Star College Scheme for Strengthening of Science Education and Training at Undergraduate Level" for improving critical thinking and 'hands-on' experimental work at the undergraduate (college) level in sciences.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Alpsankhyak Chhatravas Yojana
student.description: Under this scheme, students belonging to minority communities who are studying in a recognized institution, school, college, university, or technical institution in their respective districts and residing in minority hostels are provided a monthly stipend of ₹1,000/-.

student.name: Schemes for welfare of School Children belonging to BPL and BC(A) families: Monthly Stipend for BC-A Students
student.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from Backward Classes (BC-A) families to support their education. Under this scheme, eligible students studying in Classes 1 to 12 in Haryana Government schools receive a monthly stipend.

student.name: Saraswati Vidya Yojana: Free Distribution of Bicycles - DNH&DD
student.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
student.description: “Free Distribution of Bicycles'' under “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”, implemented by the Directorate of Education, U.T. Administration Of DNH & DD, aims to provide bicycles free of cost to all the girl students, studying in class VIII(8) in the Govt. schools.

student.name: Education Loan Scheme under NSFDC- Haryana
student.description: This scheme offers educational loans of up to ₹10 lakhs for studies within India and up to ₹30 lakhs for studies abroad. These loans are available to eligible students pursuing regular full-time recognized courses in India or abroad.

student.name: Madhyamik Drop-out Coaching
student.description: The scheme aims to provide intensive coaching to Madhyamik dropout students and prepare them for the Madhyamik Examination. Through this scheme, coaching, honorarium for teaching staff, and stipends for candidates are provided to Madhyamik failed Scheduled Tribe (ST) students.

student.name: Mukhyamantri Yuva Karya Prashikshan Yojana
student.description: The Mukhyamantri Yuva Karya Prashikshan Yojana scheme was launched by the Department of Skill, Employment, Entrepreneurship and Innovation to enhance candidates' employability through practical training with entrepreneurs with a budget of ₹5,500 crore.

student.name: IT Incubation Centre - Information Technology Development Agency
student.description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship and innovation in the fields of Information Technology, Medical Technology, Electronics, Artificial Intelligence, Biotechnology, and related sectors by providing a supportive ecosystem for startups.

student.name: Artificial Intelligence
student.description: The scheme aims to promote awareness, understanding, and practical learning of Artificial Intelligence among school students from classes 9 to 12 and provide them with opportunities to participate in AI coding camps and hands-on experiments.

student.name: Establishment of Cell for SC/ST
student.description: The project is being implemented by UCOST in collaboration with Department of Science & Technology, Govt. of India to empower Scheduled Caste & Scheduled Tribe communities across Uttarakhand by addressing their fundamental challenges through scientific & technological interventions.

student.name: Uttarakhand@25 Adarsh Champawat
student.description: The scheme aims to develop Champawat district as a model district under the vision of the Honorable Chief Minister, with the broader goal of positioning Uttarakhand as a model state for other Himalayan states.

student.name: CM’s Lairik Heiminnashi Programme (CMLH): Pre-Matric Remedial Coaching
student.description: The scheme aims to provide handholding support in the form of remedial coaching to students studying in government academic institutions or institutions receiving grant-in-aid support from the Government, who belong to minority, OBC or SC communities of the State of Manipur.

student.name: Education Loan Scheme (NSFDC)
student.description: The scheme implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this Scheme, loan is provided for pursuing full-time Professional/Technical courses in recognized institutions as one time assistance.

student.name: Saraswati Vidya Yojana: Reimbursement of Fees for Diploma/Graduation and Post-Graduation Professional Courses - DNH&DD
student.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
student.description: “Reimbursement of Fees for Diploma/ Graduation and Post-Graduation Professional Courses'' under “Saraswati Vidya Yojana”, implemented by the Directorate of Education,  Of DNH & DD, aims to provide financial assistance to girl students pursuing higher education in professional courses.

student.name: Home Nursing Scholarship Scheme
student.description: "Home Nursing Scholarship" is a scholarship scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Government of Goa. Through this scheme, scholarships are provided to the students from Scheduled Castes / Scheduled Tribes / Other Backward Class / Minorities and also to the Students with Disability.

student.name: Indian Community Welfare Fund
student.description: A scheme by Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) for the welfare of Overseas Indians; assisting them in distress situations. ICWF has also been a critical support in emergency evacuation of Indian nationals from conflict zones, countries affected by natural disasters and other challenging situations.

student.name: Sabooj Sathi
student.description: The Sabooj Sathi Scheme is a student welfare initiative launched by the government of West Bengal, India, to provide bicycles to students in the state. Under the scheme, bicycles are distributed free of cost to students studying in government and government-aided schools from classes IX to XII.
tags: Sabooj Sathi Scheme West Bengal Government

student.name: Chhattisgarh Yuva Suchna Kranti Yojana
student.description: The scheme aims to provide free laptops and tablets to eligible students in higher education institutions. The scheme intends to facilitate the use of new technologies among the state's youth, thereby fostering their economic and social development, and enhancing their knowledge and careers.

student.name: Sanction of Laptops - Andhra Pradesh
student.description: The "Sanction of Laptops" scheme aims to distribute laptops to visually challenged, hearing impairments, speech impairments, and orthopedic challenges students pursuing professional courses. The A.P. Differently Abled & Senior Citizens Assistance Corporation proposes to procure 200 laptops.

student.name: Punjabi Language Scholarship Scheme
student.description: This scheme awards scholarships to students based on their merit in the Punjabi subject in the 8th and 10th class examinations conducted by the Haryana Board of School Education, provided they continue studying the Punjabi subject in the 9th and 11th classes.

student.name: Training for Horticulture Skill Development for Self-Employment at Centre of Excellence
student.description: The scheme "Training for Horticulture Skill Development for Self-Employment at Centre of Excellence " is aimed at promoting self-employment opportunities across all communities in Gujarat through practical and theoretical learning at the Centre of Excellence.

farmer.name: Farmer Pension Scheme
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to elderly farmers residing in the state of Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1200/- is provided to farmers who are above 60 years of age, own up to 2 hectares of land, and cultivate their own land.

farmer.name: COP-34 Financial Assistance to Farmer for Interest Subvention (Kishan Credit Card Interest Asst.)
farmer.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance in the form of interest subvention is provided to farmers who repay their crop loans on time, helping them improve their agricultural productivity and economic well-being.

farmer.name: Krishi Yantra
farmer.description: In the Krishi Yantra scheme, the farmer purchases farming-related equipment from an authorized dealer, then the state government gives a subsidy to the farmers.

farmer.name: Rythu Bima Scheme
farmer.description: Rythu Bandhu Farmer Group Life  Insurance Scheme for Farmers” is a life insurance scheme by the Government of Telangana that provides insurance coverage to the nominee of a farmer in case of the farmer’s death. It is free for farmers and is implemented through LIC.

farmer.name: Kharmore Sonchidia Award Scheme
farmer.description: In the scheme "Kharmore Sonchidia Award" by the Forest Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, the farmers are rewarded with ₹5,000/- if a Kharmor bird is sighted in the private land of the farmer and ₹10,000/- if a Golden bird is sighted in the private land of the farmer.

farmer.name: Plastic Mulching
farmer.description: Under the Plastic Mulching scheme, the Rajasthan government provided subsidies to farmers. In this, the soil surface of the field is covered with plastic film. Farmer can also use crop residues for laying mulch.

farmer.name: Mushroom Production
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote and support mushroom cultivation in the state by providing financial assistance and subsidies for establishing mushroom, compost, and spawn production units, thereby enhancing both farmer income and overall mushroom production in Uttarakhand.

farmer.name: Construction of Water Storage Tanks for Drip Irrigation
farmer.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to farmers across Gujarat for constructing water storage tanks to support drip irrigation, with cost-sharing benefits based on farmer category.

farmer.name: Bhausaheb Fundkar Falbag Lagvad Scheme
farmer.description: This scheme includes, Plantation of sixteen perennial horticulture crops. Farmer from Konkan division can avail benefit of 0.10 Hector  to 10.00 Hector  and rest Of Maharashtra 0.20 Hector  to 6.00 Hector

farmer.name: Grishm Kaleen Dhan Ke Badle Dalhan, Tilhan, Makka Fasal ko Protsahan Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme was launched on April 30, 2014,  under the Agriculture Development and Farmer Welfare and Biotechnology Department, Chhattisgarh. The scheme aims to promote the cultivation of pulses, oilseeds, and maize as an alternative to summer rice, helping to conserve groundwater.

farmer.name: Atma Nirbhar Plantation Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote self-reliance in the agriculture sector through sustainable plantation activities across the state. Under this scheme, support in the form of plantation assistance and allied resources is provided to individual farmers, Self-Help Groups & Farmer Producer Organizations.

farmer.name: Kisan Samriddhi Yojana - Chhattisgarh
farmer.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Kisan Samriddhi Yojana" for farmer.

farmer.name: Distribution of Seeds of more productions varieties/ Hybrids varieties Seeds and fertilizer at subsidies etc. to Adivasi farmers in Tribal Area: Agricultural Fair/Exhibition/Farmer Camp Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to improve the agricultural productivity and the livelihood of Adivasi farmers. It provides hybrid seeds, fertilizers, equipment, and support for agricultural fairs.

farmer.name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization (SMAM) for Custom Hiring Centres / Big Farmers - Uttarakhand
farmer.description: Under this scheme, individual large farmers, farmer groups, cooperatives, self-help groups, and custom hiring centres in the state can purchase agricultural equipment at a subsidized rate, with the Government of India providing a maximum subsidy of 40%.

farmer.name: Soil Testing Laboratory
farmer.description: Agriculture and Farmers' Welfare Department launched the "Soil Testing Laboratory" scheme for the farmer on 01 April 2013.

farmer.name: FOCUS Scheme (Farmers Collectivization For Upscaling Production and Marketing System)
farmer.description: The objective of the FOCUS Scheme is to strengthen farmer groups, increase production, and improve market access to enhance farmers’ income.

farmer.name: Kantedar Tarbandi Yojana
farmer.description: A initiative of Rajasthan State for the farmer to protect crops from damage caused by Nilgai and stray animals. Financial assistance will be provided to the farmers by the Rajasthan government for fencing their fields.

farmer.name: Assistance Program for Planting in Floriculture
farmer.description: The scheme offers financial assistance to farmers in Gujarat for the cultivation of floriculture crops, including loose, cut, and tuberous flowers, based on crop type and farmer category.

farmer.name: Mukhyamantri Dairy Plus Programme (Provision of 02 Murrah Buffaloes on Subsidy)
farmer.description: The scheme aims to increase milk production and promote improved livestock breeding by providing two Murrah buffaloes to eligible farmers on a subsidy basis.

farmer.name: Scheme for Assistance on Purchase of Smartphone by the Farmers
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing smartphones, enabling them to access agricultural technology, weather updates, pest control techniques, and government assistance.

farmer.name: Udhyan Card
farmer.description: It aims to create a unified identification system for farmers engaged in horticulture activities, enabling them to access all horticulture-related schemes and benefits provided by the Government of Uttarakhand.

farmer.name: Sub-Mission on Agricultural Mechanization - Uttarakhand
farmer.description: The scheme aims to encourage farm mechanization purchasing and providing 50% subsidy/financial assistance to SC/ST, small and marginal, and women farmers (of all categories), while 40% subsidy/financial assistance is provided to other (large) farmers.

farmer.name: Financial Assistance for Setting up Crab Culture Unit
farmer.description: Through this scheme, financial assistance of 25% of the actual cost, limited to ₹1,50,000 per hectare is provided to eligible fishermen for setting up crab culture unit. Only Fish Farmer/ Individual/ Registered Self Help Group/ Societies, interested in the setting up of the Crab Farming Unit.

farmer.name: Maintenance of Horti Hubs
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to procure good quality disease-free and commercially accepted varieties of the identified flowers and multiply and, to serve as a demonstration cum training ground for those who are interested in Floriculture and who intend to make this as their means of livelihood.

farmer.name: Supply of Agriculture Machineries Scheme
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to distribute and sale of agricultural machinery such as Power Tillers, etc. to farmers at subsidized rates.

farmer.name: Niji Talabon Ka Jirnoddhar Ki Yojana
farmer.description: The government of Bihar launched the "Niji Talabon Ka Jirnoddhar Ki Yojana" scheme aims to enhance the water holding capacity of private ponds to boost fish productivity & production as well as provide benefits to private fish farmers through the expansion/renovation of their ponds.

farmer.name: Distribution of Rhizobium
farmer.description: The “Distribution of Rhizobium” scheme offers a subsidy on the cost of Rhizobium, to farmers raising seed farms with Pulses crops in Tamil Nadu.

farmer.name: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Farmers for Purchasing Sanedo Agricultural Equipment
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing Sanedo (Mini Tractor) equipment, which enhances efficiency and reduces labor dependency in farming operations.

farmer.name: Greenhouse Construction
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote protected cultivation of vegetables and flowers by encouraging farmers to adopt greenhouse technology through substantial financial assistance and support, thereby increasing productivity, improving crop quality, and enhancing farmers’ income.

farmer.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Expansion of Coffee
farmer.description: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Expansion of Coffee" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, aims to facilitate afforestation in the Jhum lands and help settle the tribals on a permanent footing.

farmer.name: Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana
farmer.description: To increase the income of farmers, State government has announced "Namo Shetkari Mahasanman Nidhi Yojana" in which cultivable land holding farmer families of the state will get an additional amount of Rs. 6000/- per year (along with Rs. 6000/- through Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana

farmer.name: Vermicompost Ikai
farmer.description: In the Vermicompost Ikai scheme, provide subsidies to farmers and Organic fertilizer is a systematic pest-nutrition process in which the soil is made fertile by absorbing other organic substances present within the soil.

farmer.name: Farmers Training
farmer.description: The “Farmers Training” scheme provides financial assistance for training sessions involving up to 50 farmers or agricultural laborers per cluster.

farmer.name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Tractor Purchase
farmer.description: The scheme offers a specialized loan for farmers to purchase tractors, covering up to 90% of the tractor's cost.

farmer.name: Krishonnati Yojana - Sub Mission On Seed And Planting Material (SMSP)
farmer.description: The Sub-Mission on Seeds and Planting Material (SMSP) aims to increase the production of certified / quality seed, increase SRR, upgrade the quality of farm-saved seeds, strengthen the seed multiplication chain, promote new technologies and methodologies in seed production, processing, testing, etc.

farmer.name: Diggy
farmer.description: Rajasthan Government has started the Diggy Scheme for the welfare of farmers, under which farmers will be provided grants for making dig for irrigation of crops. This scheme is to help farmers improve their farming by using more water resources and encourage them to grow good crops.

farmer.name: Green House
farmer.description: Under the Green House Scheme Farmers can get the benefit of subsidy on green house and earn more income by cultivating horticultural crops like vegetables, flowers, fruits etc. by controlling the ago-climatic factors, temperature, humidity and sunlight.

farmer.name: Kisan Kaleva Yojana
farmer.description: Under the Kisan Kaleva Scheme run by the Rajasthan Government, food is provided at concessional rates through coupons to the farmers and their assistants who come to sell crops in the vegetable market premises.

farmer.name: Plastic Tunnel (Lo-Tunnel)
farmer.description: Plastic tunnels (low tunnels) provide benefits to farmers. These are protected structures created by covering each crop bed with a low-lying plastic sheet after the crops have been planted in the main field.

farmer.name: Atal Kisan Jyoti Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide affordable electricity to farmers in Madhya Pradesh by offering power supply at concessional rates.

farmer.name: One Tea Scheme
farmer.description: The objective of the One Tea Scheme is to ensure a minimum guaranteed price for fresh tea leaves to protect tea farmers from financial losses and provide economic stability. It also aims to support bought-leaf factories and promote sustainable tea cultivation in Meghalaya.

farmer.name: Promotion of Exportable surplus of identified spices in NE: Cultivation of NE ginger (Ha)
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to promote the cultivation of ginger in the North Eastern region by supporting farmers with financial assistance for quality planting material, enhancing productivity and quality, and increasing the exportable surplus of spices from the region.

farmer.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Sahkarita Kisan Kalyan Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide interest-free loans to farmers and self-help groups for agricultural and non-agricultural activities to promote self-employment and strengthen the rural economy.

farmer.name: Mukhya mantri Krishak Udyami Yojana
farmer.description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to the sons and daughters of farmers to establish their businesses. the government of Madhya Pradesh provided loans to the bank for all citizens of the state.

farmer.name: Organic Manure Scheme
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide hands on training at the village level on production of organic compost inputs such as compost for plant health management for sustainable agriculture.

farmer.name: Ved-Vyas Housing Construction Scheme
farmer.description: The "Ved Vyas Housing Construction Scheme" provides financial assistance to active and traditional fish farmers in Simdega district for building houses. The scheme prioritizes individuals particularly those living in kutcha or thatched houses.

farmer.name: National Mission on Edible Oil- Oil Palm: Nursery
farmer.description: The scheme component "Nursery" launched under the "National Mission on Edible Oil–Oil Palm" scheme aims to increase the production of oil palm in the state and reduce dependence on imports through providing subsidy assistance for setting up nurseries for farmers.

farmer.name: Development of Manures & Fertilizers: Assistance for Construction/Installation of Vermi-Compost Units
farmer.description: The "Vermi-compost Units" component of the scheme aims to convert available on-field and farm waste material into chemical-free farm resources as farm input for organic farming through vermicomposting processes. The payment of the sanctioned subsidy is through Electronic Clearance System (ECS).

farmer.name: Mukhyamantri Sudharit Kamdhenu Scheme
farmer.description: The scheme aims to help the farmers to get financial assistance for the purchase of cross bred cows, improved she buffaloes and cows of indigenous breeds namely Sahiwal, Gir, Red Sindhi, Rathi and Tharparkar for their Dairy Unit, to promote self employment in the Dairy Sector.

farmer.name: Rashtriya Krishi Vigyan Puraskar
farmer.description: The Rashtriya Krishi Vigyan Puraskar (RKVP) aims to honor scientists and technical experts for outstanding contributions and innovations in agriculture and allied sciences.

farmer.name: Animal Husbandry: Assistance to Small and Marginal Farmers
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to small and marginal farmers for the replacement of productive livestock lost due to notified natural disasters such as floods, landslides, or other calamities.

farmer.name: Assistance to General Farmers for Sinking Tubewell
farmer.description: “Assistance to General Farmers for Sinking Tubewell" was launched by the Dept of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, UT of Puducherry. Through this scheme, the farmers from the General Category are provided with a grant of 65% subsidy towards the construction of tubewell/filter point per individual.

farmer.name: Rajiv Gandhi Krishak Sathi Sahayta Yojana
farmer.description: The Rajiv Gandhi Krishak Sathi Sahayta Yojana offers financial support to farmers, farmworkers, and market laborers who are accidentally injured or killed while working in agriculture or at agricultural markets.

farmer.name: Fodder Minikits under Integrated Fodder Development Scheme (General Category)
farmer.description: The scheme “Fodder Minikits under Integrated Fodder Development Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Government of Gujarat to provide an improved variety of fodder seeds to beneficiaries for widespread publicity, demonstration, and adaptation by farmers.

farmer.name: Training to Farmers
farmer.description: The scheme “Training to Farmers” provides training to maize farmers across various districts, aiming to enhance farming practices and increase productivity.

farmer.name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: Jewel Loans
farmer.description: The scheme offers jewel loans to farmers, enabling them to access up to ₹2,00,000/- at an interest rate of 11.5% for agricultural purposes.

farmer.name: Scheme of Providing Assistance to Encourage Farmers for Adoption of Organic Farming
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat. It aims to promote organic farming by providing financial assistance to farmers for certification, input subsidies, and residue testing.

farmer.name: Meghalaya Piggery Development Scheme
farmer.description: The Meghalaya Piggery Development Scheme is a component of the Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program launched by the Government of Meghalaya. It aims to employ, engage, and empower youth and rural communities by promoting piggery entrepreneurship through easy access to credit and subsidies.

farmer.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Quality Upgradation / Certification: Supply of Baby Pulpers
farmer.description: The scheme "Supply of Baby Pulpers" aims to facilitate the improvement of the quality of coffee produced by growers by encouraging them to establish infrastructure for quality enhancement and obtain certification for their coffees, enabling them to earn better returns.

farmer.name: Aushadhi Avam Sugandhit Fasal Shetra Vistar
farmer.description: Under the Scheme To increase production and productivity by expanding the area of ​​quality, high-yielding, short-duration medicinal and aromatic species.

farmer.name: Integrated Horticultural Development Program Through Diversification of Agriculture
farmer.description: Through this scheme, the farmers are provided subsidies through DBT mode for Organic Manures for Coconut Palms, Tools and Implements for Agricultural Purposes, Mud Pots or Cement Pots, Plant Protection Chemicals, Motor Pumpset for Irrigation Purposes, Biogas Unit, Planting Materials, etc.

farmer.name: Pipes Carrying Water From Source To Field
farmer.description: The scheme provides subsidies to farmers for installing pipes to carry water from the source to their fields, offering a 50% subsidy or up to ₹15,000/- for pipes (up to 800m), including PVC, HDPE, and others.

farmer.name: Mukhyamantri Krishak Mitra Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to create necessary infrastructure by the distribution company for providing permanent pump connections to farmers or groups of farmers.

farmer.name: Meghalaya Dairy Development Scheme
farmer.description: The Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program includes Meghalaya Dairy Development Scheme under the Planning Dept, Govt of Meghalaya. The scheme aims to employ, engage, and empower the youth and rural communities by promoting Dairy related entrepreneurship through easy access to credit and subsidies.

farmer.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Quality Upgradation / Certification: Drying Yards
farmer.description: The scheme "Quality Upgradation / Certification: Drying Yards" aims to facilitate the improvement of the quality of coffee produced by growers by encouraging them to establish infrastructure for quality enhancement and obtain certification for their coffees, enabling them to earn better returns.

farmer.name: Assistance to General Farmers for Installation of Submersible / Centrifugal Motor Pumpsets With Accessories
farmer.description: Through this scheme, the farmers from the General Category are provided with a grant of 65% subsidy towards the installation of suitable Submersible / Centrifugal motor pump sets with accessories, subject to a maximum of ₹50,000/‐ per tubewell per individual.

farmer.name: Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna
farmer.description: Under the Kam Lagat Pyaaj Bhandaran Sanrachna yojana Construction of warehouses should be done at a high level to prevent moisture and dampness which occur due to direct contact of onions with soil.

farmer.name: Naye Fal Bagicho Ki Sthapana
farmer.description: Under the "Naye Fal Bagecho Ki Sthapana" subsidies to Increase farmers' income by facilitating the cultivation of high-value fruit crops that have a potentially higher market demand and profitability compared to traditional crops.

farmer.name: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandi shramik kalyaan yojana
farmer.description: The Agriculture Department of Rajasthan runs the Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandi Shramik Kalyan Yojana, a program that offers a range of assistance programs to improve the well-being of mandi laborers.

farmer.name: Bhraman - Darshan Yojana
farmer.description: The "Bhraman-Darshan Yojana" was launched by the Animal and Fisheries Resources Department, Government of Bihar aims to educate fish farmers in Bihar about the latest fisheries techniques through organized excursions, enabling them to adopt and implement these technologies in their water source.....

farmer.name: Distribution of Minikits At Free of Cost
farmer.description: The "Distribution of Minikits at Free of Cost" scheme provides subsidies for minikits to maize-growing farmers in some of the selected districts of Tamil Nadu.

farmer.name: Mukhyamantri Nijee Nalkup Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to support farmers in ensuring water availability through borewell construction and motor pump installation.

farmer.name: Meghalaya Agriculture Warehouse Scheme
farmer.description: The scheme reduces post-harvest losses and supports farmers by providing loans and subsidies to build small, weatherproof warehouses for safe storage and better marketing of crops.

farmer.name: Assistance to Farmers in Purchasing Nano Fertilizers Under the Agricultural Assistance Program for Farmers Other than Scheduled Castes and Scheduled Tribes
farmer.description: This scheme offers financial assistance to farmers from non-SC/ST categories to support the purchase of Nano Fertilizers, aiming to enhance agricultural productivity and uplift the standard of living of farmers in Gujarat.

farmer.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation
farmer.description: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Water Augmentation" aims to improve the productivity and quality of coffee by facilitating the creation of infrastructure for water augmentation for irrigation and wet processing of coffee.

farmer.name: Integrated Scheme for Export Promotion & Quality Improvement in Spices and Research and Development of Cardamom: Export Oriented Production:Large Cardamom Replanting/New planting (Ha)
farmer.description: Under this scheme, growers are encouraged to adopt systematic replanting of large cardamom using high-yielding, disease-free planting materials. It aims to increase productivity, improve quality, and enhance export competitiveness under the Spices Board of India.

farmer.name: Semi-Commercial Duck Farming
farmer.description: The scheme “Semi-Commercial Duck Farming” started under the State Sector Scheme "Encouragement of Commercial Poultry Entrepreneur and Promotion of Backyard Poultry Production" to support small entrepreneurs in setting up Duck farms with a capacity of 1000 ducks.

farmer.name: Development and Maintenance of Orchard Cum Horti Nurseries
farmer.description: The scheme has been launched for the production and multiplication of good, high-yielding, diseased free planting materials in the Government farms for distribution to farmers through the District Horticulture Officer.

farmer.name: "Protected Cultivation" Component of "Establishment of New Gardens (Area Expansion)" Scheme
farmer.description: Through this scheme, the farmers are provided Poly House, Shade Net House (Tubular Structure), Plastic Mulching at subsidised rates for practising Protected Cultivation. In Puducherry, this scheme is implemented by the Department of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, Union Territory of Puducherry.

farmer.name: Distribution of Vegetable Seeds Minikit & Fruits Minikit at Free of Cost
farmer.description: “Distribution of Vegetable Seeds Minikit & Fruits Minikit at Free of Cost" was launched by the Dept of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, UT of Puducherry. All the horticulture growers of rural & urban areas are provided with vegetable seeds minikit & fruits minikit worth ₹250/‐ free of cost.

farmer.name: State Rice Mission Scheme
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to increase productivity and production of rice through improved technologies and extension methods and, to supply the quality/certified seeds/organic fertilizers at 50% subsidy.

farmer.name: Distribution of Soil Health Card
farmer.description: Under the “Distribution of Soil Health Card” scheme, Soil health cards will be distributed to all the farmers who have offered the soil sample for testing by paying a prescribed fee of ₹5/- each for Macro and Micronutrient testing.

farmer.name: Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties
farmer.description: The "Scheme of Production of Domestic Indigenous Certified Seed of Cotton Varieties"  introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, aims to promote the cultivation and production of local cotton seed varieties across Gujarat.

farmer.name: Seed Grant
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide seeds to farmers at a concessional rate during Kisan Melas with a subsidy of up to 15%.

farmer.name: Development of Manures & Fertilizers: Assistance for Construction/Installation of Biogas Plants
farmer.description: The scheme aims to effectively manage on-farm livestock waste to produce renewable energy through biogas units, converting animal waste into a sustainable energy source. The payment of the sanctioned subsidy is through the Electronic Clearance System (ECS).

farmer.name: Development of Manures & Fertilizers: Assistance for use of Micronutrients
farmer.description: The scheme “Development of Manures & Fertilizers" was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Government of Goa. The "Assistance for use of Micronutrients" component of the scheme aims to address micronutrient deficiencies in the soil that affect crop productivity and ensure healthy crop growth.

farmer.name: Infrastructure Development Scheme for Dairy Co-operatives
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Dairy Co-operative Societies for their development, smooth functioning of business, and other allied activities, enabling them to become stable and create better infrastructure. The scheme provides financial support in the form of grant or subsidy.

farmer.name: Balram Talab Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to conserve rainwater in fields to help farmers, ensuring water availability during irrigation and drought conditions. Farmers receive subsidies up to ₹1,00,000/- for pond construction.

farmer.name: Aromatic Plants Cultivation - Centre for Aromatic Plants
farmer.description: The scheme aims to encourage farmers to grow aromatic plants by providing them with free seeds, planting materials, and technical support, helping them increase their income and promote aromatic farming in Uttarakhand.

farmer.name: Mukhyamantri Ekeekrit Bagwani Vikas Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote horticulture development in Uttarakhand by providing farmers with subsidized fruit plants, seeds, pesticides, & horticulture infrastructure such as Cool Houses & Refrigerator Vans, thereby increasing productivity, reducing post-harvest losses, & enhancing farmers’ income.

farmer.name: Payment Related to Wheat Procurement
farmer.description: The scheme aims to ensure timely online payment to farmers for wheat sold at government procurement centers through the Just-In-Time (JIT) system directly into their bank accounts.

farmer.name: Meghalaya Poultry Farming Scheme
farmer.description: The Meghalaya Poultry Farming Scheme is a component under the Chief Minister’s CM-ELEVATE Program launched  by the Government of Meghalaya. It aims to employ, engage, and empower the youth and rural communities by  promoting poultry entrepreneurship through easy access to credit and subsidies.

farmer.name: Trainning Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless farm labour at Centre of Excelence of Department
farmer.description: The "Training Scheme for Horticulture Skill Development to Landless Farm Labour at Centre of Excellence of Department" aims to provide skill development training in horticulture to landless farm labourers through the Centres of Excellence.

farmer.name: Anti Bird Net
farmer.description: Under the Anti Bird Net Birds will never leave your garden if they are used to pecking on certain trees and plants, but if you install anti-bird nets at the appropriate places, you can prevent them from coming again to peck your plants.

farmer.name: Compensation for Crop Damage Caused by Wildlife (in Revenue and Forest Villages)
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide timely financial assistance to farmers for crop damage caused by wildlife, assessed and compensated within 30 working days as per revenue book circular guidelines.

farmer.name: Registration for Crop Procurement
farmer.description: The scheme aims to ensure fair crop prices for farmers by facilitating government procurement and provides easy online registration for landholding farmers to sell their crops at minimum support price.

farmer.name: Grant Scheme for Cultivation of Aromatic Plants - Centre for Aromatic Plants
farmer.description: The scheme aims to encourage farmers to adopt the cultivation of commercially valuable aromatic crops such as lemongrass, citronella, palmarosa, khus, damask rose, mint (except Japanese mint), geranium, black cumin, rosemary, bay leaf, timur & sandalwood by providing financial assistance to them.

farmer.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojna (PMFBY)
farmer.description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana was launched in  2016 with the aim to support farmers by providing an affordable comprehensive risk cover for crops.

farmer.name: Sardar Patel Agriculture Research Award
farmer.description: The scheme “Sardar Patel Agriculture Research Award” was launched by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat on 30.10.1995.

farmer.name: Development of Strawberry Cultivation
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide farmers with quality and improved varieties of strawberry planting materials so as to encourage area expansion under this crop such that commercialization horticulture under this crop is achieved.

farmer.name: Assistance for Installation of Sprinkler / Drip Micro Irrigation Systems
farmer.description: Through this scheme, the Marginal Farmers, Small farmers, Scheduled Caste/ Schedule Tribe Farmers, Women Farmers, Big Farmers and Institutions are provided with a subsidy on the total cost or ₹ 25,000/‐ per hectare whichever is less for the installation of Sprinkler / Drip Micro Irrigation Systems.

farmer.name: "Subsidy for Cultivation of Fodder Crops" Component of the "Crop Production Technology" Scheme
farmer.description: The "Subsidy for Cultivation of Fodder Crops" scheme was introduced by the Department of Agriculture and Farmer's Welfare, Union Territory of Puducherry. Through this scheme, cash incentives are distributed to Farmers and Self Help Groups for undertaking fodder cultivation in the Puducherry region.

farmer.name: Production Incentive / Back-Ended Subsidy for Cultivation of Horticulture Crops
farmer.description: Through this scheme, the farmers who possess farmer's identity cards / authenticated land records/documents are provided with One-Time Assistance/ Bi‐Annual Assistance/ Annual Assistance for the Cultivation of Horticulture Crops such as Mango, Guava, and Sapota.

farmer.name: Drip Sanyantr
farmer.description: Under the Drip Sanyantr scheme, the government gives subsidies to farmers. There is an immense saving of water in this method. Under this method, water is applied drop by drop to the roots of the plants and wastage of water will negligible.

farmer.name: Khet Talai
