farmer.name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Support to Small Growers' Collectives/ SHGs/ Cooperatives for Coffee Marketing
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to extend support to small and tiny growers, incentivizing them to form collectives/ Self Help Groups/ Cooperatives, thus encouraging them to take up marketing of coffee produced on a community-based approach through suitable financial incentives.

farmer.name: Chief Minister’s Agriculture Mechanisation Programme
farmer.description: The scheme “Chief Minister’s Agriculture Mechanisation Programme” was started by the government of Arunachal Pradesh to promote mechanization & hiring services for various agriculture Machinery/ Implements of post-harvest technology (PHY) equipment applied for different operations.

farmer.name: Distribution of Certified Seeds of Maize
farmer.description: The "Distribution of Certified Seeds of Maize" scheme by the Agriculture-Farmers Welfare Department, Tamil Nadu offers a subsidy to maize-growing farmers in specific districts of the state, providing financial assistance for purchasing certified maize seeds.

farmer.name: Tea Development and Promotion Scheme (TDPS): Plantation Development for Small Tea Growers (PDSTG): Mechanization for Individual Small Growers
farmer.description: The objective of this component is to increase the production, productivity and quality of tea, overall development of small tea growers to help them move up in the value chain, sustainability of production by promoting organic tea cultivation& climate resilient tea and to make them self-reliant.

farmer.name: Financial Support Scheme for Farm Mechanization (FSSM)
farmer.description: "Financial Support Scheme for Farm Mechanization (FSSM)" by the Agriculture Department, Government of West Bengal aims to provide financial support as subsidy to the small and marginal farmers of the State for purchase of power operated farm equipment/ machinery.

farmer.name: Akhil Bhartiya Kisan Mela and Krishi Udyog Pradarshani
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide a platform for farmers, agri-entrepreneurs, and stakeholders to access, learn about, and showcase the latest agricultural innovations, technologies, and practices.

farmer.name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Eco-certification of Coffee
farmer.description: The objective of this scheme is to enable coffee growers to access high-value specialty markets and earn better returns by producing eco-certified coffee that meets established environmental and quality standards, ensuring transparency about the conditions under which the coffee is produced.

farmer.name: Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana
farmer.description: The "Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana" aims to promote fisheries by constructing ponds and setting up related supporting units in plateau-dominated districts. The initiative is designed to create new employment opportunities and provide a means of livelihood for farmers.

farmer.name: Farmers Interest Group (FIG)
farmer.description: The “Farmers Interest Group (FIG)” scheme supports every group of 15 farmers with grants for agricultural development. The scheme offers assistance for office equipment, training, ID cards, and district-level meetings.

farmer.name: Incentive Assistance to Scheduled Tribe Farmers to Increase the Area, Production and Productivity of Sugarcane Farming
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to ST farmers to increase sugarcane production and productivity through quality seeds, modern farming practices, and agricultural mechanization.

farmer.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha Evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan Yojana (PM-KUSUM) - Uttarakhand
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote clean and affordable irrigation by replacing diesel pump sets with solar-powered pump sets, reducing farmers’ irrigation costs, enhancing energy security, and increasing farmers’ income through sustainable and efficient use of solar energy.

farmer.name: Construction of NABARD-Funded Minor Irrigation Projects - Uttarakhand
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide farmers with free and reliable irrigation facilities by constructing NABARD-funded minor irrigation projects, so that water availability improves and farming becomes easier and more productive.

farmer.name: Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Support for Group Nurseries
farmer.description: The scheme "Coffee Development Programme in North Eastern Region: Support for Group Nurseries" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, Ministry of Commerce and Industry, aims to provide growers with high-quality coffee seedlings to ensure the proper establishment of plantations.

farmer.name: Sagar Khedu Sarvangi Vikas Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to improve power infrastructure in coastal taluks by addressing corrosion issues, ensuring adequate voltage, and continuous electricity supply. Benefits include reduction in motor burnout, prevention of industrial losses, and providing new agricultural electricity connections.

farmer.name: Karmaveer Padmashri Dadasaheb Gaikwad Birth Centenary And Prize Distribution
farmer.description: The "Karmaveer Padmashri Dadasaheb Gaikwad Birth Centenary and Prize Distribution" is an award by the Govt. of Maharashtra. The award is given to individuals and organizations working for the social movement against traditional customs and untouchability and for landless farm workers.

farmer.name: Agricultural Marketing Infrastructure
farmer.description: The revitalized and farmers’ income enhancing centric sub-scheme Agricultural Marketing Infrastructure (AMI) of Integrated Scheme for Agricultural Marketing (ISAM) is meant for holistic development of agricultural value chain critically focusing each linkage of post-harvest value chain.

farmer.name: Chief Minister’s Krishi Samuh Yojana
farmer.description: The Govt. of Arunachal Pradesh started the scheme “Chief Minister’s Krishi Samuh Yojana (CMKSY)” to empower the farmers through a cooperative approach by Institutionalisation of Farmers’ Producers’ Organisation and infusing timely support of good agriculture practices and marketing interventions.

farmer.name: Kishan Kalpvriksh Yojana (Scheme for Assistance to APMCs to Provide Basic and Modern Facilities) (General)
farmer.description: The scheme "Kishan Kalpvriksh Yojana (Scheme for Assistance to APMCs to Provide Basic and Modern Facilities) (General)" aims to improve agricultural market infrastructure by providing financial assistance to Agricultural Produce Market Committees (APMCs) for developing modern facilities.

farmer.name: Jharkhand Krishi Rin Mafi Yojana
farmer.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide relief from the debt burden to short-term agricultural loan holders in the state. Under this scheme, outstanding loan amounts of up to ₹50,000/- in standard crop loan outstanding accounts as of 31st March 2020, will be waived.

farmer.name: Package for strengthening to sugar co-operatives as may be policy decided by the State Government
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to support sugar co-operatives by providing financial assistance for modernization, diversification, organic fertilizer production to enhance sugarcane farming and the sugar industry.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals engaged in inland fisheries.

farmer.name: Incentive Assistance to Scheduled Caste Farmers to Increase the Area, Production and Productivity of Sugarcane Farming
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to SC farmers to increase sugarcane production and productivity through quality seeds, modern farming practices, and agricultural mechanization.

farmer.name: Atma Nirbhar Pashu Palan Yojana
farmer.description: The scheme aims to enhance rural livelihoods, promote sustainable animal husbandry practices, & contribute to self-reliance in livestock sector. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to unemployed individuals, SHGs, cooperative societies, etc. for livestock rearing & allied activities.

farmer.name: Construction of Solar Pump-Based Lift Irrigation Projects (For Hilly Areas)
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide free and reliable irrigation facilities to farmers in hilly areas by constructing solar-powered lift irrigation projects on high-altitude agricultural lands where conventional canal or pipeline irrigation is not feasible.

farmer.name: Uttarakhand State Science & Technology Congress (USSTC)
farmer.description: The Science & Technology Congress aims to foster scientific talent and encourage emerging scientists and researchers in the state. The congress is organized annually by UCOST and attracts significant participation from young researchers and scientists.

farmer.name: Construction of Artesian Wells in Scheduled Tribe Areas
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide free irrigation facilities to farmers in Scheduled Tribe-dominated areas through the construction of artesian wells, thereby enhancing agricultural productivity. It is a 100% state government-funded scheme.

farmer.name: Integrated Fisheries Scheme
farmer.description: The "Integrated Fisheries Scheme" by the Fisheries Division, Government of Jharkhand, aims to promote fish-duck farming and increase fish farmers' income. The scheme provides financial assistance of up to 80% for eligible SC/ST/women beneficiaries and 70% for others.

farmer.name: Pandit Deen Dayal Upadhyay Vigyaan Gram Sankul Pariyojana
farmer.description: The project aims to promote sustainable rural development through the application of science & technology to enhance livelihoods in selected villages throughout Uttarakhand. Under the project, rural development initiatives are implemented through the formation of village clusters across the state.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Boat Net Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to assist boat nets, which are provided to Scheduled Caste (SC) fishermen and fish farmers, to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and providing employment to SC individuals involved in inland fisheries.

farmer.name: Breed Multiplication Farms - Uttarakhand Livestock Development Board
farmer.description: The scheme aims to facilitate the establishment of Breed Multiplication Farms (BMFs) for making available High Genetic Merit heifers of cattle and buffaloes breeds to farmers.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Prawn Seed Stocking Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and to provide employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals involved in inland fisheries activities.

farmer.name: Interest Subvention against long terms loan to the Co-operative sugar societies (Normal Area) (Tribal Area)
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide interest subvention on long-term loans taken by sugar cooperative societies for payment of sugarcane arrears for the year 2018-19.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Scheme For Fish Sale Equipment - Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to increase fish production and provide employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) individuals engaged in inland fisheries. Through this scheme, financial assistance is provided for purchasing fish sale equipment to SC fish farmers and fishermen.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Fish Seed Stocking - Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to Schedule Caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Fish Collection Cum Patrolling Boat Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and provide employment to Scheduled Caste people involved in inland fisheries activities.

farmer.name: To Increase Fish Seed Production and Inland Fisheries Equipment in Tribal Areas
farmer.description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to enhance fish production and provide employment opportunities to Scheduled Tribes (ST) individuals engaged in inland fisheries.

farmer.name: Assistance to Scheduled Castes for Fisheries: Fish seed rearing - Gujarat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to increase fish production by rearing fish in reservoirs and providing employment to Scheduled Caste (SC) people involved in inland fisheries activities.

farmer.name: Uttarakhand@25 Adarsh Champawat
farmer.description: The scheme aims to develop Champawat district as a model district under the vision of the Honorable Chief Minister, with the broader goal of positioning Uttarakhand as a model state for other Himalayan states.

farmer.name: Construction of Minor Irrigation Projects for Scheduled Caste Beneficiaries
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide Scheduled Caste farmers with free and adequate irrigation by constructing small irrigation projects such as water tanks and pipelines in Scheduled Caste-dominated areas, thereby helping them improve their farming.

farmer.name: Construction of Minor Irrigation Projects for Scheduled Tribe Beneficiaries
farmer.description: The scheme aims to provide Scheduled Tribe farmers with free and adequate irrigation by constructing small irrigation projects such as water tanks and pipelines in Scheduled Tribe-dominated areas, thereby helping them improve their farming.

farmer.name: Post-Harvest Management
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote the development of modern post-harvest infrastructure by supporting farmers & entrepreneurs in setting up facilities such as pack houses, pre-cooling units, cold rooms, cold storage units, etc., thereby reducing post-harvest losses & marketability of horticultural produce.

farmer.name: Paddy Transplantor Machine se Dhan Ropayee par Anudan
farmer.description: The scheme aims to promote mechanized paddy transplantation under the Agriculture Development and Farmer Welfare and Biotechnology Department, Chhattisgarh. It provides ₹3,000 per acre for land preparation, including ploughing and weeding, up to 2 hectares.

farmer.name: Chief Minister Sustainable Agriculture Irrigation Scheme - Magel Tyala Shettale (Individual Farm Pond)
farmer.short_title: CHIEF MINISTER SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE IRRIGATION SCHEME
farmer.description: Under this scheme subsidy payable to individual farmer is minimum Rs.14433/- and maximum Rs.75000/- depending on the size of the farm pond.

farmer.name: PMMSY: Establishment of small RAS /Biofloc culture system - Haryana
farmer.description: The scheme provides capital assistance for setting up small-scale Recirculatory Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and Biofloc culture systems to promote high-yield, sustainable fish farming.

farmer.name: Distribution of Horticulture Kit to Urban and Rural Areas
farmer.description: Through this scheme, all the horticulture growers in rural & urban areas are provided with a horticulture kit worth ₹ 3,000 per kit to urban and rural areas, during Aadipattam/Thaipattam, through the Additional Director of Agriculture (Horticulture).

elderly.name: Financial Assistance to Destitute Elderly and Disabled Person
elderly.description: The scheme "Financial Assistance to Destitute Elderly and Disabled Person" provides monthly financial aid to elderly individuals (60+) and severely disabled persons who meet specific income and dependency criteria.

elderly.name: Scheme to Provide Monthly Financial Assistance to Elderly and Eligible Writers
elderly.description: The scheme aims to support senior writers facing financial hardship by offering monthly assistance to those who have made notable contributions to Gujarati or associated language literature.

elderly.name: Pension Scheme for Elderly, Destitute Artists, Litterateurs and Writers of Uttarakhand State
elderly.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to elderly and impoverished artists, litterateurs and writers who have dedicated their lives to the development of art, culture, and literature and have made significant and distinguished contributions.

elderly.name: Welfare Services for Other Socially Disabled Persons (Senior Citizens & Destitute)
elderly.description: The scheme aims to provide care, protection, and financial assistance to elderly persons and socially disadvantaged individuals lacking family or financial support.

elderly.name: State Government-Run Old Age and Infirm Homes
elderly.description: Under this scheme, free residential, food, clothing, and healthcare are provided to destitute elderly individuals above 60 years in state-run residential facilities.

elderly.name: Old Age Pension - Chandigarh
elderly.description: The Old Age Pension scheme aims to provide financial assistance and support to elderly citizens who have reached a certain age and require regular income for their sustenance.

elderly.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme- Chhattisgarh
elderly.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to elderly people aged 60 years and above living Below the Poverty Line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.

elderly.name: Chief Minister Small and Marginal Farmers Older Pension Scheme
elderly.description: The "Chief Minister Small and Marginal Farmers Older Pension Scheme" by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Rajasthan, aims to provide financial assistance to elderly small and marginal farmers.

elderly.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme- Bihar
elderly.description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension is provided to elderly people (women/men) aged 60 years or above belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) families to support them financially. This scheme is centrally sponsored.

elderly.name: Old-Age Pension Scheme
elderly.description: The Himachal Pradesh government offers an Old Age pension scheme to support elderly citizens who have no means of livelihood. The scheme offers financial assistance to eligible citizens based on their age and income level.

elderly.name: Sarvajan Pension Yojana
elderly.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of per month to elderly individuals, widows, destitute women, differently-abled persons, primitive tribes, and HIV/AIDS patients. The scheme eliminates previous age restrictions and targets inclusivity by guaranteeing pensions to all eligible.

elderly.name: State Senior Citizens Home
elderly.description: The Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Mizoram launched the State Senior Citizens Home for the homeless aged persons. It provides shelter and facilities to homeless elderly individuals aged 60 and above, who lack family support.

elderly.name: Scheduled Tribe Relief Scheme
elderly.description: Launched on 31st March 2017, the "Scheduled Tribe Relief Scheme" by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides immediate support for destitute tribal brides and assistance to disabled, elderly, blind, and impoverished individuals.

elderly.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)
elderly.description: The scheme "Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension" is a social welfare scheme by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra. In this scheme, ₹600 per month is provided to elderly individuals aged 65 years and above from BPL families.

elderly.name: Madhu Babu Pension Yojana
elderly.description: "Madhu Babu Pension Yojana" under the Social Security and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Department, Government Of Odisha is a social welfare scheme designed to provide financial assistance to elderly citizens, widows, and disabled persons who are economically weaker.

elderly.name: Mukhyamantri Baristha Bunakar and Karigara Sahayata Yojana
elderly.description: Mukhyamantri Baristha Bunakar and Karigara Sahayata Yojana is a welfare scheme initiated by the Handlooms, Textiles and Handicrafts Department, Government of Odisha to provide financial assistance to elderly individuals involved in weaving and craft work, who may face economic difficulties.

elderly.name: Mukhyamantri Kalakar Sahayata Yojana
elderly.description: Mukhyamantri Kalakar Sahayata Yojana is a scheme under the Odia Language, Literature & Culture Department, Government of Odisha aims to offer sustenance and assistance to elderly artists who, despite facing financial hardship, have consistently devoted themselves to enriching culture of the state.

elderly.name: Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter
elderly.description: The "Kashyapa Scheme for Food & Shelter" aims to help poor, orphan children, differently-abled individuals, widows, destitute women separated from their husbands, and elderly Brahmins with financial assistance for meeting their food and shelter expenses. This scheme covers 13 districts of the state.

elderly.name: PM-Special Training of Geriatric Caregivers
elderly.description: The scheme aims to train and create a professional cadre of geriatric caregivers to meet the increasing demand for specialized care for senior citizens. It offers skill development and certification in geriatric care job roles to Indian citizens, ensuring professional services for the elderly.

elderly.name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme - Sikkim
elderly.description: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)” was started by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim in 2014. Under this scheme, a pension is provided to elderly citizens above the age of 60 years belonging to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

elderly.name: Farmer Pension Scheme
elderly.description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to elderly farmers residing in the state of Uttarakhand. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1200/- is provided to farmers who are above 60 years of age, own up to 2 hectares of land, and cultivate their own land.

elderly.name: Mukhyamantri Vridhjan Pension Yojna
elderly.description: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Vridhjan Pension Yojna” is an old-age pension scheme implemented by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Bihar to provide financial assistance to elderly citizens. Under the scheme, a monthly pension is given to individuals who are aged 60 years or above.

elderly.name: INDIRAMMA Old Age Pension (Urban)
elderly.description: "INDIRAMMA Old Age Pension (Urban)" scheme aims to provide monthly pensions to destitute elderly persons aged 65 years or above with little or no means of subsistence and no family or relative to depend upon. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, and be a resident of Andhra Pradesh.

elderly.name: Mizoram Grant-in-Aid to Voluntary Organisations and Individuals
elderly.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to voluntary organizations and individuals to support welfare activities for disadvantaged and marginalized groups such as women, children, disabled persons, elderly, and socially vulnerable individuals.

disability.name: Disability Pension (BBOCWWB)
disability.description: Under the scheme, eligible workers receive ₹1,000/- per month for permanent disabilities caused by conditions such as paralysis, leprosy, tuberculosis, or accidents. Additionally, a one-time assistance of ₹75,000/- is granted for total permanent disability, and ₹50,000/- for partial disability.

disability.name: Disability Pension (HPBOCWWB)
disability.description: The scheme "Disability Pension," introduced by the Himachal Pradesh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HPBOCWWB), Government of Himachal Pradesh, provides a monthly pension of ₹500/- to registered beneficiaries in case of disability caused by accidents or diseases.

disability.name: Disability Pension (GBOCWWB)
disability.description: Through the "Disability Pension" scheme, the worker who is permanently disabled due to Paralysis / Leprosy / Tuberculosis(TB) / Accident is provided with financial assistance of ₹300/- per month, and an ex-gratia payment of not more than ₹10,000/-, depending on the percentage of the disability.

disability.name: Disability Pension (MBOCWWB)
disability.description: Under the scheme, the Board shall provide disability pension to a beneficiary who is permanently disabled due to paralysis, leprosy, T.B., accidents,etc. Additionally, workers will be eligible for an exgratia payment based on percentage of disability & subject to condition as may fixed by the Board.

disability.name: Unique Disability Identity - DNH & DD
disability.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
disability.description: UDID Card or Unique Disability Identity card is an initiative by Government of India with a view of creating a National Database for Persons with Disabilities (PwDs). Under the UDID project Disability Certificate and Unique Disability Identity Card is issued to each PwD through online platform.

disability.name: Financial Assistance to 75% or Permanent Disability
disability.description: The Financial Assistance to 75% or Permanent Disability was launched by the Maharashtra Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (MBOCWW), Labor Department Maharashtra. In scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,00,000/- to the registered worker in case of 75 % or more permanent disability.

disability.name: Disability Pension For Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
disability.description: The scheme “Disability Pension for Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

disability.name: State Disability Pension
disability.description: The Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Mizoram launched the State Disability Pension scheme. It provides a monthly pension of ₹350 to 200 eligible individuals who are completely blind or bedridden.

disability.name: Disability Relief - Telangana
disability.description: The "Disability Relief" scheme was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Dept. Telangana aimed at providing financial support to registered building & other construction workers who suffer from total or partial permanent disabilities.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)
disability.description: The "Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (Maharashtra)" is implemented by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Dept., Govt. of Maharashtra. The differently-abled individuals aged 18 to 65 years with a disability of 80% and above are eligible to receive a pension of ₹600/- per month.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (Punjab)
disability.description: The "Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)" provides ₹300/- per month to disabled persons (80% or more disability) aged 18 and above. After age 80, the amount increases to ₹500/-. Dwarfs are also eligible.

disability.name: 60% and above Disability Allowances
disability.description: "60% and Disability Allowance" is a pension scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Govt of Tripura. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in the form of a monthly pension of ₹2,000/- to differently-abled persons with a disability of 60% and above.

disability.name: State Disability Scholarship (Scholarship for Persons with Disabilities)
disability.description: The scheme “State Disability Scholarship” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Nagaland to provide financial assistance to students from Class I to Class VIII who have a disability of 40% and above.

disability.name: Ex-gratia Scheme: Disability Compensation (P.B.O.C.W.W.B)
disability.description: The "Ex-gratia Scheme: Disability Compensation'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Punjab, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the registered worker in the event of complete or partial disability.

disability.name: Disability Pension for the Construction Workers
disability.description: The "Disability Pension for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme that provides monthly disability pension of ₹3000/- to the permanently disabled member due to paralysis, leprosy, T.B and accidents.

disability.name: Disability Assistance (ANBOCWWB)
disability.description: The scheme provides financial assistance to registered construction workers who become disabled due to an accident during the course of their employment on the production of a certificate from competent medical authorities in respect of the percentage of disability.

disability.name: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Disability Allowance Scheme
disability.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to the differently able unemployed persons with 40% disability or more in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

disability.name: Disability Relief Allowance Scheme
disability.description: The Disability Relief Allowance Scheme under the Department of Social Justice, Government of Himachal Pradesh provides financial assistance to individuals with disabilities to help them manage their living costs and improve their quality of life.

disability.name: Permanent Disability/ Death Benefit for the Construction Workers
disability.description: The "Permanent Disability/ Death Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides financial assistance is provided to the nominees/ dependents of a member, in case of his/her death or Permanent Disability.

disability.name: Procedure for Making Medical Certificate (for Certifying Disability)
disability.description: The certificate aims to ensure that persons with disabilities can easily obtain authentic medical certification required to avail benefits under various social welfare schemes, including disability pensions, scholarships, healthcare facilities, and employment reservations.

disability.name: Disability Assistance For Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)
disability.description: The scheme “Disability Assistance for Registered Worker (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

disability.name: Chief Minister's State Disability Pension Scheme - Sikkim
disability.description: The scheme “Chief Minister's State Disability Pension Scheme (CMDPS)” was started by the Women & Child Welfare Department, Govt. of Sikkim to provide financial assistance to the differently abled person who has a disability of 40% and above.

disability.name: Disability Pension and Ex-Gratia (K.B.O.C.W.W.B)
disability.description: The "Disability Pension and Ex-Gratia'' by the BOCW Welfare Board, Department of Labour, Karnataka, is a welfare scheme that provides a monthly pension to beneficiaries partially disabled due to worksite accidents or diseases, with an additional ex-gratia payment based on disability percentage.

disability.name: Petrol Subsidy To Persons With Disability
disability.description: Under the Petrol Subsidy To Persons With Disability scheme handicapped person using motorized vehicles are entitled to 50% subsidy on actual expenditure on the purchase of petrol/diesel subject to fulfillment of other conditions laid down under the scheme.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme - Tamil Nadu
disability.description: The 'Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme' is a state initiative by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. Its goal is to offer a ₹1,000 pension to individuals aged 18 and above. Eligibility criteria include a disability percentage of 80% or above.

disability.name: Partial Disability Benefit for the Construction Workers
disability.description: The "Partial Disability Benefit for the Construction Workers" by the Sikkim BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, is a welfare scheme of the board that provides financial assistance is provided to the nominees/ dependents of a member, in case of his/her partial disability.

disability.name: West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Accidental Disability
disability.description: "West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Scheme: Accidental Disability" is a social welfare scheme by the West Bengal Migrant Workers’ Welfare Board, that provides one-time assistance to the registered Migrant Worker in case of disability arising out of accidents during work.

disability.name: Disability (Due to Accident or Other Reason) Scheme- Haryana Labour Welfare Board
disability.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments in Haryana based on their percentage of disability, whether the disability occurs due to an accident or other reasons inside or outside the workplace.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme- Chhattisgarh
disability.description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹500/- is provided to severely disabled (with a disability of 80% and above) and multi-disabled individuals aged 18 to 79 years who are living below the poverty line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.

disability.name: Madhya Pradesh Kalakar Evam Sahityakar Kalyan Kosh Niyam- Disability Assistance
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide one-time financial assistance to physically disabled artists and litterateurs for disability-related medical treatment and rehabilitation.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme - Sikkim
disability.description: The scheme “Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (IGNDPS)” was started by the Department of Women & Child Welfare, Govt. of Sikkim in 2014. Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to differently-abled persons with severe or multiple disabilities of more than 80%.

disability.name: Disability Benefit Who Met With an Accident at Worksite
disability.description: The "Disability Benefit Who Met With an Accident at Worksite" was launched by the Tripura Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Dept. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to registered construction worker who suffer from disabilities due to accident at their worksite

disability.name: Vikaas-Day Care Scheme For Person with Disability Children
disability.description: Vikaas is a Day care scheme, primarily to expand the range of opportunities available to a person with disability attaining the age of 10 years for enhancing interpersonal and vocational skills as they are on a transition to higher age groups.

disability.name: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Training and Rehabilitation in Case of Permanent Disability due to Accident
disability.description: The scheme aims to rehabilitate drivers and conductors who suffer permanent disability due to accidents by providing skill training for alternative employment to the beneficiaries.

disability.name: Disability Pension (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
disability.description: The Board provides financial assistance as disability pension to a beneficiary who is permanently disabled due to paralysis leprosy, TB., accident etc. in addition to this pension he/she will be eligible for an one time Ex-gratia payment depending upon the percentage of disability.

disability.name: Bihar Disability Pension Scheme
disability.description: The objective of this scheme is to provide social security to the persons with disabilities (PwDs) of the poor family of the society by providing them financial assistance. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹400/- is given to PwDs of 40% or more, regardless of their income or age group.

disability.name: Group Accident Insurance Scheme under PMMSY: Accidental death or Permanent Total Disability Gujarat
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to fishermen/fishermen's families in case of death or injury. Through this scheme, insurance coverage for death permanent partial disability is provided to eligible fishers.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme (Jammu and Kashmir)
disability.description: Launched on 15th August 1995, the "Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme"is a pension scheme by the Department Of Social Welfare  Jammu and Kashmir. In this scheme, a pension of ₹1000/- is provided to differently-abled individuals from 'Below Poverty Line'.

disability.name: Disability Pension - West Bengal
disability.description: In 2010, the Women and Child Development and Social Welfare Department of the West Bengal State Government introduced the "Disability Pension" scheme.

disability.name: Sparsh Abhiyan: Surgery to Prevent Disability of Poor and Destitute Disabled People of Madhya Pradesh
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide surgical treatment to prevent disability among poor and destitute disabled persons. Benefits include financial assistance/reimbursement for various surgeries related to visual, hearing, bone impairment, and leprosy, available to eligible residents of Madhya Pradesh.

disability.name: Bihar Shatabdi Asangathit Karyakshetra Kamagaar Evan Shilpakar Samajik Suraksha Yojana: Permanent Partial Disability
disability.description: “Permanent Partial Disability” under the “Bihar Shatabdi Asangathit Karyakshetra Kamagaar Evan Shilpakar Samajik Suraksha Yojana” launched by the Labour Resources Dept, Bihar, provides financial assistance of ₹37,500/- to the families of workers or craftsmen in case of permanent partial disablement.

disability.name: Disability Pension (UKBOCWWB)
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,000 to construction workers registered with Uttarakhand Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board who have become permanently disabled due to paralysis, leprosy, accidents, etc. In addition, an ex-gratia amount of ₹40,000 is also provided.

disability.name: Marriage Grant for the Marriage of the Daughter of War Disabled Ex-Servicemen above 50% Disability
disability.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹21,000/- is provided for the marriage of each dependent daughter of war-disabled ex-servicemen whose disability has been assessed above 50%, for up to two daughters who are at least 18 years old.

disability.name: Disability Aids and Appliances - Telangana
disability.description: The "Disability Aids and Appliances" scheme was launched by the Telangana Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, LET&F (Labour) Dept. Telangana to provide artificial limbs, wheelchairs, tricycles, & other fabricated appliances to registered construction workers who have lost their limb

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme- Bihar
disability.description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹400/- is provided to persons with disabilities in the age group of 18 to 79 years who belong to Below Poverty Line (BPL) families to support them financially. This scheme is centrally sponsored.

disability.name: Surgical Grant For The Prevention Of Disability
disability.description: The "Surgical Grant for the Prevention of Disability" scheme is started by the Government of Uttar Pradesh and operated by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Uttar Pradesh.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme - Jharkhand
disability.description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension is provided to severely disabled and multi-disabled individuals aged 18 and above who are living below the poverty line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.

disability.name: Marriage Assistance to Person with Disability / BPL
disability.description: The scheme aims to support differently-abled brides/bridegrooms from BPL families by providing financial assistance to meet marriage-related expenses. Under this scheme, an amount of ₹30,000/- is provided to Scheduled Tribe, differently-abled brides/bridegrooms for their first marriage.

disability.name: Scheme for Persons with Benchmark Disability Requiring High Support
disability.description: The scheme aims to promote economic self-reliance and ensure the well-being of persons with benchmark disabilities requiring high support. It provides a one-time financial assistance of ₹40,000/- to eligible applicants who are bonafide residents of Goa and belong to the EWS Category.

disability.name: Compensation for Loss of Life and Property Caused by Wild Animals in and around Forest Areas: Assistance in case of Death/Injury/Disability due to Wild Animal Attack
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide timely financial assistance and relief to individuals or their dependents in cases of death, injury, or disability caused by attacks from wild animals such as tigers, leopards, elephants, bears, crocodiles, snakes, and other specified species in and around forest

disability.name: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having Children
disability.description: The scheme provides an additional pension to 100% disabled ex-servicemen who were members of the Armed Forces & have been released from service due to 100% disability or permanent incapacity to work, provided the disability or incapacity is attributable to service.

disability.name: Bihar Shatabdi Asangathit Karyakshetra Kamagaar Evan Shilpakar Samajik Suraksha Yojana: Total Permanent Disability
disability.description: “Total Permanent Disability” under the “Bihar Shatabdi Asangathit Karyakshetra Kamagaar Evan Shilpakar Samajik Suraksha Yojana” launched by the Labour Resources Department, Bihar, provides financial assistance of ₹75,000/- to the families of workers or craftsmen in case of permanent disablement.

disability.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana: Accident Insurance Scheme - Uttarakhand
disability.description: Under this scheme, fish farmers are provided insurance coverage of ₹5 lakh in case of accidental death/total permanent disability, ₹2.5 lakh for partial disability, & ₹50,000 for hospitalization. No premium is required to be paid by fish farmers, entire cost of the insurance is fully borne by Dept.

disability.name: Motor Vehicle Driver-Conductor Welfare Scheme- Pradhanmantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
disability.description: This scheme provides accident insurance coverage to registered drivers and conductors, offering financial protection in the event of accidental death or permanent disability.

disability.name: Scheme to Provide Relief in Case of Death or Disability of Registered Building Workers
disability.description: The "Scheme to Provide Relief in Case of Death or Disability of Registered Building Workers" is a Welfare Scheme by the Andhra Pradesh Building & Other Construction Workers LET&F (Labour) Dept. The scheme provides financial assistance to help mitigate the financial burden on the worker's family.

disability.name: Additional Pension to 100% Disabled Ex-Serviceman having No Child
disability.description: The scheme provides an additional amount of ₹100/- p.m., in addition to pension amount, to 100% disabled ex-servicemen who were members of Armed Forces & have been released from service due to 100% disability/permanent incapacity to work, provided disability or incapacity is attributable to service.

disability.name: Small Industries Unit for Persons with Disabilities
disability.description: This scheme provides loan of up to ₹25 lakhs is provided to persons with disabilities for establishing small industrial units focused on manufacturing, fabrication, & production. Permanent residents of Haryana, aged 18 or older, with a disability of 40% or more, is eligible to avail the benefits.

disability.name: Pre-Matric  Scholarship for Students with  Disabilities, DNH & DD
disability.state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
disability.description: The scheme provides a maintenance allowance of ₹500 per month for day scholars and ₹800 per month for hostellers, a disability allowance of up to ₹4,000 per annum, and a book allowance of ₹1,000 per annum to support the school education of students with disabilities.

disability.name: Grant of Financial Assistance to Differently Abled Person
disability.description: The scheme “Grant of Financial Assistance to Differently Abled Person” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry was introduced to provide monthly financial assistance to Persons with Disability to maintain their minimum standard of living.

disability.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme: Pension to Physically Challenged Persons
disability.description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1,000/- is provided to poor physically handicapped persons (including those who are blind, deaf, or dumb) with a degree of disability 40% or above and having no source of income.

disability.name: Divyang Pension Scheme - Uttarakhand
disability.description: The scheme aims to support persons with disabilities in meeting their basic needs and improving their quality of life. Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- is provided to persons with disabilities who are above18 years of age & have a disability of more than 40%.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Special Ability Pension
disability.description: National Disability Pension Scheme is a government scheme aimed at providing financial assistance to specially-abled individuals residing in India.

disability.name: Teelu Rauteli Pension Scheme
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹1,200/- to male and female individuals above 18 years of age who have incurred a partial disability of 20% to 40% while performing agricultural activities.

disability.name: Children With Special Needs Under Goa Sarva Shiksha Abhivan
disability.description: The "Children With Special Needs (CWSN)" scheme aims to provide comprehensive educational support and resources tailored to the needs of children with disabilities. It is designed to ensure that every child, regardless of their disability type (intellectual, physical, etc.), receives the necessary a

disability.name: Merit Awards
disability.description: In the "Merit Awards" scheme, awards are given to the students with disability who rank 1st, 2nd, and 3rd among disabled students in the Secondary School Certificate (S.S.C.) and Higher Secondary Certificate (H.S.C.)  in their respective divisional boards of education.

disability.name: Supply of Radio to the Blind Persons
disability.description: “Supply of Radio to the Blind Persons" was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry. In this scheme, a radio is provided to the blind person for recreation. The applicant should have disability of 40% or above, and should be a Native/Resident of Puducherry.

disability.name: Prosthetic Aid Scheme
disability.description: In the "Prosthetic Aid Scheme", Prosthetic Aids and Artificial Appliances (Tricycles, Wheel Chairs, Crutches, Hearing Aids, and Artificial Limbs, etc) are provided to Persons with Disability (e.g. blind, deaf, orthopedically or physically handicapped) by the Social Welfare Department.

disability.name: Sant Surdas Scheme
disability.description: Under the scheme, monthly financial assistance is provided to Persons with Disabilities aged between 0 and 17 years, who have a disability of more than 80% and are registered in the Below Poverty Line (BPL) list.

disability.name: Vidhyadeep Yojana
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide accidental insurance cover to students studying in all Primary, Secondary, and Higher Secondary schools across Gujarat State. It offers financial assistance up to ₹50,000/- in case of accidental death or permanent disability to the student's parent or successor.

disability.name: Incentive Award For Marriage With Disabled Person
disability.description: "Incentive Award for Marriage with Disabled Person" is a Grant by the Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, incentive is granted to a person who marries a Person with Disability. This is a State Sponsored Scheme. Only the citizens who are domicile of Manipur can apply.

disability.name: Disha - Early Intervention and School Readiness Scheme
disability.description: This scheme aims at setting up Disha Centres for early intervention for Person with Disability (PwD) in 0-10 years of age covered under the National Trust Act, through therapies, trainings and providing support to family members.

disability.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide social security pensions to divyangjans aged 18 and above who belong to a poor family (BPL) in society.

disability.name: Non-Governmental Aided Organization (Special Schools And Vocational Training Centre) For Disabled
disability.description: In this scheme, Special Education is provided to children with disability who are below the age of 18 years. The child should be enrolled in a special school run by a Non-Governmental Aided Organization. Vocational Training is given to special children above the age of 18 years.

disability.name: Accidental Benefit
disability.description: The "Accidental Benefit'' scheme by the BOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department,West Bengal, is a welfare scheme that provides financial assistance to the beneficiary in case of hospitalization and disability due to an accident.

disability.name: Ex-gratia Payment for the Construction Workers
disability.description: The "Ex-gratia Payment for the Construction Workers" by the Delhi Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Department, Delhi, is a welfare scheme for the registered workers of the board that provides an ex-gratia amount of ₹1,00,000/- in case of permanent disability.

disability.name: Grant of Fuel Subsidy to Differently Abled Persons Who Are Owning Motorised Vehicles
disability.description: The scheme “Grant of Fuel Subsidy to Differently Abled Persons Who Are Owning Motorised Vehicles” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry was introduced to provide a subsidy of upto 50 % of the cost of fuel to persons with disability who own motorised vehicles.

disability.name: Special Education And Vocational Training Through Government Institutions
disability.description: In this scheme, Special Education is provided to children with disability between the age group of 6 to 18 years in the Government Special Schools and Vocational Training is provided to special children above the age of 18 years. Only citizens who are permanent residents of Maharashtra are eligible.

disability.name: 100% State Government Divyangjan Term Loan Yojana
disability.description: The scheme provides provide financial support to native residents of Gujarat who have a disability of 40% or more. The eligible individuals can avail of a term loan ranging from ₹50,000/- to ₹1,00,000/- at a concessional interest rate of 6% per annum for a repayment period of five years.

disability.name: Financial Assistance For Procuring Mobility Equipment To Disabled Ex-Servicemen (All Ranks)
disability.description: The scheme provides financial assistance of a maximum of ₹ 1,00,000 from the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund (AFFDF) for the procurement of modified scooters, crutches and wheelchairs for Ex-Servicemen who are disabled after their retirement from service with a disability of 50% or more.

disability.name: Motorized Tricycle Yojana
disability.description: Under this scheme, motorized tricycles are provided to specially-abled individuals with 50% or more locomotor disability to support self-employment and pursuing higher education from Senior Higher Secondary onwards.

disability.name: Medical Assistance (A.B.O.C.W.W.B)
disability.description: Medical assistance shall be provided to Building & Other Construction Workers who are registered under A.B.O.C.W.W.B. during hospitalization, partial disability & for critical diseases such as Cancer, Heart attack, Failure of kidney, Liver cirrhosis etc. as per the decision of the Board.

disability.name: State Award for the Welfare of the Handicapped
disability.description: “State Award for the Welfare of the Handicapped” was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry. The individuals and institutions are conferred awards on 3rd December every year to encourage them to become economically productive to serve the cause of the Persons with Disability.

disability.name: State Post-metric Scholarship For Disabled
disability.description: The "State Post-metric Scholarship for Disabled" is a scheme by the Department of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to encourage students with disability (SwDs) to pursue higher education.

disability.name: GST Exemption Certificate Scheme
disability.description: "GST Exemption Certificate Scheme" has been introduced by the Dept. of Heavy Industries, for issuing certificates to Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) having a disability percentage equal to or greater than 40%. The scheme provides GSC Concession to orthopedically disabled persons on purchase of car.

disability.name: INDIRAMMA Disabled Pension (Rural)
disability.description: "INDIRAMMA Disabled Pension (Rural)" scheme aims to disburse monthly pensions to the individuals 18 years or above in age and having a disability of 40% or above. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, be a resident of the district, and not be covered under any other Pension Scheme.

disability.name: State Pre-metric Scholarship For Disabled
disability.description: The "State Pre-metric Scholarship for Disabled" is a scheme by the Department of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to encourage students with disability (SwDs) to pursue education. This scheme is 100% funded by the Govt. of Maharashtra.

disability.name: Samarth-Respite Care Scheme
disability.description: Samarth (Respite Care) scheme, launched by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, aims at setting up Samarth Centres for providing respite and residential care for the specified categories of Persons with Disability (PwD).

disability.name: Chief Ministergi Shotharabasingi Tengbang (CMST): Scholarship Of Students With Disabilities
disability.description: "CMST: Scholarship of Students with Disabilities" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Govt. of Manipur. In this scheme, the Students with Disability who are a domicile of the State of Manipur, and are studying in Class 1st and and above are awarded with scholarship of upto ₹ 8,000/-.

disability.name: Matrimonial Incentives
disability.description: In this scheme, if a Person with Disability (PwD) gets married to a non-disabled person, then the couple is provided a marriage incentive of up to ₹ 50,000. Only citizens who are permanent residents of the state of Maharashtra are eligible to apply for this scheme.

disability.name: Financial Assistance For Aids And Appliances For Disabled Persons
disability.description: The "Financial Assistance for Aids and Appliances for Disabled Persons" is a scheme by the Govt. of Maharashtra. The objective of this scheme is to provide assistance to Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) for the purchase of aids and appliances as per their age group and the type of disability.

disability.name: Financial Assistance for the Treatment of Blind, Disabled, Deaf, Dumb, or Mentally Challenged Ex-Servicemen and their Dependents (Wife and Children)
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide monthly financial assistance for the treatment of ex-servicemen and their dependents (wife & children) who have a disability of 40% or more and are suffering from serious illnesses such as cancer, leprosy, tuberculosis, kidney and cardiac ailments, paralysis, etc.

disability.name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Antyodaya Parivar Suraksha Yojana (DAYALU-II)
disability.description: The aim of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to residents of Haryana in case of accidental death or permanent disability occurred due to stray cattle/animal such as such as cow, bull, oxen, donkey, dog bite, mule, nilgai and buffalo that roam freely.

disability.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
disability.description: An Accident Insurance Scheme offering accidental death and disability cover for death or disability on account of an accident.

disability.name: Disable Marriage Scheme (Divyang Lagna Sahay)
disability.description: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to persons with disabilities when a person with a disability marries another person with a disability, as well as when a non-disabled person marries someone with a disability.

disability.name: Pension To The Disabled Person
disability.description: The objective of the pension to the disabled person scheme is providing a pension to disabled persons is multifaceted, but generally centers around promoting social welfare, equity, and inclusivity.

disability.name: Rehabilitation Treatment For The Disabled
disability.description: The government of Meghalaya provides rehabilitation treatment for persons with disabilities under the "Disability Rehabilitation Scheme".

disability.name: Financial Assistance to Physically/Mentally Disabled Children of Beneficiary (CBOCWWB)
disability.description: Under this scheme, registered construction workers whose child has a disability of 40% or more will receive financial assistance.

disability.name: Prosthetic Aid and Appliances for Person with Disabilities
disability.description: Under this scheme, a Person with Disabilities with 40% or more disability is given relief in his/her disability as well as equipment for self-employment within the limit of ₹20,000/-. The scheme is fully funded by the state government.

disability.name: Vijayamritham Scheme - Cash Award For Meritorious Children With Disabilities
disability.description: The scheme “Vijayamritham Scheme - Cash Award for Meritorious Children with Disabilities” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

disability.name: Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person
disability.description: The "Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person" provides financial assistance of up to ₹25,000 for the purchase of electric scooters to eligible persons with orthopedic disabilities.

disability.name: Education Loan for Persons with Disabilities- Haryana
disability.description: Under this scheme, education loans of up to ₹50 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities (OH/VH/HH/MR) for pursuing professional and technical education both in India and abroad.

disability.name: Scholarship For Differently Abled Students
disability.description: The scheme “Scholarship for Differently Abled Students” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

disability.name: Supply of Prosthetic Appliances to Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: The scheme “Supply of Prosthetic Appliances to Differently Abled Persons” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. In this scheme, prosthetic appliances are supplied to differently-abled persons free of cost to minimize the mobility challenges experienced by them.

disability.name: Grant of Transport Allowance to Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: The scheme “Grant of Transport Allowance to Differently Abled Persons" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. In this scheme, a fixed sum ₹ 300/- per month shall be paid as Transport Allowance to the differently abled individuals.

disability.name: Scholarships to Students with Disabilities Scheme
disability.description: The objective of the scheme is to assist students with disabilities to secure education, academic, technical, or professional training to enable them to earn a living and to become useful members of society.

disability.name: Cash Award to the Meritorious Visually Impaired Students Obtaining First Three Ranks at the State Level in the SSLC and HSC Examination
disability.description: The objective of this scheme is to award cash prizes to meritorious differently-abled persons (visually challenged students) who are studying in government and private schools of Puducherry and secure first, second and third rank concerning total marks in the SSLC and HSC exams.

disability.name: Insurance Scheme For Artisans Component of the Development of Handicrafts Scheme
disability.description: Under the scheme "Insurance Scheme For Artisans", artisans are covered under Jana Shree Bima Yojana LIC or any other suitable policy. The premium amount, as stipulated in the insurance policy, is shared, with 50% from the Social Security Fund and the remaining 50% from the Government.

disability.name: Mukhyamantri Vishesh Yogyajan Sammaan Pension Yojana
disability.description: The "Mukhyamantri Vishesh Yogyajan Samman Pension Yojana" (MVSYS) stands as a testament to the commitment of the Government of Rajasthan towards the welfare of its citizens, particularly those with disabilities.

disability.name: Aam Aadmi Bima Yojana (Maharashtra)
disability.description: The "Aam Aadmi Bima Yojana" scheme is implemented by the Social Justice & Special Assistance Department, Government of Maharashtra. This Centrally Sponsored Scheme is aimed at providing insurance and scholarship benefits to landless labourers in rural areas, aged 18 to 59 years.

disability.name: Integrated Social Security Scheme - Pension For Physically Challenged Persons
disability.description: ISSS-PPCP is a State Sponsored Scheme by the Social Welfare Dept. of the Govt. of J&K wherein financial assistance is provided to Physically Challenged Person who have meager support or no source of livelihood. A pension of ₹1000 per pensioner per month is deposited into their bank account.

disability.name: Group Insurance for Differently Abled Person Government Employees
disability.description: The scheme “Group Insurance for Differently Abled Person Government Employees" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. In this scheme, in the case of death due to accident while in service the sum insured will be given to the family of the deceased employee.

disability.name: Supply of Sarees and Dhoties to Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: In this scheme, free dhothies and sarees or equivalent Direct Benefit Transfer are provided to the differently abled persons who are benefited under the monthly financial assistance schemes in lieu of Diwali / Pongal / local regional festivals.

disability.name: Financial Assistance to Meet the Funeral Expenses of Differently Abled Person
disability.description: The scheme 'Financial Assistance to Meet the Funeral Expenses of Differently Abled Person' was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. In this scheme, financial assistance of ₹2,000/- is provided to meet the expenses in connection with funeral, in the event of the...

disability.name: Financial Assistive Devices for Persons with Disabilities
disability.description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes & Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under the scheme, loans of up to ₹5 lakhs are provided to persons with disabilities who are either employed in reputable organizations or have received confirmed appointment letters.

disability.name: Awas Sahayta Yojana for 100% Hearing and Visually Impaired Disabled Students in Special Trades of Industrial Training Institutes
disability.description: The scheme aims to ensure qualitative admission and enable 100% hearing and visually impaired students to obtain high-quality technical education free from economic constraints. It provides housing assistance and expenses for food and accommodation, up to ₹4,000/- to PwD Students.

disability.name: Chief Minister Divyangjan Empowerment Scheme (Sambal)
disability.description: The State government of Bihar launched the "Chief Minister Divyangjan Empowerment Scheme (Sambal) " scheme with the aim of improving the lives of Disable persons. Financial assistance is provided by the government through these schemes.

disability.name: Aravanaippu Illam
disability.description: The scheme “Aravanaippu Illam" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. The objective of this scheme is to take care of persons who are lacking basic needs & proper care in society, and to maintain them in a safe living condition.

disability.name: Supply of Invalid Carriages (Motorized Tri-cycles) to the Persons With Disabilities
disability.description: “Supply of Invalid Carriages (Motorized Tri-cycles) to the Persons With Disabilities” by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry is introduced to supply invalid carriages (motorised tricycles) free of cost to the differently abled persons engaged in gainful employment or pursuing education.

disability.name: Nishaktata Pension Yojana (JBOCWWB)
disability.description: "Nishaktata Pension Yojana (JBOCWWB)" is a scheme by the Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development Govt of Jharkhand. The scheme provides a pension of ₹ 1,000/- per month to the registered beneficiary who is permanently disabled due to paralysis/leprosy/tuberculosis/accident.

disability.name: Leprosy Pension Scheme
disability.description: This Leprosy Pension Scheme has been started by the Government of Uttar Pradesh and operated by the Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Uttar Pradesh.

disability.name: Divyang Pension Yojana
disability.description: The State Government of Uttar Pradesh has launched Divyang Pension Yojana to improve and uplift the standard of living of disabled citizens.

disability.name: Purchase of Vehicle for Commercial Hiring Purpose for Persons with Disabilities
disability.description: Under the scheme, loans are provided to differently-abled persons for commercial hiring purposes up to ₹10.00 lakhs, and for the purchase of special category vehicles like JCBs, trucks, road rollers, etc., loans up to ₹25.00 lakhs are available.

disability.name: Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme
disability.description: "Divyangjan Scholarship Scheme" provides financial assistance for the education and training of differently-abled children, who are regular students in a school or college. The application needs to be submitted to the District Office, Panchayat and Social Welfare / Janpad Panchayat Office.

disability.name: Divyangjan Kaushal Yojana
disability.description: The scheme aims to ensure dignified livelihood opportunities for Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) by providing industry-relevant and customized training specific to each group. The scheme provides skill development in high-growth sectors such as Information Technology, Animation, Visual Effect, etc.

disability.name: Madhu Babu Pension Yojana
disability.description: "Madhu Babu Pension Yojana" under the Social Security and Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Department, Government Of Odisha is a social welfare scheme designed to provide financial assistance to elderly citizens, widows, and disabled persons who are economically weaker.

disability.name: Perunthalaivar Karma Veerar Kamarajar Scheme of Financial Assistance Towards Funeral Expenses of the Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: The scheme “Perunthalaivar Karma Veerar Kamarajar Scheme of Financial Assistance Towards Funeral Expenses of the Differently Abled Persons" was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry. In this scheme, financial assistance of ₹ 15,000/- is provided to meet the funeral expenses.

disability.name: Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students
disability.description: The scheme “Award of Scholarship to Differently Abled Person Students” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry is introduced to provide scholarship to the differently abled students, studying from Class 1st upto Postgraduate/ Professional courses.

disability.name: Issue of Free Bus Pass to Differently Abled Person
disability.description: The scheme “Issue of Free Bus Pass to Differently Abled Person” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. The scheme provides free bus passes to all the differently abled persons to facilitate their mobility/transport in buses run by the Government and NGOs.

disability.name: Personal Accident Relief for Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: The scheme 'Personal Accident Relief for Differently Abled Persons' was launched by the Dept. for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons. In this scheme, accident relief is provided to differently abled persons up to a sum of ₹1,00,000/-(Death), & relief is given for loss of both legs/both hand...

disability.name: Early Intervention Center for the Children with Intellectually Disabled
disability.description: The "Early Intervention Center for the Children with Intellectually Disabled" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu.

disability.name: Mukhyamantri Divyangjan Vivah Protsahan Anudan Yojana
disability.description: The objective of this scheme is to provide social security to the disabled women/men of the state by encouraging their marriage and providing them financial assistance. This scheme is fully funded by the Government of Bihar.

disability.name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Assistance on Death and Permanent Disablement
disability.description: The scheme provides financial relief to the beneficiaries in case of permanent disability due to accidents or their dependents/nominees in case of accidental or natural death.

disability.name: Free Distribution of Rice to Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: The scheme “Free Distribution of Rice to Differently Abled Persons” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry was introduced to distribute 15 Kg of rice per month or equivalent Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) to the differently abled persons.

disability.name: Disablement Benefit Scheme (PBAOCWWB)
disability.description: Through this scheme, financial assistance of ₹75,000/- is extended based on the Disablement Certificate issued by the Competent Authority to the Registered Construction Worker of the Board. The amount is credited through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into the bank account of the worker.

disability.name: Scheduled Tribe Relief Scheme
disability.description: Launched on 31st March 2017, the "Scheduled Tribe Relief Scheme" by the Tribal Welfare and Scheduled Caste Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh, provides immediate support for destitute tribal brides and assistance to disabled, elderly, blind, and impoverished individuals.

disability.name: The Scheme Of State Award For Disabled
disability.description: The "The Scheme of State Award for Disabled" is a scheme by the Dept. of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. In this scheme, every year, the State Government felicitates awards to the Best Disabled Employees/Employers/Placement Agencies who have done outstanding work.

disability.name: Matru Jyothi - Financial Assistance For PwD Mothers
disability.description: The scheme “Matru Jyothi - Financial Assistance for PwD Mothers” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

disability.name: Nirmaan Shramik Mrtyu Evan Divyaang Sahaayata Yojana
disability.description: Chhattisgarh State Government started "Nirmaan Shramik Mrtyu Evan Divyaang Sahaayata Yojana" for Building and other construction workers.

disability.name: Assistance For Purchase of Aids/Appliances
disability.description: The "Assistance for Purchase of Aids/Appliances" scheme is to provide support to individuals with disabilities by facilitating access to assistive devices and appliances.

disability.name: Multimedia Training - Tamil Nadu
disability.description: The Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu, launched the "Multimedia Training Program" for people with locomotor and hearing impairments.

disability.name: Grant of Stipend to Differently Abled Trainees
disability.description: "Grant of Stipend to Differently Abled Trainees" by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry was introduced to provide financial assistance to differently abled individuals undergoing technical or professional training. The objective is to enable them to successfully complete their training.

disability.name: Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa - Persons with Disabilities
disability.description: The scheme “Mukhyamantri Samajik Sahayata Prakalpa - Persons with Disabilities" was launched by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura to provide financial assistance to Persons with Disabilities in the form of a monthly pension of ₹2,000/-.

disability.name: Chief Ministergi Shotharabasingi Tengbang
disability.description: "Chief Ministergi Shotharabasingi Tengbang" is a Social Welfare Scheme by the Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Manipur. The scheme provides Free Travel & Concession to the Persons with Disabilities. All the PwDs who are a domicile of the State of Manipur are eligible.

disability.name: Financial Assistance To Disabled Children (HBOCWWB)
disability.description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Disabled Children (HBOCWWB)” was launched by the Haryana Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (HBOCWWB), Labour Department Haryana.

disability.name: Government Special School for the Visually Handicapped and the Hearing Impaired
disability.description: The scheme “Government Special School for the Visually Handicapped and the Hearing Impaired” by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry, was introduced to facilitate the education and self-confidence development of visually impaired and hearing-impaired children.

disability.name: Allowance for 100% Blind
disability.description: The scheme  “Allowance for 100% Blind" aims to provide a monthly pension of ₹2,000/- to the blind persons of Tripura aged 10 years and above having 100% blindness. The application should be submitted to the nearest Child Development Project Officer (CDPO).

disability.name: Early Intervention Centre for Infants and Young Children with Hearing Impairment
disability.description: The "Early Intervention Centre for Infants and Young Children with Hearing Impairment" was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Government of Tamil Nadu. Under this scheme, Infants and young children with hearing impairment are given training to develop speech.

disability.name: Disabled Marriage Incentive Scheme
disability.description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance for marriage with a view to social rehabilitation of persons with disabilities who do not fall under the category of income tax payers.

disability.name: Death Assistance Scheme (MPBOCWWB)
disability.description: Launched on 2004, the scheme "Death Assistance Scheme" is a welfare scheme by the Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board (MPBOCWWB), Government of Madhya Pradesh. The scheme provides funeral assistance and ex-gratia payment to the heir of a worker in the event of their death.

disability.name: Maintenance Grant for Children with Disabilities from Birth
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹700/- per month to parents or guardians for the care of children below 18 years of age with more than 40% disability.

disability.name: State Programme For Rehabilitation Of Persons With Disabilities
disability.description: The scheme “State Programme for Rehabilitation of Persons with Disabilities” is a state sector ongoing scheme implemented for the welfare and providing rehabilitation services to disabled persons of the state under the Person with Disabilities Act 1995.

disability.name: Annual Tour to the Differently Abled Persons
disability.description: “Annual Tour to the Differently Abled Persons” was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry to allow the PwDs to see the places of cultural and historic importance and acquaint themselves with various aspects of our cultural heritage.

disability.name: Sanction of Motorized Three Wheeler to Orthopedically Challenged
disability.description: The "Sanction of Motorized Three Wheeler to Orthopedically Challenged" scheme aims to provide motorized three wheelers to orthopedically challenged persons. This initiative ensures that eligible individuals receive support to enhance their mobility and independence.

disability.name: Financial Assistance for Medical (JKBOCWWB)
disability.description: The "Financial Assistance for Medical" scheme by the JKBOCW Welfare Board, Labour Department, Jammu & Kashmir, provides financial support for medical expenses, including injury treatment, temporary and permanent disability, and the treatment of chronic diseases.

disability.name: Incentive Scheme for Marrying a Disabled Young Man/Woman
disability.description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance of ₹25,000/- to couples on marriage, where at least one partner has 40% or more disability and marries a non-disabled person, or where both partners have disabilities.

disability.name: Group Insurance Scheme for Powerloom Weavers
disability.description: The basic objective of this scheme is to provide insurance cover to the powerloom weavers in the case of natural death, accidental death as well as partial and permanent disability due to accident.

disability.name: Homes For Intellectually Impaired Persons
disability.description: The "Homes for Intellectually Impaired Persons" is a scheme by the Department of Social Justice & Special Assistance, Govt. of Maharashtra. In this scheme, Mentally Deficient Children who are in need of care and protection are admitted into shelter homes through the Child Welfare Committees.

disability.name: Residential School For Blinds
disability.description: The "Residential School for Blinds" have been established by the Social Welfare Department, Govt. of Jammu and Kashmir for the protection, welfare, and education of the Blind. The school is located at Roop Nagar, near Fire Brigade Office, Muthi, Jammu, 180013. The intake capacity is 50 inmates.

disability.name: Maintenance Allowance to Intellectually Disabled Persons
disability.description: The 'Maintenance Allowance to Intellectually Disabled Persons' scheme was launched by the Department for the Welfare of Differently Abled Persons, Govt of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide a maintenance allowance to intellectually disabled persons.
